Look to the glory that cannot be compared to the pleasures of sin. 5. Always look to the Lord who is with you and will come again. Those who belong to Christ Jesus have crucified the flesh with its passions and desires. - Galatians 5:24

Not just a list of nice words, but complete victory. "For I know the plans I have for you," declares the LORD, "plans to prosper you and not to harm you, plans to give you hope and a future." (Jeremiah 29:11) "And we know that in all things God works for the good of those who love him, who have been called according to his purpose." (Romans 8:28) "Call to me and I will answer you and tell you great and hidden things you have not known." (Jeremiah 33:2-3)
Love within the time given to you. Serve, give, share, rejoice together, and love within the precious time God has given you.

The conclusion of suffering is to live not by bread alone, but by every word that comes from the mouth of God. If you worry about bread, you will lose bread and other things. But if you hold onto His presence and fellowship, you will live by His word. He humbled you and let you hunger, and fed you with manna, which neither you nor your fathers had known, to make you know that man does not live by bread alone, but that man lives by every word that comes from the mouth of the LORD. - Deuteronomy 8:3
Do not hate yourself, but repent. Rather than hating your weak self, you should repent for not relying on the Lord more than anything else.
Word of grace received during the winter retreat. Obey 'Gunny'. Even if it is an evil 'Gunny', you must obey. Gunny Kim
How to prevent faith from falling away. "But I have prayed for you, that your faith may not fail. And when you have turned back, strengthen your brothers." - Luke 22:32

True proof shot. We take proof shots when meeting someone, dealing with food, or in situations that others should acknowledge. However, we want to avoid suffering and find giving up rights burdensome. But God authenticates everything we do for Him. We become glorious because of Him.
Shameful boasting. Those who walk with Jesus cannot boast of anything other than Jesus. It is profoundly shameful to try to prove oneself with perishable things before Jesus.
The only checkpoint. A life that checks reactions of people, possessions, and evaluations is miserable. We only need to stand before the Lord and confirm if we are in Jesus.
The power not to fear. If you give the firstfruits, give in advance, give gladly, give good things, and voluntarily give precious things, you will not fear.
Two things the Lord commanded: To believe and to share that belief. He will rule and be responsible for everything.
The primacy effect. What you do first, you will continue to do. Doing it in advance is power.
The sin of a Christian is not being moved. True faith is moved daily, every moment, by faith.
Do not fear disappointing others. Do not fret about disappointing others. You will not disappoint. Jesus bore the cross for that very reason.

A teacher is not a supervisor. A teacher is someone who teaches those who wish to learn. Learning means being imperfect and having many deficiencies. It means enabling what you cannot do to be done, what cannot be achieved to be achieved, and what you do not want to do to be done. This is qualitatively different from simply saying, "You must do well! Why can't you?" and evaluating.
The middle and high school youth mission trip is currently passing the Motorway M42 and is expected to arrive at the church around 6 o'clock.

If a soccer player only practiced 'goal celebrations' during the off-season and no other training, they would be a burden on the field. If you score many great goals, the celebrations will naturally follow. Even if you shed tears, first sow the seeds.
Conditional commitment of the unbeliever means committing if the Lord guarantees it. However, faith is committing to what the Lord will guarantee in the future, though it is not seen now.
Tell me your desires, and I will know who you are.
Be bold. It means to walk by faith.
The way to gain peace. Clinging will increase suffering, but entrusting will bring peace.
The debater and the admirer. Debaters, debate. I will marvel at God's grace.
Happiness is better. It is happiness to have no other hope, because the Lord alone is our hope.
Eating and grace increase together.

The content of faith. We must not be hard-hearted when we hear His voice. We must believe that He speaks through me and works through me. Israel, who was bound by their own judgment of being like grasshoppers before the Anakites in Canaan, despite God being with them, denied God's work and were rejected. However, Joshua and Caleb, who confessed, "God uses me and receives glory," became as they believed. Without faith, it is impossible to please God, and whoever would draw near to God must believe that He exists and that He rewards those who earnestly seek Him. - Hebrews 11:6
Believe and pray. Through me, through my lips, the Lord alone is glorified.
We win by faith. To win by faith means to win by looking to the Lord. If you want to win greatly and continuously, you must continuously look to the Lord.
Everything not done in faith is sin. Not walking by faith means not looking to the Lord. Enthusiasm not looking to the Lord is empty, and passion without focus is frightening.
The invincible. The humble person has their eyes of wisdom opened and sees Him, so there is nothing to fear.

The gospel we preached to you. At first, the word we delivered was the cross. And the word we preached again is the cross. Furthermore, the word we will preach in the future is the cross. But even if we or an angel from heaven should preach to you a gospel contrary to the one we preached to you, let him be accursed. - Galatians 1:8
The foolish person and the wise person. Foolishness is like trying to light a fire and then covering it with the dirt of forgetfulness and laziness. The true competition begins now.

The definition of heresy is demanding anything more than Jesus Christ. Galatians 1:8 But even if we or an angel from heaven should preach to you a gospel contrary to the one we preached to you, let him be accursed.
To be happy, above all else, one must receive understanding and love. That comes from the Lord. Then you will love and become beautiful without begging.
The victory of life is the victory of faith. Faith is not a trivial matter of what was done or not done. It is a matter of 'what is the priority?' and 'can it be sustained?'.

A choice without regret. If you were to sell something worth ten thousand pounds for fifty pounds, the person introducing it would not need to beg. Rather, it is a favor. In all my life, I have never regretted attending a retreat. That is because it is God's choice.
The reason you cannot continuously ask is because you ask for perishable things. Perishable things are sometimes added when seeking eternal things, and sometimes they disappear.
The Lord is greater than the set list. No one can limit the Lord's work. The reason for having a planned set list is for the sake of souls, and ultimately, it is God who transforms souls.
My identity can be known by what I always desire.
Believe in victory. No one expects to fall into heresy after today's service. And consequently, they do not fall. Do not believe you will fall into dirty sin. Victory comes from faith.
If you truly want to win, be only anointed.

The leader's attitude. A leader is not merely an information dispenser. Leaders are not appointed because many people do not know the importance of the Word and prayer and the fullness of the Holy Spirit. When you meet a true leader, you should gain strength in prayer, want to read the Word, and feel God's presence. Woe to leaders who only speak.

The reason the cross is heavy. The cross Jesus bore was rough and heavy. Therefore, it was difficult and frightening for Jesus to bear it, but the reason He bore that unwanted cross to the very end and drank the cup of wrath was so that He could treat me with that great love when He returns to this world.
Do not try to give the answer. A leader is not someone who gives the answer to all problems. They are reminding you of the path you already know.
What season is best for taking pictures? A picture where I look my best means I loved and was loved in that season.
Humble Grace Grace is meant to be shared, not proven. When you try to prove it, it becomes not grace but cumbersome heavy makeup.
Transcend reality and break delusions. Reality is the situation as it is, and delusion is believing what you want to believe. Faith is believing in God's sovereignty.
Boast in weakness. You will experience the Lord's sovereignty.
Weakness becomes hope. It is not by my undeserving strength, but by the blood of Jesus alone that we stand. Then your weakness will become hope.
Fiery Saturday Fellowship Meal Demonstration: Jjimdak, Spicy Jokbal
I run into the enemy's camp trusting in the Lord; I leap over the wall by my God. (2 Samuel 22:30)
Letting go... is not about discarding what is unnecessary. It is about cutting away what I valued as life because of Jesus, who is true life. Blood will flow.
Focus on the essence. The essence of faith is living by focusing on the Son of God who loved me daily and gave himself for me.
The beginning of suffering It is difficult because I try to become myself on my own. I am who I am by God's grace.
Being loved I am not called to receive love from people. Because I am a person who receives God's love, I can freely love and be loved.
He who knows my sitting and rising Entrust everything to Him who knows your sitting and rising. You will have absolute peace even in tribulation.
Core Technology Do not try to give the answer. Love is patient.
Guidance We all die when our time comes. We can die trembling, or we can die singing boldly. It's just the difference, but the outcome is very different.

What remains for the born-again believer Rebirth is by an incorruptible seed, the Word of God, and the Power & Ministry of the Holy Spirit. Jesus tells the disciples who have already been reborn and were prepared to die to receive the baptism of the Holy Spirit. We must start from the confession that without the Holy Spirit, there is nothing.
Another Person Where humble people gather, there is another Person present.

The Capital of Love What is needed to love? The answer is 'nothing is needed.' If it is something that can only be achieved by adding other things, it is a merger and acquisition transaction, not love. It is enough to have Jesus alone in your heart and a burning spirit.

The secret to overcoming is to continue. Then you will not only be filled but your influence will flow beyond yourself. 'What cannot be sustained' means 'not a leader.' The definition of a leader is someone who influences.

The power of a clay vessel The best thing a clay vessel can do is to contain. This is called receptivity. It means that by containing and receiving the precious 'Jesus,' you become the most powerful being.

When facing difficulties Difficulties are things I have no choice in. It means the Lord chooses. That is why we rely on Him and entrust ourselves to Him. Then the Lord reigns. When facing difficulties, though my faith is small, I rely more on my Lord whom I trust - Hymn 342
Worry and Happiness Do not worry about things you cannot handle. It is overstepping your bounds. A person of faith should be happy. Otherwise, it is dereliction of duty.
Hotter love than the remaining time. More important than the remaining period is to love each other fervently at this moment. I choose a day of fervent love over a thousand meaningless days.
Youth Sunday Part 2 – February 9, 2014 Being full of only ducks - My prime is when I hold onto one thing <Indiana Jones>
Saving lives incurs resistance. When saving lives, there is bound to be fierce resistance from death. However, if you overcome that fear, you will save many lives.
Evidence of unbelief - Hypocrisy It is being conscious of people. Be conscious only of God. Then you will be free from the gaze of others and hypocrisy.
Be free. You cannot be free until you are satisfied with Him. Choosing what perishes is not freedom but compulsion, and you become free from this when you pursue eternal values.
I am not an angel. Much less a demon. Humans are sometimes like angels and sometimes like demons, but I am solely by grace.

Beautiful people This is also a slogan introduced by an airline. Why should we become 'beautiful people'? To appeal to customers. So we diligently try to become 'beautiful people' by serving and advertising. This morning, there was no such advertisement and no particular achievement, but just by thinking of it, the thought of 'beautiful people' comes to mind. It feels really good. In the Lord, by their very existence, they are most beautiful.
Evidence of being blessed Knowing that each person given to me is an inexpressible blessing and being infinitely grateful for it.
The reason you are not lonely is because you are comforting others.
The efficacy of prayer. If you do not pray, you fear. Especially if you do not pray abundantly, you will be anxious even at falling leaves.

False faith is believing what you want to believe without verifying reality. Vague devotion without a God is superstition. Through faith, we come to know Him, make righteous choices, and obtain peace and salvation.
The "Burning Saturday" that came out after 10 years. "Now I finally understand why worship is so important," said a young man, wiping away tears.

The Song of the Bow (2 Samuel 1:17~). David, having passed through 15 wildernesses, sings the song of the bow, mourning both Saul, who persecuted him, and Jonathan, who loved him so dearly. Those who have passed through the wilderness can sing of the dawn.
Listen, and you will become wise and an authority who knows how to make decisions.
Focus on what is important. What is important is not "Do I receive the approval of people?" but "How do I love the people given to me?" Do not fear, only believe.
If you have been challenged and weakened, you will experience the perfect work of the Lord in your weakness.

Fear and prayer. To fear is to overstep your bounds. Not to pray is dereliction of duty. The realm of fear is not mine, and the duty to pray is mine. "Do not be anxious about anything, but in every situation, by prayer and petition, with thanksgiving, present your requests to God. And the peace of God, which transcends all understanding, will guard your hearts and your minds in Christ Jesus." - Philippians 4:6-7

When you try to have faith, a powerful challenge inevitably comes. That is why you want to give up everything and run away. Nevertheless, faith is not believing that feeling, but believing in the sovereignty of the Lord who still reigns.
Do not receive grace in vain. There is nothing more foolish than returning to how you were before receiving grace, after having received it.
The art of fighting. Fight with faith. You will win with truth.
What is the Gospel? The cross testifies to two things: that I am an extremely wicked sinner whom I cannot cleanse, and that if I cling to the cross of Jesus' shed blood, I will live.

A simple and clear reason why there is no revival: there are many who speak, but no one pays the price. Faith does not improve on its own. There must be evidence, and that evidence is given by martyrs. Expecting presence and revival without bloodshed? ... nonsense. Martyr comes from the Greek word 'Martus', meaning 'witness' or 'testifier'.
The secret to binding enemies. Proclaim and confess with faith. All negative and dark forces that are currently rampant will be bound. What is bound on earth is bound in heaven.
People do not change. Do not be discouraged by human hearts. Only the Lord works. Because the Lord is the master.
Please! Humble yourselves and beg, so that only the Lord may work. Cease human effort and let the Lord's zeal consume me.
Two clear facts: first, life is hard, and second, God is good.
Pray and obey. Pray earnestly and obey the word. Things beyond words will happen.

The death of righteous Abel. The Bible says that the reason righteous Abel died was, in a word, because he became a person who pleased God by offering a better sacrifice (Hebrews 11:4). If he had not pleased God, there would have been no reason for him to die. His name was Abel, which seemed to perish meaninglessly like 'vanity', but God did not let it be so, saying, "Even though he is dead, he still speaks through his faith" (Hebrews 11:4). Some people speak through their mere existence, while others convey a message through their absence rather than their presence. Even if given the choice again, they do not avoid their destiny and testify eternally through faith, saying, "I will only love and rejoice in God."
My only boast is the Lord's mercy. Because there is nothing good in me...
The work of the Lord. It is the Lord's work that turns me to seek Him and leads me to turn from sin and be restored to Him. That the Lord is my Lord is also grace.
Live my life. I am far more important than the world that hates me.
One happiness that overwhelms all misfortune. How can I not be joyful? Because I can look to the Lord...

Repeatedly falling and being discouraged. When you repeatedly fall, you become discouraged and it is difficult. There is a reason for repeated falls. It is because you do not confess everything to the Lord. Come into the light.
Love first, then the purpose becomes clear. God wants us to believe in His faithfulness and love now, rather than hastily judging His will. When you know love, the purpose becomes clear.

Do not fret. If you believe that the Lord will ultimately accomplish it, there is nothing to fret about or fall over. Fret arises because desires are not fulfilled. If it is not the Lord's will, I dislike it even if it is given for free, and if it is what the Lord desires, I am content even to be a doorkeeper.
When you have fallen greatly, it means to start with the Lord's mercy.

If you cannot let go, hold on. When you want to let go of something but cannot, the knowledge of Jesus becomes so precious that what was once precious and could not be let go becomes like refuse. Refuse is discarded even if you are told not to.

Looking at the situation makes you anxious. If you look at the situation, you become bound by it and anxious. This is because you do not know the truth. The truth is Jesus. If Jesus is important and everything else is ignored, you will have peace. Constantly looking at the cross is faith and devotion.

The reason faith is difficult is because we don't do it fully. It's half-hearted, which is why it fails to capture people. Half-hearted presence, half-hearted prayer, half-hearted ministry are difficult. When you truly meet the Lord, you change, and then the circumstances change.
A person who hopes only in God...

If you are anxious about a reality you cannot bear, you must believe not only that the Lord has sovereignty over the reality you cannot control and knows your entire future and entrusts it to Him, but also that He is faithfully holding onto you in this very moment.

Faith is a choice that goes against our nature, a process of discovering and obeying God's will. Sometimes that will goes against our nature. Even if obeying God's will seems disadvantageous and like death, behind obedience always comes God's righteousness and blessings that are beyond words. "For my thoughts are not your thoughts, neither are your ways my ways," declares the Lord. "As the heavens are higher than the earth, so are my ways higher than your ways and my thoughts than your thoughts." Isaiah 55:8-9

Choice speaks of faith. Looking at our final choices, we can know whether we truly desire glory or something perishable. Therefore, our initial thoughts, choices, actions, and how we use our time determine whether they are holy or corrupt, and also determine our future. "Honor the Lord with your wealth and with the firstfruits of all your harvest; then your barns will be filled with plenty, and your vats will overflow with new wine." Proverbs 3:9 The thoughts you have when you wake up in the morning are what you serve.
The reason suffering is not exempted is that suffering allows us to see ourselves and see ourselves at rock bottom. That is why we testify to change at the end of a term.
Healing Camp Young lions do not eat rotten meat. Faith is the perspective that stakes one's life even on a healing camp. I anticipate the amazing things the Lord will do.
Faith has no regrets because it was done while feeling the Lord's gaze.
The ability to start again is confirming God's love. And it is holding onto His promises.

The wicked perish in an instant. Hophni and Phinehas perished in one day because they were foolish and wicked. The reason they became that way is that they "did not know the Lord." Those who do not know God and do not seek to know Him are those who perish.

Faith and goodness are different. Thinking that believing in something good is faith is a delusion. Anything not based on an awareness of reality is fanaticism. Faith is not ignoring or disregarding reality, but transcending it. Above all, any focus removed from Jesus, no matter how much zeal and devotion it brings, is merely something perishable.
Have you loved the Lord? If you love the Lord, you will cease to do shameful things.

If you don't change, you won't change. Merely nodding in agreement without changing is not faith. The idea of receiving the Lord's guidance and grace while being captivated by the world, apart from kneeling, calling on the Lord's name, repenting, and receiving the fullness of the Spirit, is not just surprising but shocking.

It is not rejection but acceptance. After the incident of the forbidden fruit, God drove Adam and Eve out. Genesis 3:24 However, looking at verse 4, He "accepted" Abel's offering. In between is the offering of the lamb.
If you truly want to save lives, you must be filled with the Holy Spirit. Trying to save lives without being filled is not a desire to save lives, but merely a greed to have them saved if possible.
A serious symptom is not feeling severe thirst. The serious condition is being thirsty but not feeling thirst.
Joy over miracles Some people can lose their joy while trying to achieve miracles. Instead, seek joy. Miracles will follow those who rejoice and give thanks.
Evidence of grace is that the things you worried so much about become insignificant. When the destination changes, the luggage changes too.

The warmth of complete devotion Many people cannot give themselves completely to the Lord because they fear that doing so would send them to a mission field where Jesus would make them miserable. If a small bird were huddled in a half-frozen shed on this cold morning, that helpless little bird would need to come under my complete control to warm itself and eat. Would I then crush it in my hand? Or would I provide shelter, warmth, food, and protection?
The meaning of "Do not fear" God repeatedly saying "Do not fear" is not just a platitude of comfort. It is also to provide a solution. That solution is giving Himself.

What do you fear? The object of fear tells us what we boast in and rely on. Those who fear the Lord have nothing to fear. For the treasure and peace deeply buried in their hearts cannot be taken away.
Just as the body has no soul, if there is no grace in logic, believers become fighters. They are not smart, nor beautiful. They are just like zombies.

God's Solution God has never overwhelmed with large numbers. Instead, He chose one person and accomplished His will. The person God seeks is one who simply offers themselves for the Lord. People are the solution.

The next step after letting go Letting go and emptying oneself is not easy and requires paying a price, but it can be done joyfully when the purpose is clear. If you let go and hold onto the Lord, He will personally rule and take responsibility for the outcome.
The worst deed The worst deed in the world is for a believer not to receive grace.
Humility is boasting in the Eternal One. Therefore, we naturally become humble before Him.
Pride is boasting in the vain and perishable.

The Basics of Sovereignty Sovereignty is the authority to execute God's will and rule. Therefore, God's sovereignty means that we enter into His will and work by faith. When we respond with faith, God's sovereignty is manifested. When we seek the Lord's sovereignty, it is accompanied by surrender, but when sovereignty comes, we receive a better inheritance. Afterward, the word of the Lord came to Abram in a vision, saying, "Do not be afraid, Abram, I am your shield, your very great reward." Genesis 15:1
Grace bestowed upon an unworthy person This is why we cannot help but be thankful.

The reason God works only after we give up is that we must admit that it cannot be done by our own struggles. That is because it is the Lord's domain. Until we admit it and raise our hands, the Lord waits patiently. Therefore, the cross begins to work from the place where we have given up.
If the state is more important than the content, simple opinions can be perceived as attacks and rejections. Grace is more important than content.

If you are not afraid, you have already won. Everyone serves what they fear. You become a slave to whatever you obey. Therefore, if you are free from fear, you do not need to obey its object and do not become a slave to sin.
A deeply rooted tree does not shake. The rejection and indifference of the whole world cannot shake me. This is because the One most precious to me resides in the deepest part of my heart.
The only basis for me to gain life and salvation in distress is not my other conditions. The sole basis of my salvation is the body and blood of Jesus, who was given as the Passover lamb.
You were not called to do well. You were called to be faithful. If you try to do well, you will eventually run away, blame others, and collapse. If you obey, you will give glory to God.

It is not because you have many sins, nor because your faults are terribly great. It is not because you are unhappy, nor because even the normalcy that others enjoy is a luxury. It is because God loves you.
True faith is offering your heart and focus to the Lord even when it is incredibly difficult to look at God.
What is true faith? It is praying in front of hungry lions.
It's not that the burden is heavy, but that there is no hope. If dedication feels difficult and bothersome, it is not because the burden is heavy. It is because you have not seen God's glory.

Make faith your conclusion. A man like Israel's flea, like a dead dog, becomes an excellent king like no other. This is because he was anointed. The valleys before you will be filled, and the mountains will be lowered. Whom did Israel's king come out after, and whom does he pursue? He pursues a dead dog and a flea - 1 Samuel 24:14.

The Lord's grace is perfect for me. That is why, at the edge of the cliff, we seek grace rather than money or solutions. If you receive grace, you are already a victor. The Lord gives me sufficient and adequate grace.
To receive the Holy Spirit, one must be holy, but one also needs the grace of the Holy Spirit to be holy. Not by my strength, but by the Lord's power alone.

Change is glory. No matter how stubborn or chaotic things are, once they are changed, the game is over. Obstacles in the home, in relationships, and in ministry are all transformed when the Lord governs them. Believe, pray, and declare.

Life is interpretation. What you interpret your life through is faith. When things are difficult and the path is blocked, even the patriarchs of faith fall into doubt and act foolishly. You must discover God's intention in the grace He has bestowed. Faith is interpreting my life by knowing His intention that His thoughts toward me are peace, not disaster.
While warning against the wickedness of sin, please believe in the power of the gospel. If this is not achieved, you will despair while repenting. The cross is an eternal power for all.
Jesus' concern is, "Who do you say I am?" Therefore, you must clarify who your master is. You must see what you are looking at, who fills you, what brings you joy, and what wounds you.
To govern, one must be the owner. Combining the pieces of all good and bad events to form good is not so much difficult as it is impossible. It is only possible through the Lord's governance.
4 years ago - After, I ate wormwood and garlic and became human, and Yerim and Miseon received grace and became women.
The victory of faith is the victory of perspective. I hope you interpret this situation with the Lord's perspective. What a caterpillar calls death, God calls a butterfly.

The Bible says that you can know a person through love. This is because someone who cannot love is fake. Motives that do not come from the Lord are like counterfeit money, meaning counterfeit faith. "By this all people will know that you are my disciples, if you love one another." - John 13:35.
A minister is one who, knowing the truth more than anyone else, fears God doubly and fears himself.
Letting go - an appropriate analogy. If you let go, you win. Letting go is... well, it's like letting yourself go when the leader dances at Christmas.
If you only look at the results, you will judge. But if you look at the motives, you will forgive like the Lord.
It is to embrace the Father's expectations.
The reason a person of faith can be gentle is because they are a victor. If you cannot bow your head or extend your hand, it is because you are a loser.

A purpose-driven and persistent person like Paul is more inclined to criticize the system or incite dissatisfaction than to give thanks. The reason gratitude overflows in every line of all his letters is that he experienced the secret of gratitude and the God who is the object of that gratitude. Therefore, he becomes strategically, persistently, and terrifyingly (?) grateful.

The secret to gaining new strength from powerlessness is gratitude. Your soul will be renewed, and you will experience the peace of faith. You will find that the word "gratitude" appears far more often in the letters of the Apostle Paul than in our lives.

Though weak, we overcome. Humans, being sinners, are bound to fall. Humans may be defeated, but faith wins. For everyone born of God overcomes the world. This is the victory that has overcome the world, even our faith. - 1 John 5:4.
We become like what we look at. Worship is focusing and desiring. When you worship, you become like the object of your worship.
Do not fear, but quote the Word with confidence and pray with thanksgiving. No one can resist the Lord's governance.
Unity is not just a good method. In faith, becoming one in love is not an effective way to achieve a purpose, but victory and revival in itself.
Perfect love drives out fear. Being captured by fear is losing to the devil. Fear is an emotional denial of God's living presence. How can there be an answer if you deny God?

Peace and answers are synonyms. In the Bible, peace and answers are used synonymously. When an answer comes, peace arrives, and when there is peace, an answer comes. Hold onto the truth and be at peace.

The reason for not being discouraged. I do my best with all my might, but I am not discouraged. It is because I do not rely on my own effort but trust only in the Lord. Without grace, effort is in vain.

Not probability, but promise. Abraham goes forward believing the word, though he does not know where he is going. When you abandon calculable and predictable probabilities and move forward holding onto promises, you will see God's glory.
All in. When you strike, if you hit carelessly, it really hurts. If faith is not complete, everyone suffers. The most suffering person is oneself, who did not go all in. You must believe completely.
It is grace. Grace is precious because of "who gives it" and "with what heart it is given." The Almighty God gives it with the love of giving up His Son. Therefore, His grace will be responsible.
Snow White vs. Princess Fiona. True life is not about specs.

Why did Snow White's stepmother, the wicked queen, die so miserably? Because she was deceived by the mirror. Because she judged based on a teenage Snow White and herself. When looking at loved ones, we don't use a mirror; we see with our hearts. If you judge people by conditions, you cannot believe even if the Son of God incarnates and performs miracles before your eyes. (John 8:15) You judge by human standards; I judge no one.
Abandon and win. Only with great reverence for the Lord... Amen.
I want to live in a world without laws ^^ lol.
How to live with unwavering faith: Keep on burning. The power of the Lord's blood is eternal. It is enough to be my lifelong message.
My unchangeable conclusion: The cross.
Change is not luck. It is the price paid with tears and the Lord's complete grace.
Qualities of a leader. Even if tossed about like a small boat in storms and waves, a leader does not waver. Because there is faith.

When Potiphar's wife tempted him, Joseph threw her off, saying, "How can I do this great wickedness and sin against God?" In Joseph's eyes of faith, God was visible, but to that woman, He was not. If you cannot see, you live presumptuously. People live by what they look at.
Do not forget to rely on the precious blood.

May your life be one where, by 'discovering' the treasure, perishable glory becomes 'refuse,' you exert 'influence' like yeast, possess 'vitality' like a mustard seed, and by 'recognizing' the groom's value like the five wise virgins, you prepare oil and, like the faithful servant entrusted with talents, 'remember' your mission and the grace received.
The characteristics of the gospel are joy, testifying only of the cross of Jesus Christ, and fundamentally denying human merit, righteousness, and pride.
Let the gospel determine me.

Do not be ashamed, but rather be bold. The reason is Jesus, who paid the price of blood. "For this reason I also suffer these things, but I am not ashamed, for I know whom I have believed, and am persuaded that He is able to keep what I have committed to Him until that Day." (2 Timothy 1:12)

The Lord who called you will surely take responsibility. The Lord is not one who calls and then defaults. It is because faithfulness that cannot be measured by worldly credit ratings is His attribute.

My parents always wanted me to have an ordinary life, slightly superior to others, a predictable life that I could boast about. However, in Jesus, the Lord never lets us live ordinary lives. The Lord wants to be the basis of faith and trust in uncertainty.

My parents always tell me to eat well and not to talk too long because phone bills are expensive. Those bothersome words are understood as words of love and an invitation to visit when their faces show more wrinkles and their shoulders become stooped. When the Lord misses us greatly, the Holy Spirit comes and reminds us of Jesus. The Father, who spoke through the prophets, has in these last days spoken through His Son. Jesus is the ultimate expression of God's love. For God so loved the world...
Strong people are not very concerned with others' evaluations. It is because what I am is by the grace of God.

Do not be satisfied with the grace poured out; rather, desire the grace that springs forth from within you and overflows. Do not live solely on the grace received through others, but live with a heart that finds Jesus alone sufficient. See you at the Saturday meeting.
Because I am infinitely lacking, full of sin and flaws, I look to the Lord. It is not the righteous I came to call, but sinners.

If you have the knowledge of the resurrection but do not experience the resurrected Lord, you will not be transformed. When the Lord meets you, opens your heart, and pours out His word, and your heart becomes warm, a U-turn in life will occur. Transformation comes from faith. It is faith that sees a better value and makes a decision to choose.

To be angry at what deserves anger and to entrust what should be entrusted is gentleness. It is an attitude that only those who are convinced to their core that the Lord is alive, people of faith, can take.

Living by faith means maintaining the heart the Lord gives amidst busy, complicated, and anger-inducing matters. If it is living for the Lord, not for oneself as in Adam's nature, then you must see everything through the Lord's eyes.

A person on fire is bound to run. The problem is that from the devil's perspective, there is no sharp way to stop it. A turtle's only chance to win is if the rabbit sleeps. A rabbit that stays alert and sober will never be defeated. Just like in the classic story...

Unbelief is also a kind of faith. It is having excessive trust in things that are negative and not true. All thoughts that do not come from the Lord must be discarded. When the Spirit of truth comes, true freedom comes.

Unbelievers say this: The Bible is contradictory. Yes! That's right. Calculus is a contradiction to an elementary school student. Arbitrary interpretations and feelings of victimhood stem from immaturity.

Unbelievers have survival as their goal. They are people who would prolong their lives somewhat if they begged before a furnace. On the other hand, those whose goal is glory move forward with faith and the cross. They continue to be used even when they overcome the flames, the nation changes, and all the rulers are purged.

* The most pitiful people If we have no resurrection, if we have no cross, we would be the most wronged and pitiful people. God will repay. Therefore, we quietly look to Him and wait. Holding onto the cross of resurrection, shedding tears, nodding our heads, and enduring by saying, "I can hold on longer." The Lord is alive. If in Christ we have hope only in this life, we are of all people most to be pitied. - 1 Corinthians 15:19

* The weariness of all things If you see the world as a problem, it is full of landmines, and you cannot possibly navigate those misunderstandings and wounds with your own strength and ability. That is why we need the Lord's grace in this indescribable mess. If it could be done by my own strength, why would Jesus have carried the cross? Man cannot express in words the weariness of all things; the eye is not satisfied with seeing, nor the ear filled with hearing. - Ecclesiastes 1:8

* The word is not difficult God's will is not difficult. It is just that even though God's word has been heard in many ways, there is little willingness to break one's own will and obey. The command that I give you today is not difficult for you, nor is it far away. - Deuteronomy 30:11

* The majesty of a single verse Tim Tebow, the most influential figure in American sports history, presents only John 3:16. Many verses are not needed for obedience. One verse changes life beyond history.

* Faith is a choice. Choice changes destiny. Therefore, life can be called a collection of choices, a continuum. However, to make a choice, a comparison of values must occur, and to have the ability for such comparison, one must have discernment. Hebrews says that such value comparisons are made by faith. Choosing where to stand, what to bear, that is faith, and through it, destiny changes.
You must be uncomfortable. You must be extremely uncomfortable. There must be no peace. Until you seek it centered on Jesus.
Comparing yourself leads to unhappiness. Do not compare yourself to others; look and interpret through the Lord's eyes. That is reality and living by faith.

* Unbeatable Faith No matter how much the circumstances threaten you, believe that the Lord is working even at this very moment, and be thankful even if He does not, and do not worry about anything. Do not be anxious about anything, but in everything by prayer and supplication with thanksgiving let your requests be made known to God. And the peace of God, which surpasses all understanding, will guard your hearts and your minds in Christ Jesus. - Philippians 4:6-7
* Heaven is a delicious place.
There are followers who stand firm against the wind and rain. Those who look only to Jesus will gain people of Jesus.

* The power of the word is much stronger than our stubbornness. It is not man who interprets the word, but the word that interprets man. If you can hear the words to be heard and obey the words to be obeyed, you will not be ashamed. When I pay attention to all your commandments, I shall not be put to shame. - Psalm 119:6
* What is sadder? Do not be sad for not being loved; be sadder for not being able to love. It is sadder not to be able to obey the Lord's commandments, because His commandment is to love.
* Trust, not control Unbelief is the belief that one can control the situation. This is not by one's own ability but by the Lord's grace.

The principle of how an airplane flies is not by focusing on a balloon pulling it up or a force supporting it from the ground. It is by having 'thrust' despite resistance and challenges that the resistance, in turn, provides 'lift' and makes it fly. The thrust in life is the ability to hold onto the cross. Before the cross, everything becomes a negligible problem.

An airplane does not fly by believing in vague possibilities. It flies based on a kind of law, a promise. For an airplane to take off, it needs 300 km of thrust and must run about 1800m. It must sprint a certain distance at a certain speed or more. People decide their investments based on possibilities. However, people of faith hold onto promises and invest absolute time and concentration instead of inferiority and greed. Today is the day of the Saturday meeting. I intend to invest absolute time and concentration. The Lord will intervene.

If you serve without light or name, you become strong. Because you become free. Freedom is not being bound, but running while looking only at the One who called and holds you. John 8:31-32 KRV: So Jesus said to the Jews who had believed him, "If you abide in my word, you are truly my disciples, and you will know the truth, and the truth will set you free." Only by abiding in that word and obeying it, then, after that, you are set free.
* The height of foolishness Limiting something truly precious to something truly trivial.

Satan can never defeat us. Because we have *'that love'. No matter how strong the devil is, he cannot overcome our love. Because he can never *be patient for long. Spiritual warfare is won if you do not give up. Satan has attributes that he can never endure. *'Herein is love, not that we loved God, but that he loved us and sent his Son to be the propitiation for our sins.' - 1 John 4:10 Love is patient, love is kind. It bears all things, believes all things, hopes all things, endures all things. - 1 Corinthians 13:4,7

The Apostle Paul said he is not ashamed of the gospel. This is a confession that can only come when there is the certainty that Jesus' cross is enough. Because I have received Jesus of the cross, I have received all the joy that life can offer in Jesus. If, after having the so-called gospel, you still want many things in this world... what kind of gospel is that?
* True wisdom Rather than the wisdom of a failure who wisely gives up, I hope you will embrace the foolishness of a victor who stubbornly perseveres.

The Apostle Paul said he was not interested in being loved or treated well. He said he would not even dream of gaining attention or recognition. He only desired that Jesus be glorified in him. The subject 'I' disappears, and the master 'Lord' reigns. I hope you will fulfill the measure of love given to me. Regardless of the reaction and attitude, if you love to the end, you will become a 'true disciple' of the Lord. You are called not to 'evaluate' but to 'love'. "A new commandment I give to you, that you love one another: just as I have loved you, you also are to love one another. By this all people will know that you are my disciples, if you love one another." John 13:34-35

Do not be nihilistic based on who you are before people; instead, discover who you are before the Lord and become firm. For two consecutive Sundays, the worship service ended at 7:30. Consider it a gift for a ministry worker who is fully occupied, and have valuable and leisurely time. I must truly love them, it seems.

When you compare yourself to others, you become a pretty decent person. However, before God, no one is free from adultery and violence, greed and hatred, jealousy. Standing before Him is faith. That is why repentance erupts.

Just as people can sometimes be sick, the church can also be sick. When we were young, our parents, who always seemed like mountains, could also get sick. However, no one would criticize them for becoming weak and not being what they used to be. The church is like my mother.

* The reason for fear even when loving If you feel fear even though you love Jesus, it is because you still have much to lose. Only when you can lose everything except Jesus is it perfect love, and it casts out fear. There is no fear in love, but perfect love casts out fear, for fear has to do with punishment, and whoever fears has not been perfected in love. - 1 John 4:18
* If I protect myself, it becomes sin. Trying to protect myself is sin. Therefore, pride becomes sin. On the other hand, if God protects me, it becomes self-esteem.

People erase their past, pretend to be strong, and pretend to be something they are not. Ultimately, it's because they want to hear "You are a decent person I can't ignore." That's why they exaggerate and put on a show. You don't have to exaggerate or pretend to be something you're not. It's because you don't know yourselves well. Because you don't know God well, you don't know yourselves well. Stop exaggerating and pretending, and receive love. I will love you passionately too. Big Hug!! ^^ Happy Valentine's Day.

People think they will be unhappy because of what they haven't achieved. That's not true. Most people feel more unhappy because of what others have achieved. No matter how much you receive possessions, recognition, or evaluation, the feeling of unhappiness will not cease as long as greed remains. Greed compares. Comparison becomes hell. But faith is gratitude. Gratitude is heaven.

People feel frustrated because they don't talk about the essence. If the gospel of the cross disappears for believers, they will feel very frustrated. If there is anything that can make a church uniquely different from the world, it is the gospel of the blood of Jesus' cross. Let us repent.

People change even after experiencing fervent grace and shedding tears. This is called corruption. They become corrupted in a month, or in six months. Some people become corrupted in a few years. Everything in the world decays. But the Lord is eternal. Those who hold onto the Lord alone can never change.

People try to control situations because they are anxious. However, people of faith are called to exercise self-control and sobriety in their hearts and attitudes. Then you will see the glory of the Lord who governs and providentially guides all things.

* If you are envious, you are not defeated. If you are envious, you are not defeated. If you are afraid, you are defeated. Because you lose control. Boldness is not arbitrary belief, but believing in God's rule and sovereignty amidst circumstances.
People sin. They sin to be happy and joyful. But instead, deep regret and pain remain. Holiness and purity are power and happiness.
People look around and wander everywhere to be happy. However, true happiness can only be enjoyed when one is fixed on Jesus.

People were proud of recycling cow remains as cattle feed to increase efficiency, but mad cow disease arose from the worst investment in history. However, the Lord acknowledged Mary, who made a holy waste of the alabaster jar of perfume. Wasting on the Lord is the best investment in the world.

People imitate. This is because they want to gain even a little of the reputation that the original possesses. Marinated ribs seem more expensive than raw ribs, but they are cheaper. Even though more effort and marinade were involved, why are they cheaper? The reason is that they are not fresh. So, they supplement the taste with marinade. I hope your life will be one that doesn't need marinade. I hope you become a person of faith who restores the power of the essence.

People's possessions and things they boast about are all like straw, which will be burned and disappear. However, unseen faith, hope, and love are like jewels, which do not change and will shine even in heaven.
* Faith is needed in times of need. Faith is not when you say "Hallelujah~" when your condition is good, but when it is truly needed amidst trials.

People's loyalty and dedication are hinted at and decided only after they gauge my loyalty and dedication. They themselves exert only that much ownership. Only when I sacrifice for that vision do they feel it is worth sacrificing. People are very curious about whether I am a mercenary who tries to pay only a moderate price, or a soldier of the Lord who dedicates everything and pleases those who have been recruited. And over time, it will be clearly revealed for everyone to see.

No matter what people say, no matter what the world does, look only to the Lord. If you are hurt, it means you were not looking only to the Lord. It means you expected and hoped for something other than the Lord.

The reason people want to walk with the Lord but it doesn't go well is because they deny that they died with the holy Lord on the cross. Those who were crucified with Christ cannot live like that. Those who were crucified with Christ can only live like this.
* Identity Trials tell me who I am.

Do not seek recognition from people, but seek to see the glory of the Lord. A glorious life is one that runs towards the goal, pursuing the prize from above that the Lord has called. When the Lord's glory precedes all else, that person is a pioneer.

Everyone has a void in their soul. It is an abyss that cannot be filled by anyone's attention or love. Ultimately, unhappiness is not because one has less or is lacking, but because one has decided to be unhappy. I hope you live enjoying the joy of the blessing that makes you who you are. From now on, decide to be joyful, grateful, and happy. If your attitude changes, you can win even if you have nothing.

* Useless Professional A servant of God, in any situation, protects what the Lord has entrusted and quietly withdraws. Because they are professionals. It is only a useless servant who has done what they were supposed to do. Luke 17:10
Do not be so heartbroken by people; instead, contend with God.

People stay close to the most important things. They always keep things, people, and status close. It is a trivial life. When you get close to God, His fragrance emanates and His power appears. This is the 'power of proximity.' The essence of faith is that when you get close to Jesus, you are transformed into Jesus' person, and when you get close to believers, you are transformed into such a group. Mary's power was not a great deed, but standing close to Jesus, at His feet.
* When promises and circumstances differ, many people are disappointed. It is because there is no grace.
People can mature only through their weaknesses, not their strengths.

People feel secure through calculations. However, even if they seem to be succeeding through human calculations, they eventually collapse. No matter how much you calculate 2 fish and a few barley loaves, there is no answer. Let us give the Lord room to work beyond our human calculations.

People are fundamentally geniuses of rationalization due to their sinful nature. They shift responsibility and always find the cause in others. When you receive grace, it becomes your fault, and you change. From then on, miracles begin. Do not see what you want to see; see with the Lord's eyes.
* Faith is recognized in times of trial. When a storm comes, eagles soar higher on the wind, but chickens hide their heads under their wings and avoid it. Do not be a chicken; be an eagle.

People feel secure when they follow the majority. However, if there are 300 men who please the one who called them, they will defeat 135,000 enemy soldiers (Judges 7). What kind of path are you walking now? Is it a path you are taking because others are taking it? Or is it a path of calling?
People only look to the Lord's face after their hearts ache to the point of numbness. Does your heart ache? It is time to look to the Lord.

* We enter by grace alone. This is a truly grateful saying. We enter by grace alone. This is to prevent anyone from boasting. For by grace you have been saved through faith. And this is not from yourselves; it is the gift of God, not by works, so that no one may boast. - Ephesians 2:8-9

People have a fear of empty space. So they try to fill it unconditionally. That is why they try to manipulate people and solidify relationships through various attempts. Only the Lord can fill my hunger. You must see what you are craving. Jesus said, "I am the bread of life. Whoever comes to me will never go hungry, and whoever believes in me will never be thirsty." - John 6:35 If you are thirsty and hungry, it is time to stop wearing false masks and return to the Lord.

Humans are born to love, and to love is to give time. And that time is now. If the time spent with the Lord is rushed and filled with worldly things, it means you do not love the Lord. Love is not productive or efficient at all. It is a waste. A holy and happy waste.

Only when a person receives a death sentence and passes through death does he reveal the essence of the faith he serves. Will you please people? Or please God? If I seek the pleasure of men, I am not a servant of Christ. The process of becoming pure gold will not be easy, but it will be glorious.

The reason it is difficult is first because it means you are saved, second because you love your fellow workers, and third because you love souls. Without these, there is fundamentally nothing to worry about.

People do not commit new sins. They repeatedly commit the same sins they committed a year ago. When you see the same problem about 100 times, there should be times when you see it clearly, but it seems that is not the case. Faith is easy when it is full, but it is very difficult, even impossible, when it is precarious.
There is no scope of worry permitted to us. To worry is to expect something other than the Lord. If you look only to the Lord, you will not worry.

People cling to success, but God does not want human success. He seeks those who break their own will and obey His word. Obedience is better than sacrifice, and listening better than the fat of rams. For rebellion is as the sin of witchcraft, and stubbornness as iniquity and idolatry. 1 Samuel 15:22

People often cannot actively express their inner thoughts, and there are many misunderstandings due to various deficiencies and distortions in expression. More important than being misunderstood is not misunderstanding the other person.

Do not be anxious about anything, but in every situation, by prayer and petition, with thanksgiving, present your requests to God. And the peace of God, which transcends all understanding, will guard your hearts and your minds in Christ Jesus. Philippians 4:6-7
People are not beautiful because they are beautiful. They are beautiful because the Beautiful One made them. If you embrace a beautiful heart, you become a beautiful person.
Desires are fulfilled only by grace. Whether it is a miracle-like event or something very small and simple, it can only be received through God's sovereignty and grace.

People serve what they boast about. Whether sophisticated or ignorant, the moment they boast about it, they are dominated. A person who boasted about and served perishable things has their direction and essence changed through the cross. If you look only to the Lord, the world is dead to me. But far be it from me to boast except in the cross of our Lord Jesus Christ, by which the world has been crucified to me, and I to the world. Galatians 6:14

It is common for people to pursue themselves and live for their ego. This means they have no regrets about others. However, when the Holy Spirit comes and a mission arises, seeing stubbornness brings tears, and though there is no shared blood, one feels pity.

People think they will be happy if they get what they want. But that is absolutely impossible. In reality, what we mistakenly think we want is not what we truly want, but the standards the world imposes. It is a world where beauty seen on TV, academic credentials recognized by society, and economic power are attractive. Without the faithfulness, honesty, and intimacy with God that He desires, one can never be happy. God designed us that way from the beginning.

People sometimes mistake attachment for love. It is not about pursuing what I want, but about fulfilling what the other person needs. If you like a flower, you will pick it, but if you love it, you will place it in the sun and water it.

People try to gather many things to be happy, and to do so, they want to win, step on, and climb over others. They live boasting about what they have gained, but they can never be happy. When I break bread with the people I love, share the Lord's grace, and worship, I experience a happiness that makes me envy no one in the world. Thank you so much, Lord. For giving me such precious people of God...

People long to be happy. But the more they long, the more thirsty they become. Please change the content of your longing. This is my desire, to know as I am known To see as I am seen, to love as I am love.

Distinguishing between people is a great evil. This is because one always places oneself on the side of good, creates one's own faction, and tries to compensate for damages. They avoid confrontation and only evade. The most commonly used phrase is, 'That person is just like that.' It is difficult to acknowledge the transformation of the soul. This is because I must always be good and others must always be evil. Do not you, by showing favoritism, become judges with evil thoughts? James 2:4

What is more important than the situation is focusing on the Lord. If you are overwhelmed by the situation, you cannot see the Lord. If you focus on the Lord, the situation will not worry you. Lift up the eyes of faith and look to the Lord. He will give you rest when you are in distress.
Distinguishing between people is an act of evil. People are objects of love.
You who seek the Lord's pleasure rather than pleasing people, you are a champion.

The beginning is never half the battle. If the work that has begun is a good work, that is, a work that saves lives and builds up souls, be at peace. It is the Lord's work, and the Lord will accomplish it. What I need is faith. For we are confident that he who began a good work in you will carry it on to completion until the day of Christ Jesus. Philippians 1:6
Looking at people is looking away. Then you will waver and be tempted. Looking at the bronze serpent saves you. Looking at people leads to death.
Do not deal with people, but control the power of the spirit through prayer. God, who leads history through providence, will make it beautiful.
The reason weakness becomes strength is that I, standing before the problem, am incapable and helpless. Therefore, grace must be poured out. Become someone weak who needs the Lord's help.

When introducing people, we mention their alma mater, profession, even their annual salary, and inevitably their appearance. This is because these are the interests that worldly people are sensitive to. However, Jesus is introduced by His mission and relationship. "Behold, the Lamb of God, who takes away the sin of the world!" - John 1:29 (Mission) And a voice came from heaven, "You are my beloved Son; with you I am well pleased." - Mark 1:11 (Relationship with God). Do not boast about or be sensitive to perishable things, but run towards eternal belonging and praise.
The most distressing thing is wanting to take responsibility but being unable to. It is wanting to take all the blame and withdraw, but not being allowed to do so. That is why there is repentance.

Pray to walk only in the Lord's way, not in the voice of people, human expectations, or vain, perishable standards. Faith is a choice, and the continuation of that choice must be blessed for the Lord's guidance to come.
If we become engrossed in human approval and popularity, we can surprisingly become indifferent to God's approval.

Faith is a clash of desires. Faith is when the desire for Jesus overwhelms the desires of the world. "If the opponent wins, it's because their persistence was strong, and if I win, it's because my persistence was strong." - Tsubasa Tenku, 2011.

Do not be puffed up by human approval, nor be discouraged by human criticism. We must become people sensitive to God's evaluation. Brothers, I do not consider myself yet to have taken hold of it. But one thing I do: Forgetting what is behind and straining toward what is ahead, I press on toward the goal to win the prize for which God has called me heavenward in Christ Jesus. Philippians 3:13-14.
Woe to those who expect human approval. Blessed are those who expect the Lord.

What should we look at? Do not doubt grace through circumstances, but interpret circumstances through the lens of grace. Faith is interpretation and choice. Interpretation and choice determine destiny.

A person's core, their being, is not understanding. Understanding will fade, and the flesh will perish, but affection will remain. With that affection, we go to the eternal place. The affection with which I feel pain and happiness tells me who 'I' am. Spiritual growth means my affections are changing. If Jesus is the pinnacle of my life, I am a truly mature and happy person.

Humanity's greatest concern is "How long?" (Psalm 13:1). But the Lord's timing is not within my domain and has never been granted to humans. Therefore, He simply tells us to be full. That is the option granted to me. Psalm 13:5 "But I have trusted in your steadfast love; my heart shall rejoice in your salvation."
If human actions are transformed to please the Lord, things that were difficult to bear will be resolved. It will be a miracle.

A gamble without regret. Whether we live or die, it is for the Lord. Whether we succeed or fail, it is for the Lord. Therefore, there is no regret. In the end, life is a true contest. So whether we live or die, we are the Lord's - Romans 14:8.

We cannot know a person's illness by their outward appearance alone. Everyone has a fatal illness. It cannot be diagnosed even in other hospitals. A life separated from God is covered by unspeakable anguish. It cannot be covered by money or fame.

When people suffer pain and are wounded, they become selfish. Their emotions dry up, and they react harshly and immediately to minor disputes. This is because they have no room to spare. Even in the agony of death on the cross, Jesus thought of us and obeyed until death. He touches us with those wounded hands.

If a person's actions please God, He will reconcile even their enemies. Proverbs 16:7, as this says, God is the sovereign of relationships. Self-serving calculations for relationship improvement only worsen the situation. If you restore your relationship with God, the rest will resolve itself. Do not rush to harvest; focus on the roots. You will reap the fruit.

When a thorn is stuck. When I was five years old, I got a cactus thorn deeply stuck in me while playing. Even now, 38 years later, the bone-grinding pain is vivid. My aunts encouraged me, saying I was brave, and my mother felt my pain with me. However, my father sternly pulled out the thorn. It hurt so much I thought I would die. Encouragement and empathy are helpful, but if they stop there, the hand can rot and may need to be amputated. Swallow the pain, calmly remove the thorn, and then it's not too late to cry while bandaging it. Love is not all the same.

The reason people fundamentally become greedy, sin, and rush towards death is not because temptation is strong. Honestly, it's because they hate God. The fear of the Lord is a fountain of life, that one may turn away from the snares of death. Proverbs 14:27 Fear God.

When people encounter extremely difficult and blocked situations, there are times when all they can do is laugh. However, Christians rely on the Lord in those moments and possess heavenly composure. This is because they know that only the Lord can resolve it. "Don't worry!!"

"Let a man regard us in this way, as servants of Christ and stewards of the mysteries of God." "Moreover, it is required of stewards that they be found faithful." 1 Corinthians 4:1-2 The most important virtue of a leader is 'faithfulness.' David, Moses, and Jesus were like that. However, what must precede this is knowing the 'mysteries of God.' Faithfulness without knowing these mysteries can cause many to fall. May you be those who know the mysteries.
What is man that you are mindful of him, and the son of man that you care for him?

Why I don't perish when it seems like I will, but live and proclaim the works of the Lord (Psalm 118:17). It is the living word of God. This word is my comfort in my affliction, for your word revived me - Psalm 119:50. If your law had not been my delight, I would have perished in my affliction - Psalm 119:92.
The reason people do not change but degenerate is that they do not long for it. If one is not poor in spirit, they degenerate.

Is it truly impossible for people not to hate others? Can they smile to their faces while hiding their hearts and continuously hating? I don't think so. You just need to receive the heart of the Lord, who extended His hand though He was nailed. That was His prayer the night before He bore the cross. "I am no longer in the world, but they are in the world, and I am coming to you. Holy Father, keep them in your name, which you have given me, that they may be one, even as we are one." John 17:11.
Responding to God, not to people, is faithfulness. He watches to see if we are faithful in small things, in possessions, and in what belongs to others.

Grasping at straws and losing the big picture. It is foolish to lose something great by coveting something small. For us, the great things are His Kingdom and His Righteousness, and the small things are Myself and My Pride. When you have the important things, the rest will be added.

There are various reasons why people do not move, but using the church as an example: 1. Because change does not occur. 2. Change occurs in two main fields: the general congregation and existing believers. 3. The change of the masses and congregation stems from 'communication,' and the change of existing believers requires a 'field.' 4. Communication for the general public must secure understanding (intellect), empathy (emotion), and decision (will) in a holistic manner. When there is spiritual empathy, life change (motivation) comes. 5. The field (Acts) for believers must have examples and models. If leaders do not move, followers will not move through lectures (words alone) and exhortations. There must be something to see and hear (experience). 6. Communication that changes the general public must occur within a single opportunity, the worship service. To win Gentiles, we must approach them in their language. The masses allow only two hours a week (Sunday worship). 7. Believers must be given ministry to share. The best model is to become a martyr (sacrifice). When the situation is extremely difficult and you want to give up... 1 Kings 17:12 She said, "As the Lord your God lives, I have no bread, only a handful of flour in a jar and a little oil in a jug. If you have too many thoughts, you cannot pray properly. This is because there are too many things to worry about and too many things to enjoy. The Apostle Paul said he knew nothing except Christ and Him crucified. The devil tells us to take it easy, but we give our all wholeheartedly.

There is only one life. This means you cannot be reincarnated if you ruin it. However, through the power of His precious blood, which purifies my soul and gives me a new day, I can live a new life every day. How amazing is this! Hallelujah!

Victory lies in having thoughts and intentions that oppose Satan, who hates gaining life more than death. In other words, when you let go of the desire to hoard your possessions and the grace given to you, and actively share, you can enjoy and experience God more abundantly.
If you want life, you must die. When I die, the life of Jesus is manifested. The moment I die, hatred, resentment, injustice, and the feeling of being tormented to death all disappear in an instant.

If you are not satisfied with the Lord who is the living water, humans are bound to seek dirty, stagnant water. If you find your life in a pigsty, it is the result of leaving the Lord, not the cause. The cause begins with not looking to the Lord. "My people have committed two sins: They have forsaken me, the spring of living water, and have dug their own cisterns, broken cisterns that cannot hold water." - Jeremiah 2:13. "Furthermore, just as they did not think it worthwhile to retain the knowledge of God, he gave them over to a depraved mind, to do things that are improper." - Romans 1:28. You must decide whether you want to fear God or not. This is an era where many desire God's gifts but reject God.

* Sufficient Grace Satisfaction in the world means acquiring and monopolizing everything. That is why people compete and fight. However, God wants to give us grace. That grace is boundless, abundant, full, and sufficient grace. This is because He wants to give us Himself.

* Daily Grace You must ask for the grace prepared for you today. That grace enables me to live by faith as a believer. If you do not receive that grace, you will misunderstand according to your own will, be hurt by your emotions, and your life will be ruined. That grace will hold me forever.

* The Only Thing to Confirm Just confirm that your heart and passion for the beautiful Lord cannot be stopped, and ignore everything else. If you have nothing to lose, you have nothing to fear. The Lord alone is enough.

* Servant, what do you truly desire? To love the Lord more. To see the glory of the Lord. To see revival in this land. Beyond that, to taste and know the goodness of the Lord, which is worth losing everything else for. Then, even if you lose everything, it will be enough. When your desires change, faith becomes easy.
* The Reason Not to Fear Anymore If you pray for the Lord's will to be done and believe it, what else is there to fear?

* Virtue Will Have Neighbors - A virtuous person will not be lonely. To pursue excessively and exclusively beyond the scope and purpose given by God is the greed of monopoly. Because they misuse what God has temporarily given for a specific purpose, those who try to monopolize power, wealth, relationships, and attention ironically feel lonely in the crowd and live splendid, yet miserable lives. Of course, societies and their members that allow such monopolies also suffer from dead-weight loss, excess burden, and allocative inefficiency. If you know Him and the truth, you will be free from monopoly and attachment, and through a life of carrying the cross, you will give life abundantly not only to yourself but to all. "We who are strong ought to bear with the failings of the weak and not to please ourselves. Each of us should please our neighbor for their good, to build them up. For even Christ did not please himself but, as it is written: 'The insults of those who insult you fell on me.'" - Romans 15:1,2

* The Reason for Despair and Pride (Freedom from Mood Swings) I do not despair when things are difficult, nor do I become arrogant when things become slightly favorable. The reason I consistently adhere to the path given to me is not because I trust myself, but because I trust in the Almighty God and the perfection of God's grace.

* Intellect Alone Yields No Answers. When you truly go to the end, there are times when no answer comes, no matter how much you use your head. We see cases where things are absolutely not going to work out based on the circumstances, yet they are poured out forcefully. My salvation and blessings are grace that is utterly incomprehensible. That is why we live by grace.

* The Ability to Rejoice God wants us to live lives of joy. However, to rejoice, you need ability. One is 'tolerance,' and the other is 'prayer of thanksgiving.' If your relationships with people and with God are broken, you can never rejoice. "Rejoice in the Lord always; again I will say, Rejoice. Let your reasonableness be known to everyone. The Lord is at hand; do not be anxious about anything, but in everything by prayer and supplication with thanksgiving let your requests be made known to God." - Philippians 4:5,6

* The Reason for Anger We get angry when things don't go our way. The problem is that such a mindset is self-centered. Therefore, a self-centered person cannot gain wisdom and discernment due to anger. Be angry when God's will is not done. It is called righteous indignation.

* Do Not Be Disappointed. Everything has its time and season, its years and purpose. Of course, so do I. Do not be disappointed because you are not standing in the spotlight you desire, receiving welcome. You are the hand of God extending the water of life to someone thirsty whom God has sent.

* Discernment Comes When You Are Empty. When playing chess or Go, you can see more clearly when giving advice than when playing yourself. True discernment is given when you let go and have no need to cling. Therefore, those whose purpose is the Lord have nothing to lose, so they discern everything but are judged by no one. "Is there not a time for every purpose under heaven?" - Ecclesiastes 3:1. "The spiritual person judges all things, but is himself to be judged by no one." - 1 Corinthians 2:15
Washing each other's feet is the Lord's will. Blessed are those who know this and act accordingly.

Whether it's Seoul, London, or a poor remote area, life is much the same everywhere. My happiness comes from standing where God has called me. The Lord's guidance must be experienced through waiting. It is impossible to explain something without having tasted it.
* A Spiritual Servant Does Not Offer Platitudes. The good words people speak become platitudes, but when a person of God speaks, they become prophecies.
If you think you are standing firm, you have already fallen. Look at the heart before the results. Are you Jesus to the core, or just froth? Faith is not spoken.

* His Love Embraces Even Thorns. There is no need to fret about eliminating your flaws or trying to be someone else. If you cannot be loved as you are, then those feelings are meaningless to me. God loves me as I am, yesterday, today, and forever. "But God demonstrates his own love for us in this: While we were still sinners, Christ died for us." - Romans 5:8

* The Condition for Happiness To be happy, you must have peace. To have peace, you must have gratitude. To have gratitude, faith must be presupposed. Faith is a gift, and gifts are given by grace, not by price. Therefore, grace is given by God first when we were sinners.

* Beware of New Ransomware. Never click on suspicious email attachments. Nowadays, there are viruses coming through email attachments named Fedex, DHL, or Outstanding Invoice. Regular viruses can be dealt with, as they might only affect data, but a creature called Crytolocker encrypts files even after the virus is removed, ultimately wiping out all your PC's photos and documents. If you click on it, switch off immediately and seek a professional. Encrypted files cannot be restored with current technology. Especially for friends writing essays, back up your work on public clouds like Google Drive while you work. * Refer to FBI link - Under investigation http://www.fbi.gov/washingtondc/news-and-outreach/stories/cryptolocker-ransomware-encrypts-users-files

* Beware of New Ransomware. Never click on suspicious attachments. Nowadays, there are viruses coming through email attachments named Fedex, DHL, or Outstanding Invoice. Regular viruses can be dealt with, as they might only affect data, but a creature called Crytolocker encrypts files even after the virus is removed, ultimately wiping out all your PC's photos and documents. If you click on it, switch off immediately and seek a professional.
* Worship is knowing God's Worth, looking at Him and imitating Him, laying everything down before Him, and following Him as your Shepherd. - Revelation 4, 5, 6, 7

If you pray to love, you will be loved. If you pray to be loved, you will still feel anxious even while earnestly seeking, but if you pray to love, you will become stronger in peace within grace, even with many challenges. I have prayed for you that your faith may not fail... -Luke 22:32 If we love one another, God abides in us, and his love is perfected in us. -1 John 4:12

Believe in the Lord's joy, not your own. To please someone, you must know them. What they dislike and what they like. Pleasing God does not mean conforming to your own joy, but seeking joy within God's will. Sometimes He may ask for the opposite of your joy, and though this is painful, He allows it because it is ultimately beneficial to you. God will never fail you!
Let's try this week's Saturday menu: Sundae-guk!

Fear what comes easily. When you reach a certain level, things will run on inertia without paying a price. That is not a blessing, but a disaster. Because the bubble of pretense and compromise will eventually burst, and you will fall because you have never strived with the wings of skill. The more you succeed, the more you should humble yourself and fear.

The reason why trials are not feared. Stephen looked up to heaven with a face shining like an angel in the face of death. The trials did not become trials because he looked only to the Lord. Paul, too, with the boundless grace of the Lord who offered His Son on the cross in his heart, could run for the Lord without regret until his last breath. Behold, the heavens were opened, and he saw the Son of Man standing at the right hand of God. -Acts 7:56

Victory that overcomes trials. To love is to remain steadfast over time. Rather, you become stronger to protect them. Therefore, we do not lose heart. Though our outer self is wasting away, our inner self is being renewed day by day. -2 Corinthians 4:16

The beginning is not half, but everything. God begins a good work in me and will not abandon it, but will bring it to completion and perfection. This is not because I am good, but because the one who works is good. Therefore, regardless of circumstances or feelings, we must trust the Word and not give up on souls. God's grace is boundless. We are confident that he who began a good work in you will carry it on to completion until the day of Christ Jesus. -Philippians 1:6

Spiritual warfare. The prayer of a righteous person is powerful. That is why repentance must thoroughly accompany prayer. If you obey the Lord, you will overcome the enemy. Submit yourselves, then, to God. Resist the devil, and he will flee from you. -James 4:7
Beloved, I pray that in every way you may prosper and be in good health, just as your soul prospers.

Knowing the truth makes it so easy... Even without knowing that 'all things work together for good,' problems are solved through prayer.
