The cross is not a game. The cross is not a hobby. The cross is the best conclusion God can give and an eternal solution. If you hold onto the cross, you can tolerate everyone, and with the power of the cross, you can love everyone. There is no problem that cannot be overcome before the cross. If there were a problem that the cross could not solve, the Lord would not have borne the cross from the beginning. The spirit of the cross is, 'I cannot bear to see you die; I will save you even if I give up everything.' How can a person who looks at the cross wander, or put emotions before their mission? The cross is not a pastime. It is the truth that precedes all decisions and all reactions. With the Lord's level of solution, there is nothing that cannot be done before the cross, and nothing to fear. There is nothing to boast about outside the cross. Therefore, I will love everything given to me until the end. Also, I will not lose a single person.

The ability to ignore is based on faith. That is faith, and faith can do all things, and it means focusing my attention only on the Almighty Lord. If sickness is healed through miraculous healing, it is one person at a time, but if you pray for sickness with faith, it works on people in a stadium. I recommend the ability to flip a frying pan all at once, the ability to ignore. Charge forward without stopping...
* Victory of Faith Do not become weak, but use your faith. Continue to look forward with faith until the end.
Do not cling to what is perishable, but bind your hearts to the eternal love of the Lord, which is unseen. The Lord will dwell within you.
Only You, the One who touches hearts, are God. That fact is a great comfort and peace to me. O Lord, there is none like you. You are great, and your name is great in your power. - Jeremiah 10:6

Oh, by God's grace, this unworthy one, why I am redeemed, I cannot understand. What I believe and trust in is the Lord who knows my every circumstance. I am sure He will protect me. - Hymn 310 I truly don't understand the Lord's grace.

A baby is peaceful and safe because it depends entirely on its mother. The part I must always check is whether I am remaining in the Lord. Then I will bear fruit, and in the One who gives strength, nothing will be impossible.

I have no regrets because I have nothing to spare. Holy consumption occurs because He called sinners and sent them out. I praise the Lord with my last breath because I, the chief of sinners, have received great grace.
Son, what is your wish? Lord, my wish is to love you more. ㅠㅠ

* A truly important question. People know whether you truly love them or are just going through the motions. True love shows where I came from and where I am going. That is why the Lord asked Peter, among many questions, "Do you love me?" Because that is truly important. We know that we have passed from death to life because we love brothers. But anyone who does not love remains in death. - 1 John 3:14
Beautiful places become more beautiful because of beautiful people. Even someone with a poor memory wants to keep this moment forever.

* How not to worry. To not worry, you must believe in an omniscient and omnipotent God. But the problem is whether that omniscient and omnipotent God is interested in my life and problems. That is why He also tells us to believe in Jesus. That almighty God is not a stern judge but is with us as Immanuel in human form. Do not let your hearts be troubled. Believe in God; believe also in me. - John 14:1

As Amos 3:3 says, "Can two walk together, unless they are agreed?" (Good News Bible), the secret to Enoch walking with God was that God and Enoch's hearts became one. When God looks at all the people of the world, they all sin and give off a foul odor, causing Him distress. But when He looks at Enoch, who obeyed God's word and was not contaminated by the sinful world, He rejoices. At the age of 365, He took him alive to the kingdom of God without letting him die. (Genesis 5:24, Hebrews 11:5-6)
Do not worry about anything. I will prepare and guide you.
Even if you have nothing and are powerless, there are things you can do. That is to forgive. To be thankful. To bless. That is what you do best.

* Wilderness Temptation 2 - A Subtle Challenge, but a Perfect Response. 1. The content of the devil's persistent temptation to Jesus was to "prove yourself." (If you are the Son of God...) 2. It is to confirm that I am loved through an anxious satisfaction (bread) that cannot be filled and through the reactions of people (recognition). The life I need to confirm is unstable, so eventually, I become disappointed, angry, and give up. That is why a tempted life makes you want to give up and run away. 3. Jesus did not come to prove himself or to be recognized, but to love and lay down His life on the cross. Therefore, He did not respond with His feelings but answered with truth: "It is written..." May you see clearly with truth and overcome. The gospel has never lost. If you are the Son of God... - Matthew 4:3, 6 Jesus said, "It is written..." - Matthew 4:4, 7 Take heart; I have overcome the world. - John 16:32

Believe that no one can harm you. You just need to not harm yourself. You just need to not be deceived by Satan, who instills fear. Believe that truth clearly and certainly. If you diligently do good, who can harm you? - 1 Peter 3:13

No matter how rough or difficult the work, if you endure it with love, there will be no wounds. All achievements and powers will eventually pass and disappear, but love is eternal. It is foolish to stake your life on the means. Stake everything on the purpose. Love is the unfading purpose, the meaning that the Lord acknowledges.
To those who are frustrated by a bleak reality that cannot be solved no matter how hard they try, I want to say this: Jesus came because of that.

* True Faith. Believe that what you have asked for has been received. Do not doubt; believe that it will be accomplished. Especially, believe that the Lord is controlling this complex situation with His power and authority. Therefore, I tell you, whatever you ask for in prayer, believe that you have received it, and it will be yours. - Mark 21:24

No matter how beautiful a being is, if it does not maintain its place, it will soon decay, rot, and give off a foul odor. However, if it takes its rightful place and adopts the proper attitude, it becomes a truly beautiful life.
* We will overcome with truth. Reveal your identity with the sword of the Spirit, with truth. Then they will flee without you having to chase them.
No matter how good the food, you can't eat it when you're full. So you shouldn't be full. The poor always long for something. Blessed are those who are like that.
No matter how excellent a human being is, there is absolutely no possibility. The only alternative is Jesus Christ. Prosperity without Jesus is a prelude to ruin. Romans 3:21

No matter how difficult things come, do not be discouraged. God does not give up, nor does He make mistakes. This trial you are experiencing is one for which He will give you the strength and wisdom to bear, and He will also provide a way of escape. If you set your attitude right before the Lord, all things will work together for good. Faith conquers all.
No matter how difficult, hard, or even impossible it may seem, believe that God is working with His faithfulness. The Lord never gives up, nor does He make mistakes.

You can be hurt by words spoken carelessly without thinking. Therefore, the important thing is not to be hurt by such words. And more importantly, it is to give encouragement that can help you stand in situations where you might fall in difficult moments.
Happy birthday, Father~ I sincerely love you and am always thankful ♥
Rejoicing in what Father desires and weeping over what Father grieves over, that is the greatest happiness. What Father does not give must be refused, no matter how good and attractive it may seem.

* The reason it's difficult is that you are trying to be loved. The calling in the Bible is to love. As I have loved you, so you must love one another. If you love, it becomes heaven, but the moment you try to be loved, it turns into hell.
Father loves a flawed son more than a perfect servant. I hope you have the authority to be a flawed child, not a perfect servant.

If you glorify the Father, the Father will glorify the Son. The glory the Son bestows is death on the cross and self-emptying, and the glory the Father gives is resurrection. We can give glory when we bear the cross, deny ourselves, and love, and God glorifies us by giving us new life in resurrection when we were dead in sin. When Jesus had said these things, he looked up into heaven and said, "Father, the hour has come; glorify your Son that the Son may glorify you." - John 17:1

For the foolish child who lacks the wisdom to realize the Father's love, a miserable pigsty awaits, where not even carob pods are given. There, at last, the value of the Father is realized, repentance occurs, and restoration follows. When God releases you, you should feel a little "chilly." You will deeply feel the benefit of hardship.

Was Abel righteous and Cain wicked? No. Both were sinners born from Adam, a sinner. Abel offered a better sacrifice because he realized that he, as a sinner, had to ascend to the altar in death and came to the Lord relying on mercy. When we stand before the Lord, we know who we are.

I know who I serve as the object of my joy. As you live today, what has brought you so much joy, and what has caused you concern? Even if the 7 billion people surrounding me hate me, if the worship I offered today was accepted by the Lord, that is happiness. It is God who holds me.

Abel, though dead, spoke by faith. Faith is something that even death cannot limit. Faith is something that pain, emotions, and resentment can never limit. Before Jesus Christ, all values and priorities are reset. Even if you lose everything, rise up with a burning heart and run.
Abraham is led by faith. Through faith, he establishes intimacy and friendship with God. Faith leads to better choices.

When Abraham believed the promise, it was counted to him as 'righteousness.' The person who believes the promise is the most righteous person. What is God's promise to me? When you believe in Jesus, who is the eternal promise, it is the highest 'righteousness' bestowed, not made by humans. With 'righteousness,' we approach God boldly.
Abraham offering Isaac is a wonderful blessing of offering his own heart. Yet, for some, all of God's word is merely a burden.

In the moment of testing and crisis when Abraham offered Isaac, there was something he believed and confessed. It was that the God who is Almighty and faithful would surely establish the child of promise as his heir. However, he did not know the specific method. (It seems he believed that God could raise Isaac even if he died - Hebrews) The Lord will glorify me and make me smile. But He will not do it in my way. Do not imagine the method; simply trust.
The work of the Lord is not to worry but to cry out. Believe that what you ask for, you have received. If you do not doubt within the Lord's will, it will surely be accomplished.

When electricity first came to Ireland, the Irish people were amazed and grateful. It was so convenient to turn on electric lights and light candles in the darkness. A life that only moves when cornered is foolish. Use your faith.

Using shortcuts leads back to the same place. If you can't wait for the bus you're supposed to take just because someone else got on it, and you get on their bus, it means you have to come back as far as you went, not just get on casually. That's why repentance is better sooner rather than later. Stubbornness only leads to your own loss.
If you are still breathing, know that the Lord has given you a mission and strength, and let us run to Him. Those who have not fulfilled their mission do not die.

The basis for our boldness is not mind control, but because the Lord has overcome the world, its desires, its temptations, and its standards. I have told you these things, so that in me you may have peace. In the world you will have trouble. But take heart; I have overcome the world. - John 16:33
As I was praying this morning, a text message arrived! "Oppa~ Let's eat ice cream ^___^^ Thank you, God, today too. Love love <3"

Some people leave their phone battery at 5% without charging it in the morning, unable to even send KakaoTalk messages, struggling frantically. Others keep it fully charged, charging it frequently, even wirelessly. Be filled.

My heart, overcome! The gospel has never lost. Therefore, the heart that believes the gospel will surely win. Let your heart win. For I am not ashamed of the gospel, for it is the power of God for salvation to everyone who believes - Romans 1:16

Reading Ephesians this morning, I notice the phrase 'in Christ' appears very frequently. The two problems of the Ephesian church were 1. Gentiles and Jews with different backgrounds not becoming one, and 2. Moral issues. All of God's salvation and every good thing are possible only 'in Christ.' And these powers are realized when we think, act, and pray 'in Christ.' What a wonderful phrase! 'In Christ...' For reference, chapter 1, verse 10 can be considered the theme. The cause and solution are also only 'in Christ...' If you cannot forgive, return to 'in Christ.'
This morning, I'm coming from special prayer meetings, hitting Waterloo, Vauxhall, and Putney.

When you are sick and suffering, you should pray to be humbled further. This is because hidden darkness within you, which you lived unknowingly, will be revealed, and light will penetrate. This was to humble you and test you, to do you good in the end. (Deuteronomy 8:16)

If you show a top-of-the-line Mercedes-Benz to an African native, they will be amazed. No matter how scorching the heat outside exceeds 50 degrees Celsius, it maintains 22 degrees Celsius when set. You can also operate the navigation on the screen and watch videos when bored. Therefore, that car is parked in front of the chief's house, and people walk a long way to come in and rest whenever they are hot. This is the tragedy of a believer who doesn't fully understand grace. Grace is not just comfort for the heart; it is God's actual power that powerfully works in reality.
The more you hurt, the more you can love, and the more you love, the more you can hurt. Therefore, not just anyone is allowed to hurt without permission, and not just anyone can be served.

For those who are sick, pray for healing. Especially, you must hold onto God's promised word and pray. After thorough repentance, ask a person of faith to pray for you. Therefore, confess your sins to each other and pray for each other, so that you may be healed. The prayer of a righteous person is powerful and effective. - James 5:16
If you don't feel pain, you don't love. Without love, you live in disregard.

I hope you don't cause pain. The more you love... to do that, you must be truthful and sufficiently specific. We can love God only as much as we know Him, and God is the one who reveals. The greatest tragedy in human history begins with imagination.

The devil tests Jesus in the wilderness in three ways. He tempts with priorities, worldly glory, and self-satisfaction, which are the lust of the flesh, the pride of life, and the desires of the eyes. However, from Jesus' perspective, it can be summarized as one thing: What do you truly desire? Therefore, the answer is also one: the cross.

Do not repay evil with evil or insult with insult, but with a blessing, because to this you were called so that you may inherit a blessing. - 1 Peter 4:9 This is the truth that Peter, who drew his sword before the Lord, proclaimed in his later years. If you know who you are, you will also know how to live.
You must overcome evil. You must overcome it with good. It is the goodness given by the indwelling Holy Spirit.
Do not be envious of the prosperity of the wicked. God judges not by outward appearance but by the love in the heart.

The reason to be filled with the Holy Spirit is not to succeed. Success is not eternal. It is not to avoid failure. Failure is not fatal. The reason to be filled with the Holy Spirit is for a person separated by sin to be reunited with God.
Do not be discouraged by looking only at the doors that are closed; work diligently in the doors that are open. No matter how harsh it may be, there is always a place that loves you. It is the Lord.

The reason for boldness is that by confessing and loving, we gain boldness. Since God is the one who loves us, who can condemn us? Who is it that condemns? Christ Jesus, who died, and more than that, was raised to life, who is at the right hand of God, who indeed is interceding for us. - Romans 8:35 Who shall separate us from the love of Christ? Will tribulation, or distress, or persecution, or famine, or nakedness, or danger, or sword?

The idols will be burned. Idols are not worshipped because they are so attractive. Idols are the externalization of the greed in our hearts. Such people complain, are impatient, fear, and offer a dual worship, turning their hearts to their own desires while claiming to worship God.

Idolatry is when benefit precedes righteousness. God does not deny bread or loneliness. However, the world's teachings say that one can be satisfied and full with benefit. But the Bible says it is not possible. Blessed are those who hunger and thirst for righteousness, for they will be filled - Matthew 5:6.

Do not back down saying it's impossible, but look with faith and try to grasp it. Even if you fall into the water while walking on it due to lack of faith, you can still walk if the Lord holds your hand. Not failing means not trying anything at all. Faith is an adventure.
There is a saying that if someone is destined to fail, they will fail. In the moment when someone destined to fail is failing, God holds their hand. What is impossible for humans is possible for God.

There is no such thing as living a good spiritual life without offering yourself, gaining everything without letting go, and pleasing the Lord while being recognized without denying yourself. True faith does not have such things. Any other evaluation or method is futile except for the path where the flesh dies and the spirit lives.
Rest is the power of restoration. Furthermore, the qualification to enjoy rest is also a power. Rest is entered not by circumstances, but solely by faith. Solely by faith.

The scope of worry. It is not the Lord's will for your face to be full of sorrow from worrying about things beyond your capacity. Those are things the Lord must bless, and the timing and method are in His hands.
Be at ease. It is I; do not be afraid. Be at ease. I am praying.
A sense of security is not the proud satisfaction represented by popular acclaim and numbers, but hearing the Lord's voice and being fully united with God. Therefore, my soul is safe in the Lord.
If you only pursue security, you will not live the best life, but only a second-best life. I urge you to embark on the adventure of faith. ^^
If someone asks about your resume, what will you say? But by the grace of God I am what I am - 1 Corinthians 15:10.
The secret to a bad minister doing good ministry is to fill yourself with the Lord alone.

Faith is something that is difficult to do even when you know it. That is why there are no experts in faith. Faith is living, and to live it out, you need not only knowledge but also skill. That skill is His presence and companionship.

The reason for being overly sensitive to others' gazes is pride. Do not stand in the image you think you should project; honestly acknowledge your own appearance before the Lord. God will surely respond. Therefore, humble yourselves under the mighty hand of God, that He may exalt you in due time - 1 Peter 5:6.
Do not worry or fret about future events. The suffering of that day is sufficient for that day. Be sober, and sorrow will depart.

The gospel is glorious. The gospel was God's best and was complete for us. Because Jesus is the gospel. Since He gave Himself to us, no greater proof exists. For I am not ashamed of the gospel, for it is the power of God for salvation to everyone who believes, to the Jew first and also to the Greek - Romans 1:16.

When the way ahead is dark and you cannot see, do not try too hard to see. I hope you will look only to the Lord who makes a way in the desert within you. The Lord is a refuge for those who flee to Him. You are the beacon, My song in the night.

What stood before the Egyptian army and the Red Sea, and led the Israelites through the wilderness, were the pillar of fire and the pillar of cloud, God's protection and guidance. The glory and anointing I should seek is not to merely survive and maintain, but His presence that the adversary and enemy witness and tremble before, even without advertisement. I hope you will look to the heights.

Pharaoh, king of Egypt, demanded more 'production from the people' in response to Moses' request to go according to the Lord's will, thereby making them powerless and sowing discord between the people and Moses. This is 'Pharaoh's system,' the way of the world. Clearly, the world provided the cause, but the wicked standards presented within that system create envy among each other. They deceive you into thinking you will die if you don't live by those wicked standards. They deceive you into thinking you will be eliminated, ignored, and become a failure if you don't live that way. If you have the heart to give up everything and live and die for the Lord, it is nothing. That is why Christians become more at ease and shine in crisis situations. Truly good athletes perform in critical situations based on their practice.

When children do bad things, they cunningly avoid their mother's eyes or close the door. If you do not seek the kingdom of God and His righteousness, you have desires but many worries and anxieties that pierce your heart. If you are in the Lord, what is there to fear?
Kids, I'm off today. I'm going to the swimming pool now. With the kids.

Insincere greetings and soulless gestures are just burdensome. I am truly happy when I receive what the Lord has given. Even if I gather a lot of what the Lord has not given, I will not be happy at all. That is why it is truly happy to share small things with the 'heart of Jesus' in the Lord.

You must believe that God's intention for me is to give peace and a future hope. However, this is an intention experienced when you come, cry out in prayer, and seek the Lord with all your heart. For I know the plans I have for you," declares the Lord, "plans to prosper you and not to harm you, plans to give you hope and a future. Then you will call on me and come and pray to me, and I will listen to you. You will seek me and find me when you seek me with all your heart - Jeremiah 29:11-13.
Affection reveals who a person is. What you pursue is your essence, and where your pursuit is directed, there you will meet eternity.

If you don't know what to do or how to approach something, follow these rules: 1. Pray and make supplications about the matter of concern, but do so with thanksgiving. 2. When you present your requests to God specifically and in detail, peace will come. 3. Believe that God's thoughts toward us are of peace, not disaster, and be confident in the answer. Do not be anxious about anything, but in everything by prayer and supplication with thanksgiving let your requests be made known to God. And the peace of God, which surpasses all understanding, will guard your hearts and your minds in Christ Jesus - Philippians 4:6-7.
It is grace that Jacob could lose Benjamin. Though it is frightening, difficult, and seems impossible, if you abide in the Lord, all attachments are let go. That which you can let go of is grace.

Overcome fear. Because of a sick self, you fear and cling, causing yourself to reject yourself and ultimately become depressed. You can know this by seeing what you truly live for. Tear down everything and start again on the precious blood of Jesus. You will be free. So that by death he might destroy the one who holds the power of death, that is, the devil, and deliver all those who through fear of death were subject to lifelong slavery - Hebrews 2:15.
Do not study or work for ambition, but study or work for your calling.

It is not difficult, it is frightening. It is not that life is difficult that shakes your faith. It is because you do not love Jesus that your faith is shaken. It is not that the forces of sin rage from the beginning, but they make a crack as small as a needle and eventually bring you down. If you are not filled with Jesus, you can consider yourself already in sin.
Weaknesses are overcome when wounds are healed. When scars are held in the Lord's hand, they become shining stars.

Are you weak? The moment you look to the Lord, you become spiritually strong. Therefore, you must always look to the Lord. That is the beginning and that is the completion. Look to Jesus, the founder and perfecter of our faith - Hebrews 12:2.

The reason the world scoffs at the church is not because it lacks something, but because it has grasped worldly things. This is because it is no different from the world. The world will truly fear if we lose everything, even suffering loss, in order to hold onto Jesus.
The church does not become weak because of weak people. Rather, the Lord's power is manifested through weak people. When people become strong, the Lord's power is hidden.
When you are weak, you are strongest. When you are lacking, you receive the most love. At that time, the Lord's power becomes perfect within us. Sunday Intercessory Prayer 1:00 PM @ Choir Section
Blessed is the life that has nothing to boast about except weakness, humility, Jesus Christ, and the cross. How thankful we are! To have abandoned everything in order to hold onto Jesus...
When you see weakness, you must see weakness. The first is another's, the second is your own. There is a purpose when it is shown to you.

To become weak means to break down all self-righteousness and cling to God's grace. When the father becomes weak, the family becomes happy. When the mother becomes weak, the family becomes happy. When a believer becomes weak, the church becomes happy. When a leader becomes infinitely weak, the cell members feel love and grow. Strength is the problem, and doing well becomes pride and returns to us. Strength has self-righteousness and boasting, and it has a pain that pierces people.

When dividing the sheep and the goats, the Lord will divide based on how we treated the least of these, who are the most vulnerable and marginalized, as if we treated the Lord Himself. One soul is more precious than the whole world.

How to live simply but powerfully. It is truly difficult to avoid. However, if you rejoice in persecution for righteousness' sake and choose solitude to hold onto truth, it will become not just easy, but peaceful. You suffer greatly because you try not to die.

Living as sheep in a dark world is inherently not a safe way to live. The only way to live safely is to stick close to the shepherd and listen to his voice. Because sheep are helpless, the shepherd cares for and cherishes them even more.

Sheep listen to the shepherd's voice and follow. Whether the path is rough or seems impossible, they stop when he says stop, go when he says go, and cross when he says cross. At the end of that path, you will see the Lord.

Sheep listen to the shepherd's voice. When we receive the Lord's word, the Lord's image appears in us, and we become His disciples. However, if we listen to the desires of the flesh and the voices of the world, the Lord disappears, and only a sorrowful crowd is troubled. King Saul disappeared into the annals of history in that way. He wasted most of his strength and years proving himself and chasing David.
What a young person should have is simple: have 'absolute faith' and be 'infinitely loyal'.
Wherever you go, you will engage in ministry that is like a war. Life is not about choosing what you like. Obedience is power. Do what He wants.

How ridiculous would it be if one day the pastor didn't show up and the reason given was that he was offended? Do ministers not experience pain and hardship? Of course, they do, but they overcome because the Lord's love is greater. Compared to the Lord's love, it's all insignificant.

Nowadays, people no longer ask, "Who am I?" They only think, "What do others think of me?" It's hard enough to live my own life properly, yet I try to live the life that relatives and others expect. A meaningless life is unhappy because it is not one's own life. You must decide whether to see yourself through God or through your possessions.
Darkness seeks to dominate people through fear. However, when we surrender all circumstances and the future to the Almighty God, true peace envelops us, and Satan can no longer use fear.

Darkness tries to block it somehow, but God's word of truth keeps running. Like the Lord who broke Himself and offered Himself as a sacrifice of truth to the world, the march of the gospel continues. Fire Saturday 2013

Will you wear a mask and die slowly? Or will you die now and live by faith? You must choose whether to pretend to be filled with the Spirit or to obey the counsel of the Spirit who has truly filled you. It is a choice to cast aside as rubbish what was beneficial to me, in order to gain something better, even Jesus. That is why it is called the narrow path.

The thing darkness hates most is when believers gather to pray. It tolerates other services and other acts of faith to some extent, but it strongly opposes prayer. Therefore, we must pray for the ability to pray. Especially when the challenges are so strong that they don't give us time to pray, we must pray for them to be able to pray too. We must ask for the conditions and opportunities to pray.
If it is something that darkness opposes and tests so much, we should welcome it with open arms. This is because the enemy has a fatal weakness there. Spirit of Opposition -

If you wear a mask, you cannot see. You see your true self only when no one is watching. If your appearance when people are watching is drastically different, it means you are wearing a mask and pretending, and the Holy Spirit does not cooperate with or work in acting.

Some people boast of living happily by indulging in certain things. This is an attempt to distract from fatal wounds by seeking other stimuli without resolving them. A sick person in the hospital is still a patient, no matter how much they boast of relative health or present other conditions. A patient needs to see a doctor and receive treatment. That person is Jesus.

If anything or anyone diverts my gaze from the cross, I will look at the storm and sink in it. I hope you will hold onto the rough cross until the final victory and love. The cross is not a casual accessory that can be put on and taken off. It must be the first thing in all decisions and circumstances.
No one knows their life before they live it. We do not have the ability or permission to do so. Therefore, we go not by knowing, but by believing.
Self-diagnosis: Are you truly at peace at this moment?
No matter what problems or challenges come, Jesus is the only one to look to. I hope you will look to the living Jesus, beyond the problems and conditions.
Some say they made 100 billion won selling sushi in London. Humph, let's sell the gospel and win souls.

Tears that are by no means light. Abraham, the source of blessing, received the glory of becoming God's friend and became the ancestor of all believers today. However, many overlook the bloody tears he must have shed for three days. "My son, God himself will provide the lamb for the burnt offering." - Genesis 22:8
Despite any situation or lack, God never abandons us. This is because my hands were clasped with His hands on the cross.
When you don't know what choice to make, rely on the Lord. He is a refuge for those who flee to Him.

Even in paradise where all worries can be forgotten, people can turn it into hell by doing these three things: 1. Comparing themselves - they immediately become unhappy without exception. 2. Trying to receive only love - they become stuck and unable to move forward, leading to departure. This deepens the wound. 3. When relationships break - they see the bottom of life. Conversely, by: 1. Discovering themselves in the Lord without comparison, 2. Trying to love with the Lord's heart, and 3. Building balanced relationships in the Lord, even the barren valleys become the kingdom of heaven. - From a leaders' meeting
If you do not tolerate any weak person, God's training will be postponed. Whether it is 40 days or 40 years depends on the attitude of the one being trained.
I hope you remember what grace you have received, what love you have been given, and where you have been saved. Apart from Jesus, 'the Way,' there is no other for us. Let us embrace faith now.

* When faced with a choice between two options, choose the one where the joy of choosing it is greater than the pain of giving up the other. Those with faith have a different standard for seeing value. They consider the eternal more precious than the temporary, the glorious more than popularity and attention, and suffering with the Lord more valuable than worldly power.

When looking back at a situation, there are times when we think, 'This is a problem I absolutely cannot avoid given my level and circumstances.' This means you should abandon your efforts to solve this issue yourself. It is a matter to be entrusted to the Lord's sovereignty, and you simply need to obey His instructions.
No matter what tribulation comes or what emotional breakdown occurs, if you can cry out "The power of the Lord's blood is mighty" at this very moment, that is already enough.
Don't worry about "What should I do...". Instead, hold onto the cross and find peace. The cross is eternal, and Jesus is the reason. Those with clear standards do not wander.
When difficult forgiveness begins with obedience, a holy chain reaction occurs.
When facing difficulties, though my faith is small, I rely more on my Lord whom I trust. As time passes, there is only more to rely on. No matter what happens, I rely on Jesus. - Hymn 342

* Dealing with other people is truly foolish. It is because it is confronting God. Also, David said to Abishai and all his servants, "If even my own son, who came from my body, is trying to take my life, how much more this Benjamite! Let him alone, and let him curse, for the Lord has told him to. It may be that the Lord will look on my affliction, and that the Lord will repay me with good for his cursing today." 2 Samuel 16:12, 13
When facing difficulties, though my faith is small, I rely more on my Lord whom I trust. As time passes, there is only more to rely on. No matter what happens, I rely on Jesus. - Hymn 342
When facing difficulties, though my faith is small, I rely more on my Lord whom I trust. - Hymn 342
Even amidst difficulties and tribulations, if I can live for the Lord, that is great grace.
Prolonged difficulties are due to a lack of change. If you cannot change, you must at least let go. Then the Lord can change you.
When you think it's difficult, ignore it and try. It's about making the impossible normal.
* Self-diagnosis: If you think the fault lies with others, you are definitely sick. Satan will never miss that opportunity.
A foolish person is one who gets angry at people for what the Lord has humbled. An absurd person is one who is concerned about the eyes of others for what God has exalted.
A foolish person considers a single interruption insignificant. However, a wise person works with elasticity, acceleration, and passion.
* Grace begets grace. If you have received grace, you will keenly feel that everything you have is by God's grace.

A child acts like a child. They easily get happy, easily get upset, and cling to small things. Being childish means not knowing what is truly important (core values). If you know the value of God's love and your own worth, you cannot live so anxiously. Do not cling to human affection; love the Lord. Then the imperfect will become perfect. Jesus' love is the most complete perfection. When I was a child, I spoke like a child, I understood like a child, I thought like a child. But when I became a man, I gave up childish ways. For now we see in a mirror dimly, but then face to face. Now I know in part; then I shall know fully, even as I have been fully known. - 1 Corinthians 13:11-12

A young child constantly seeks confirmation of their mother's love amidst their problems. A baby who has received love develops faith that relies on the mother's complete love. In every important ministry of Jesus, He heard the voice of God. (At the Mount of Transfiguration, at the Jordan River, in the Upper Room). Those voices were words of "I love you" and "I am pleased with you." In these moments of crisis, what you truly need is "confirmation of love."

If you give a child candy and a check for 100 million won, they will pick the candy. This is because they are childish. When they grow up, they will choose the 100 million won. This is because the 100 million won contains enough candy to eat for the rest of their lives. Everything is contained within Jesus.

Even young babies fret about losing their mother's embrace, food, or toys. This is the nature of humans who have lost the Garden of Eden. No worldly possession can fill such a sense of loss. It cannot be compensated by academic achievements, honor, possessions, or boasting. Rather, it worsens. If the sense of loss comes from losing the place where we were with the Lord, there is only one place humans should return to: the Lord's embrace.

* Gaze is influence. When you look only to the Lord, you can love most fervently and exert the greatest influence. This is because the Lord works. For it is God who works in you, both to will and to work for his good pleasure. - Philippians 2:13

When I was young, I was severely scolded for playing with a detective friend's handcuffs, which got stuck too tightly. At first, it was a game, but then I became so flustered that my face turned white. However, the father's friend just smiled. He had the key, and based on his experience, he knew it was not that serious. Joseph must have also worn handcuffs and gotten hurt, so he would have said something like, "This isn't a game ㅠㅜ." Even if you get hurt, see blood, and fall into a deeper abyss, everything is in the hands of the Lord who works all things for good. He sent a man before them; Joseph was sold as a slave. His feet were bound with fetters; his neck was put in a collar. - Psalm 105:17, 18

When I was young, I used to complain. But as I lived, I realized that there were far more things for which I deserved to be complained about than things to complain about. It was so embarrassing... And I realized that the people I complained about back then were also doing their best in their own circumstances. So I keenly remind myself again: I am a sinner.

From a young age, we are trained with tendencies that can derail our journey of faith. These are meritocracy and legalism. It is understanding faith as give and take. The most representative example is a vending machine. You put in money, and a drink comes out. If you put in money (merit) and don't get what you want, most people hit it with their hands and kick it with their feet. God is not a vending machine.
* Knowing God: A holy person is not just a good person, but one who has tasted and known God's goodness. Taste and see that the Lord is good! - Psalm 34:8

If offered carelessly, it is difficult for me and annoying for others. But when I offer myself before the Lord's altar, heavenly fire ignites and consumes everything. Only when one's self dies can the Lord fully minister as one's King.
* Affirm your faith. Faith is not about avoiding storms well, but about facing them well. True faith is holding onto the Lord no matter what the world says, and this is proven only when storms come.

The way for a clumsy leader to save souls is to respond to the comings and goings of souls at the level of spiritual warfare. When the spiritual enemy wages war, clinging to non-essential things and ignoring spiritual warfare leads to mutual exhaustion. Declare in the name of the Lord that your younger sibling, who came in beaten, will not go and get beaten with them.
Yesterday, I felt like I was watching "I am a Revivalist." I am now going to pick up the speaker pastor.
It was good until yesterday, but it can feel chilly today. But do not be alarmed. The righteous live by faith, not by circumstances or evaluation.
What frees us from yesterday's trials today is a shift in focus. I am dedicated to doing my part, and the Lord is doing His part.

* Be clear about whether you will do it or not. Those who are clear about what they must die for are also clear about what they must live for. Following my earnest expectation and hope, I will not be put to shame in anything, but will be bold as always, whether by life or by death, that Christ may be magnified in my body. For to me, to live is Christ, and to die is gain. - Philippians 1:20-21
How can I not give thanks? That I can pray and bless...
How can I not be joyful? That I can hope in the Lord...

* Prayer is not an excuse. The phrase "I will try to pray" does not mean making a decision that causes me no harm in the present. It means fulfilling the Lord's will, whatever the cost. Nevertheless, not my will, but yours be done. - Luke 22:42
How can I not be joyful? That the Lord is present...
In whatever way, firmly reject all schemes that prevent you from looking to the Lord. He has promised to exalt and answer and glorify those who love Him and know His name.

* If you change your attitude, your life will change. The reason for frustration is vain expectations. It is because we expect too much of a happy ending. Those who are willing to go to the barren valleys of Agor will find every day a bonus and a cause for gratitude.

If forcing oneself to run laps on a track to be recognized for the cross, not out of compulsion, is legalism, then running with cheers because of victory is faith. Therefore, entrusting ourselves to Jesus who has accomplished all, and thinking deeply and continuously looking to Him is obedience and faith. Thus, the best ministry is to focus on thinking about and looking to Jesus.

When did you feel the most love? Was it on dates at nice restaurants and beautiful scenery? No. It is when you want to share in sorrow and pain but are unable to help, and feel regret. It is when you wish you could suffer in their place but cannot, that love becomes intense. It seems that most people become distracted when they become peaceful and prosperous.

* Obedience achieves completion. We do obedience and prayer. But the plan of the matter is with God. Many seek the favor of the sovereign, but the plan of man's affairs comes from the Lord. - Proverbs 29:26
Always and everywhere, by deep, deep grace...
Always, still, forever, only, certainly, nevertheless..., I serve only the Lord.
One day, you will truly be thankful for your weakness, not resent it. You will be amazed to see God working powerfully and making you complete in that weakness.

* The servant who fulfills his purpose, the ultimate thing the servant seeks to give through the pain of childbirth is not a change of mood or strong human relationships. It is what Jesus desired to give. I have come to cast fire on the earth, and what if it is already kindled? - Luke 12:49

Please prostrate yourselves with your faces to the ground. Now is not the time for joy and laughter. It is the time to humble ourselves and turn away from wicked sin. We desire this land to be healed.

Even if you pray to have a smaller face, become the most youthful-looking, and have a slender, stick-like body, God is more likely not to grant it unless it is a special case. The so-called standards of happiness are trends that the abnormal Korean society particularly demands in 2013, regardless of God's will. The gaze of others cannot bring me happiness. Only the Lord is my strength and my shield.
* The most powerful performance. The strongest power is love. Because where the Lord's heart is, He Himself works. Without love, it is useless and meaningless.

* Repentance is change. While sharing many messages, I learned what my friends like. They like messages of peace and comfort amidst worry and concern. However, true change does not happen by simply adding on. It happens when you tear your heart and have surgery to cast off greed. But such messages are not welcomed by many. Then you will not change, and if you do not change, you will be in the same place even after ten years. It is because you had no intention of letting go of greed from the beginning. Rationalization without repentance is not a mistake, but a matter of character.
How thankful we are! That we can hope in the Lord...

There are times when iron is heated to an immense temperature. This is when change is needed. It must be struck when it is red hot. When passing through the furnace of tribulation, if prayer is added, you will be transformed into the fastest and most complete form.

More important than achievements and recognition is dreaming. Dreaming Jesus' dream. Worshipping Jesus and thinking deeply about Him. Salvation belongs to our God who sits on the throne, and to the Lamb.
* Great mistakes. The mistake itself is not wrong. Rationalizing it is the great mistake. Have the courage to say, "I am sorry." God will beautifully change it.

The fluctuating battle of faith is ultimately a struggle for the point of view. It is important to have the perspective of truth. While the world discriminates based on money, status, beauty, and education, God lets me, who is in His image, know that I am a sufficiently precious person. That cross is the proof. You are already sufficiently attractive and precious.
Instead of becoming cynical about what you lack, try being thankful for what you have. You will become happier, and a happier path will open. God is neither afraid nor negotiates.

By walking with the Lord daily, Enoch's heart gradually moved away from earthly things. Like Paul, he died daily to this earthly life and was lifted up in his spirit to the heavenly realm. However, while living on this earth, Enoch fulfilled all his responsibilities. He cared for his family. He worked, ministered, and lived. But he was not bound to the world. None of the pressing issues of this world could prevent him from walking with God.
* Wounded Healer. A true servant must be someone who has had their wounds healed. Otherwise, those wounds become a great weapon against others.
Nice to see you here too! Happy New Year! :)

The difficulties and sad problems happening here and there should not make us feel the seriousness of our own situation or the indifference and heartlessness of those around us. In that place, we must see our own infinite shortcomings and weaknesses. Instead, we must hear the Lord's voice calling us to humble ourselves and serve on our knees. We must respond to the Lord's request to become a more trusted servant of God, without needing to prove ourselves, by becoming lower and more humble, and to be like a harbor of peace for many wounded people. Let us all pray like this. Father God! Humble me more.

Looking at many things means being scattered and weakened. That is why the Lord limits. This is because then we can focus on one thing. When God limits and removes things, it means to focus on the most important thing. Forgetting what is behind and straining toward what is ahead, I press on toward the goal to win the prize for which God has called me in Christ Jesus. - Philippians 3:13, 14
When I see various problems, I feel infinite inadequacy. That is why I pray and kneel. Being able to see one's own shortcomings is a blessing. It is because we rely more on the Lord.
For various reasons, people who turn things upside down at the last minute are bound to appear. Do not be afraid, just believe. God is faithful.

I earnestly pray for the brothers and sisters who are fulfilling the calling and mission granted by the Lord in various places around the world in various ways. I bless the brothers and sisters working and studying hard in Chicago, New York, Belgium, Switzerland, Korea, and England with strength and excellent wisdom, both physically and spiritually. That is my job. It is the work of a priest.
* Advance rather than despair. If you have faith but do not live by faith, think simply. It is a reminder that you must hold onto the cross more tightly.
You will realize much, much later how great a thing you have done in the Lord... God is wonderful.

You are chosen by God, have received new life, and are people who are clothed with God's deep love and care. Therefore, treat others warmly and kindly. Humbly, with gentleness and patience, show tolerance, always forgive others, and do not hold grudges. Remember that the Lord has forgiven you, and you also forgive others. Above all, the most important thing is to live a life full of love. Love is the bond that holds all things together in perfect unity. Let the peace of Christ rule in your hearts and lives. This is your responsibility and privilege as members of Christ's body. And always live a life of gratitude. Keep the teachings of Christ in your hearts, and let His word enrich your lives. And by that word, become wise, teaching and admonishing one another, - Paul
* The ability to confess everything makes the weak great.
When you lose your composure, other things may seem wrong. Please have composure. They are simply different. The Lord makes the decisions. Entrust it to Him.

* True evaluation. Ministry cannot be known by numbers and titles. It is difficult to say even after leaving the position. Ultimately, we will know when we stand before the Lord. That is why we must serve with fear.

A compass saves a traveler's life. However, that compass points in only one direction. Where true north is... If you are shown only north, south, east, and west will automatically appear. If you look to the Lord and make Him your standard, other decisions can be easily made in accordance with that standard. For there is no complexity or difficulty before the Lord.
* How leaders love. It is to run towards the Lord on our knees, interceding with tears. It is so important that we become blind to other things.
The Lord directs the steps of the godly. He delights in every aspect of their lives. Though they stumble, they will not fall, for the Lord upholds them with his hand. - Psalm 37:23, 24

The Lord is my strength and my shield; my heart trusts in him, and he helps me. My heart exults, and with my song I give thanks to him. - Psalm 28:7 David had much gold and silver, people, and power to rely on. But he relied only on the Lord. There can be no other more wondrous power for a person who has God. The world is a society that offers newer and more wondrous things, but there is no other name under heaven given to mankind by which we must be saved except Jesus. Do you love Jesus? Then you need nothing more.
The reason history has stopped. Most people do not deny the Holy Spirit, but they limit Him in many ways. This is because we become the master and the Lord becomes the guest.

History repeats itself. This is because human nature does not change. However, if people who have crucified themselves on the cross begin to be established, even history will change. I hope you become people who change world history.
* Dangerous self-esteem. It is very dangerous for a leader to have low self-esteem and inferiority complex. A person who respects themselves can also respect their co-workers.

The standard that divides history is Jesus. The standard that divides people is Jesus. The standard that divides life and death is Jesus. If you do not know Jesus, you will worry only about earthly things like "What shall we eat?" or "What shall we wear?" and die. If you know and believe in Jesus, you will live seeking His kingdom and His righteousness. When a person meets Jesus, they live their lives to the fullest and burn out completely.

I feel your presence always serving the Lord with all your might. It is challenging, enviable, and I am grateful. Looking at the main photo, you seem to have lost weight. But it's great that you look healthy. I will pray for your ministry and everything you do!

To be refined, to face challenges, to be driven into the wilderness, these are emergencies. My own situation is dire. However, a wise person, without regard for this, boldly advances. When advancing in the wilderness, you receive amazing progress and power. People of faith give more than rich people. People who are truly busy, unable to even eat and running around, are more faithful than those with plenty of time. Advancement is not about moving forward when circumstances allow. It is about pushing yourself, having truly groundbreaking thoughts, and challenging your limits. Wilderness living is advancement.
If the purpose of dating is pleasure, only wounds will remain. The purpose of dating is one way to know God's will.

* Overcoming distance. It is not the Lord's way for a leader to pay excessive attention to those they feel closer to, while ignoring the distance with those they feel awkward with. The fact that someone worships with me means that the Lord trusts and expects me and has entrusted them to me. Whatever you did for one of the least of these brothers and sisters of mine, you did for me. - Matthew 25:40

Sing when you are weak. When I am weak, I should not despair, but rejoice in the greatness of the Lord who becomes my strength when I am weak. My strength is not my own strength, but rejoicing in the Lord is my strength. Therefore, I will gladly boast about my weaknesses, that the power of Christ may rest on me. For when I am weak, then I am strong. (2 Corinthians 12:10).
The revelation of weakness is not because I cannot manage myself, but because it is a part that needs to be healed, and God wants to break down emotions that do not come from Him.
Inferiority complex arises from not understanding the gospel. With low self-esteem, one cannot love others, and without love, evangelism is impossible.

* The way of man, the way of God. 'Telling' is what I do, and 'keeping' is what the Lord does. Tell Him! Then He will keep you. Do not be anxious about anything, but in everything, by prayer and petition, with thanksgiving, present your requests to God. And the peace of God, which transcends all understanding, will guard your hearts and your minds in Christ Jesus. - Philippians 4:6, 7

How to be zealous. We must strive with all our might in accordance with the working of Him who works powerfully within us. Zeal that ignores the Lord working through me is not only in vain but also wicked.

The reason for experiencing difficulties is not a lack of zealous and capable servants. Rather, it is because there are no useless servants. Seeking recognition for one's own zeal leads one away from the cross. The path of the cross is God's immeasurable love that humbles me, even through extraordinary circumstances. He made you walk in the wilderness... to humble you...
I do not consider myself to have yet grasped the thought structure of Paul, but forgetting what is behind and straining toward what is ahead.

The meaning of praying diligently is not to have my sincerity reach Him, but to rely solely on Him. This difference means that moral rewards become useless self-righteousness in faith, and rather, listening and believing, and being unable to do anything but pray because I believe, is the way to obtain true grace.
The conclusion from living diligently is that diligence alone is not enough. Even lazy people do not know such a conclusion. If God does not help, diligence and effort are just hard work and in vain.
Working diligently, Thanks Misun Hong
The proof of love. I love the people of God given to me. However, I do not argue or overdo it to prove that love. Love cannot be hidden, and above all, God knows.
It is normal to feel repentance if you have worked diligently and achieved results but have skipped prayer. I hope for a simple life where life's priorities are set.
This is a generation that offers passion and intellect. I bless you to have burning logic.

Victory comes not from perfection but from maturity. There is no perfect church. It is a gathering of imperfect sinners, and they were not cut by a cutoff line after being tested when they gathered. Despite such imperfection, God works through the grace poured into the church and the maturity that comes from the Holy Spirit to overcome problems and become glorious. The church and the home were indeed the Father's irrevocable decisions, who is the source of wisdom and glory.
Passion also has levels. Jesus is my passion. Therefore, our passion must be first-class.
You seem to have a lot of passion. "You'll get used to it."

You don't have to check for glory instead of popularity; you just have to testify. It is not popularity that makes us run, but glory. Therefore, instead of looking at the reaction, hold onto the truth.

Let's say we studied a train running without rails. Eventually, after decades and astronomical budgets, it succeeded in moving without rails. That heavy train moving without rails...!! How astonishing! However, trains without rails are slower than ordinary trains, cost more, and crucially, are not very helpful. We just need to run on rails... Prayer is the rail of the train.
To You be glory and honor and power. May You receive glory and honor and power, even if I fade away and am forgotten.
Sorrow under sovereignty. The statement that the Lord reigns means that my worries and sorrows leave me and melt away under His glory. Our God is a consuming fire. -Hebrews 12:29

To live forever, eternal life is not just the continuation of time. It refers to a qualitative life of intimacy with the Lord. Everyone will exist for an eternal time. The faith I have determines where I spend eternity, and how much I love Him determines what I will do forever.

If you raise your spiritual altitude higher, you can be free from the clouds of temptation and reaction that hold you back. Raising your altitude is the confirmation that 'I will serve only the Lord.' Rocom Meri Khost!
Satan intensely attacks those who are spiritually lazy and have lost their tension.

The secret to victory in spiritual warfare is to maintain peace. It is not to panic or be flustered. The Lord never panicked or was flustered during His ministry and maintained peace. He even slept through the stormy sea. The most effective victory is not to be shaken by what the devil shakes, and not to respond. Please ignore it. That is the famous ability to ignore.

Spiritual warfare is, coincidentally, a battle of perspective. To deal with greed-sin, it extends to a battle of values where greed arises, and in Philippians, Paul confesses that all other dazzling values became 'dung' before the value of Jesus. In the face of the Holy Spirit's revelation and illumination, things that were once boastful become mere 'excrement,' and to such a person, temptations and the world only smell.

Instead of reaction, focus. Repeatedly seeking confirmation of a relationship through the other person's reaction is due to fear. This anxiety stems from 'anxiety about one's own existence.' Not knowing God, one does not know one's own existence and purpose, leading to attachment and twisting life through vain pursuits.

Glory overwhelms expediency. Rather than worrying under the pressure of relationships, be concerned that you cannot let go of yourself and look directly at God. This is pursuing glory rather than expediency.
If you try to influence others, side effects will occur. True divine influence comes from those who are focused on God and are moved by Him.

Soul, overcome; heart, recover. To overcome, you must recover. God tells us to first recover our 'first love' before health, finances, or social life. There is a fatal deficiency that the Lord diagnoses, which is 'first love' that cannot be replaced by anything else. To regain it, you must repent and turn back, find and change what you have lost, remove it, and become simple and focused. It is changing my interests and affections, and renewing what was previously beneficial to me by the superior knowledge of Jesus Christ. But whatever was to my profit I now consider loss for the sake of Christ. Indeed, I consider everything a loss because of the surpassing worth of knowing Christ Jesus my Lord. -Phil 3:7,8
There is no happier news than the news that a soul has been saved. The Father is still working.

In the movie A Beautiful Mind, Professor John Nash overcomes what he wants to see and the hallucinations that result from it and wins the Nobel Prize. After his acceptance speech, he goes out with his wife, and the three figures from his hallucinations appear. However, he does not choose them. Living by faith is not being free from all temptations. It is simply not choosing them. Faith is a choice.

If the water doesn't come out at your house but comes out at your neighbor's, it's not Thames Water's problem. There is sufficient supply, but your pipe is the problem. If faith is the problem, you cannot receive the supply. Have good faith.

When Jeremiah spoke of the fall of Babylon, the superpower of the time, no one believed him. However, they were conquered by a foreign nation with a different value system, worldview, and culture. In the eyes of the world, we must become foreigners. This means living with a different attitude toward this world, that is, with an opposing spirit. I will send a winnowing fork for them into Babylon, so that they will winnow it and make it desolate... -Jer 51:2

The expression "watching worship" should be corrected. It is like unbelievers or watching worship. Worship is at least offered, and I become a holy part of it. It is not like watching a fire from across the river, but the fire enters within me and burns. A life that has gone out will truly become a life that is extinguished. Come to pray.

Those who do not know the preciousness of worship are like Esau, who sold his birthright for a bowl of stew. We should not be people who fail to see what is precious as precious and fail to keep our place given by the Lord.
Worshippers should rejoice. Because they are victors. David won all his battles. Because he was a victor in worship.

To worship where you are called, you must receive power. Before going where you are called, you must focus and seek the Lord until you are clothed with power. Whoever has will be given more, and whoever does not have, even what they have will be taken away.

Even if you believe in Jesus and pray, you can walk through the valley of the shadow of death. It is not the quality of the path that matters, but who you walk with. Walking with the Lord, who drank every bitter cup for me without leaving any behind, that is faith.
Christians do not fall because the trials are great. They fall because they do not carry their cross.
Christians do not act by force. They act in God's guidance, that is, in overflowing guidance.

The things that block the joy of believing in Jesus and the joy of obedience to His word are worldly pleasures and greed. Even if you nod your head to the word, it sticks to your heart like a sticker and is hard to remove. However, the pearl merchant who found the most precious pearl in the world disposes of all his pearls and buys the large one. When the joy of knowing Jesus comes, everything else becomes like refuse and falls away.
Christians are not chased. Rather, they are the ones who chase and lead.

Outside of Jesus, even if you are splendid and exalted, you are like a flower in a vase without roots. If you remain in Jesus, even the smallest things are full of meaning and happiness. Because Jesus loved us to the end (John 13:1), we do not fail. Because we did not love Him first, we are never afraid.
We have come this far by Jesus' love. And by Jesus' love, we will go there as well.
If you want to be close to Jesus, you must deny yourself. It is impossible to be close to Jesus without self-denial.
Revival happens when you focus on Jesus. Therefore, it is grace that you cannot look at anything other than the Lord. True blessing is losing other things to gain Jesus.

Jesus said, 'Live as salt,' and 'Let salt be in you and be at peace.' Salt is influence. It is only 2.82% that prevents the vast sea from spoiling and provides the only salty taste. It means that 'salt' is the only thing that prevents decay and provides saltiness. Therefore, if salt loses its taste, it is useless and is trampled underfoot. How can we live as salt? To live as salt is to live with the renunciation of rights, self-denial, and infinite forgiveness. (Luke 14:33) So likewise, whoever of you does not forsake all that he has cannot be my disciple. (Luke 14:34) Salt is good, but if the salt has lost its taste, with what will it be seasoned? (Luke 14:35) It is fit neither for the land nor for the dunghill. It is thrown away. He who has ears to hear, let him hear! Salt is also discipleship. Wherever disciples go, the Lord is proclaimed and the kingdom of God is established.
They say Jesus alone is enough. But it doesn't seem so. If you live by the gospel, you are happy even if you die today. Are you sufficiently happy? If not, Jesus is not enough for you.

A person living by Jesus is not one who has no temptation of sinfulness, but one who, though it always exists, rules the flesh by the Spirit. If you serve the flesh, you will die, but if you kill and rule the flesh by the Spirit, you will be led by God. For if you live according to the flesh, you will die, but if by the Spirit you put to death the deeds of the body, you will live... - Paul
* Absolute peace without rejection or loss. This peace that wells up in my heart is a treasure buried deep. Who can dig up and take away my treasure? I am at ease. - Hymn 469

I hope to be a person who can only be explained by Jesus, a person who, if asked to explain who I am, can only say it is God's grace, a person who, though broken like a clay pot and hurt in pride, reveals the precious Jesus. My value is solely the value of Jesus.

There is almost no record of Jesus before He began His public ministry at the age of 30. It means He simply grew up and lived as the Son of God without any accomplishments. When God the Father said of such a Jesus, 'This is my beloved Son, with whom I am well pleased,' He was evaluating Him not by any deeds, achievements, or accomplishments, but solely by His intimate relationship with Him.

* The reason to be strong. While 'I' myself am much weaker and more narrow-minded than I think, God's grace is incomparably greater and eternal than I can imagine. Who shall separate us from the love of Christ? Shall tribulation, or distress, or persecution, or famine, or nakedness, or danger, or sword? - Romans 8:35

Jesus can never ignore my cries. The souls He redeemed with His blood on the cross cannot be ignored or despised. The reason prayers are answered is not because of one's great spirituality, but solely because of the cross.
Jesus is my strength.

* The reason falsehood is strong. Ahab is guided by a lying spirit. That spirit was heard through the false prophet Zedekiah. The reason Ahab proceeds to the place of judgment, truly ignoring the terrible fact, is because the teachings of Jezebel, namely the 'idol of success' and the 'adultery of greed,' are in his heart. He can never see the truth, but only the falsehood he wants to see. What causes quarrels and conflicts among you? It is your passions that are at war within you. You desire and do not have, so you murder. You covel and cannot obtain, so you fight and quarrel. - James 4:1,2
Jesus is not only on the glorious Mount of Transfiguration. He is also in the lowliest schools and workplaces, in places where you can barely breathe. The Lord works there too. Let us pray.

Jesus made an immense sacrifice to give you authority. If you give that up, the evil one will take it and attack you instead. When you become one with Jesus, His abundant grace and power also work through me.
Jesus was silent like a lamb led to the slaughter. However, in the temple, He was angry for His Father's name.

Jesus was silent. Not because He had nothing to say, but because He had to drink the entire cup of suffering. In the moment of suffering when He had to swallow even His groans, the Lord envisioned our faces to be saved and remained silent. If Jesus' renunciation of His rights gave us salvation, what is there to boast about in our renunciation of rights as sinners?

Jesus prays all night and builds up people. The fact that the Lord worked so hard to build them up means that their shortcomings and weaknesses as disciples are not their responsibility, but 'Jesus' responsibility.' He will do it. It is God who keeps me, not I. It is God who opens my path, not I. David, becoming a triumphant king, confesses, 'The Lord is my shepherd; I shall not want.' Trusting the Lord completely is greater than not sinning.

Jesus marveled at the centurion's faith. Therefore, He heals the illness with His word as the centurion requested. The reason his confession of faith was hard to find even in Israel was that it was true faith that acknowledged Jesus' sovereignty. There are many believers, but very few who acknowledge the Lord's sovereignty.

* The glory of humility. People who seem so weak that they dislike even getting shots do not hesitate to undergo bone-cutting surgery to become beautiful. It is to become beautiful. Believers are not inherently tough people. However, because the glory of the Lord they have experienced is so great, they can become endlessly humble and pray to be humbled further. He humbled himself by becoming obedient to the point of death, even death on a cross. Therefore God has highly exalted him and bestowed on him the name that is above every name. - Philippians 2:8,9

Jesus told the fishermen, who smelled of fish, that just as the Father sent Him into the world, He was sending them into the world. The only way this world can be forgiven of sins and return to the Lord for salvation is for us to preach the gospel. This is because the Lord has called us and sent us.
Jesus could not pass by the tears of the Canaanite widow whose son had died. Jesus remembers our tears. "I have heard your prayer; I have seen your tears." 2 Kings 20:5
* To love to the point of being broken. Because I have received such great love that it breaks me.
Jesus was not chased or hurried because He knew only the Father's will would be done. Fulfilling His will in His time begins with believing.

In the Gospel of John, Jesus revealed that His disciples are hated by the world because they do not belong to it. However, rather than wishing to be separated from the world, He prayed to be kept from corruption and to transform it. The world is a battlefield, and the Lord wants us not to avoid the battle.

* What to remember in darkness When praying in darkness, God reveals that there are more people for us than against us. Through this truth, the Lord wants us to continue to fight without giving up. "But Elisha answered, 'Look, I will make them come down to me. I will get them to drink some water and eat some food. After that they can go home.'" - 2 Kings 6:16

Jesus invites us to 'an invitation to happiness.' His invitation contains no threats or condemnations. He is never disappointed. This is because the way He opened with His body is 'a new and living way.' Do not try to achieve it, but praise Him who has achieved it. You will experience peace. 'It is finished.' - John 19:30

Jesus drew a clear line between disciples and crowds. For those who love Jesus and follow Him, miracles become commonplace. "Whoever has my commands and keeps them is the one who loves me. The one who loves me will be loved by my Father, and I too will love them and show myself to them." - John 14:21

Jesus said that a servant is not greater than his master, nor a disciple than his teacher. Yet, He washed their feet. The purpose of God's glorious Son coming into this world was to wash away filth. And He told us to do the same. He said that no matter how religious our actions are, if we do not live like this, we have nothing to do with Jesus. "By this everyone will know that you are my disciples, if you love one another."

On His last day on earth, Jesus went up to the Mount of Olives to pray. To fulfill the Father's will on earth as it is in heaven... Those who encounter God are transformed, and that transformation comes through unmerited grace.

Although Jesus was the Son of God, He was unjustly accused and executed in the court of sinful humans. This was so that He could reveal all things by truth through His resurrection and crush the head of Satan.
Jesus has never rushed me because my mistakes are beyond my capacity to bear. Rather, my life desperately needs Jesus, and for that reason, Jesus bore the cross.
* The best discernment Rather than sensing the forces of darkness, desire the Lord's presence. That is true discernment.

Jesus said that without Him, we can do nothing. So why should we be disappointed that we can do nothing? The pride of expecting from ourselves and others leads to disappointment. The humble are never disappointed.
* A humbled heart My grace from the Lord has always been more than I deserved, compared to my faith and character.
Believing in Jesus is not just saying yes, but throwing ourselves into His embrace. Complete trust leads us to a new land.

Believing in Jesus is being moved to tears by looking only at Him, due to the glory that is no longer evaluated by worldly values. My choices and reactions prove what I trust and love. Do you love Jesus?

Believing in Jesus is not wish fulfillment. Paul says he can be delivered to death for the sake of Jesus (1 Corinthians 4:11). He also wanted to imitate His death (Philippians 3:10). This is because true love makes one want to sacrifice.

When you believe in Jesus, God immediately dwells with you. However, you must be transformed by renewing your mind. God must come out of my innermost sanctuary (spirit) into the holy place (mind) and completely rule even to the outer court (body). We should not seek the Holy Spirit elsewhere. Do not block the Holy Spirit with your thoughts. You must open your mind to allow the Holy Spirit within you to lead.
Looking at Jesus gives us the courage to not give up and to rise again.

* Finding the true culprit Who were the most heinous people who crucified Jesus? Mark says it was the people who had no place for the Word and Pilate, who wanted to satisfy the people. Matthew testifies that it was the high priests, consumed by envy. John and Luke record that it was the people who believed Him to be the savior of their nation, and Judas, who was disappointed, and also the Roman soldiers who harbored malicious hearts. To us who look at these people and shake our heads, Paul says this: "Here is a trustworthy saying that deserves full acceptance: Christ Jesus came into the world to save sinners—of whom I am the worst." - 1 Timothy 1:15 Not being able to see yourself means you are not looking at the Lord before the Lord.

Seeing Jesus was seeing the Father. Therefore, all that I have loved appears in my image. Thus, faith can be passed down. John 14:9 "Anyone who has seen me has seen the Father. How can you say, ‘Show us the Father’?"
Simply decide to love Jesus. Then, refuse to be remembered or explained by anything else.
Loving Jesus. Looking at Jesus is the greatest core ministry.

* When the lights go out A person's true self is not their displayed image. When I reach my limit, my mask comes off, and my true nature is revealed. The storm will not stop, and should not stop, until I truly kneel before the Lord and weep. Now, my spotlight must be turned off before the Lord's glory.
Loving Jesus is dying for Jesus.
Those who love Jesus are bold. They live for the Lord, work for the Lord, suffer for the Lord, and die for the Lord. All glory and honor to the Lamb who was slain.

Those who love Jesus are unshaken. However, in truly difficult moments in life, one can be shaken. But those who love Jesus more are unshaken. Yet, when facing truly, truly difficult things, one can be shaken. But those who genuinely love Jesus cannot be shaken. How can you love Jesus and be shaken? Ministry is not a game, and mission is not a pastime. Jesus shed His blood, the Lord bore the cross. Therefore, no one can stop you. Whether we live or die, we belong to the Lord. Those who hold only to the cross, who partake of the blood, cannot be bound by their own affairs. Even if they want to be bound, they cannot. There is a fire in their hearts...
Do you love Jesus? Those who love Jesus are those who die for Jesus. During a meeting in 1989...
I think of Jesus. I love Jesus. I look only at Jesus. What else would I look at?

* Unavoidable faith As we live in the world, we encounter things we cannot avoid. This is because they are things we should not avoid. These are matters that require prayer with faith and areas that require patience. While it is grace to be spared times of testing, sometimes facing them is also a blessing.

When the knowledge of Jesus becomes supreme, things that were once beneficial no longer hold much appeal. If you claim to believe but do not exhibit the characteristics of a believer and continue in debauchery, it means a change in values has not yet occurred. If you cannot love Jesus, you will remain in sin. A person's affections reveal their true nature.

Those who have shared Jesus are amazed by the感動 and anointing. Anointing is poured out when we love and bless. The greatest blessing is sharing Jesus, so the Father cannot remain idle. When we bless in Jesus' name and say we love, the power of heaven is imparted. This is true for unbelievers and fellow believers alike...
If you truly love Jesus, you can be free from all things that easily bind you. This is because your life becomes clearer, not lost.

When you first believe in Jesus, you realize that you are a sinner and that Jesus bore the cross because of your sins. When you believe in Jesus for a long time, you realize that you are the chief of sinners and that Jesus' cross continues.

Jesus' earnest prayer was that His disciples would be one, just as the Father and Jesus are one, and that those who hear their words and believe in Jesus would also be one. When we are one, Jesus' wish is fulfilled, and heaven becomes a reality.

It is foolish to judge based on imagination and can cause much hurt. Jesus told the Pharisees who hated Him to prove what was wrong, but they simply hated Him (John 18:23). However, at the heart of that hatred lay this sentiment: "For he knew that the chief priests had handed him over out of envy" (Mark 15:10). Envy, the desire to remain in control and not lose my initiative, is what crucifies Jesus.

Jesus' yoke is easy, and His burden is light (Matthew 11:29-30). It is not about what I do, but about being with the Lord, becoming like His image, and letting Him accomplish the work. My breath, heartbeat, everything comes from God. Only the Lord should be the subject of my joy.
