Neither height nor depth, nor any other created thing, will be able to separate us from the love of God in Christ Jesus our Lord - Romans 8:39.
The most certain thing at this moment is true gratitude to God and that everything is boundless grace. That is enough. Nothing else matters much.
I pray for God's peace for all souls who desperately need prayer at this moment.

For those who cannot sleep at this late hour, though it may be a bright morning in Korean time, but whose future and hearts are still in the dark night, pass through the night like this. "He alone knows the way I take; and when he has tested me, I will come forth as gold. Job 23:10" The Lord makes us know His sovereignty through suffering, and He gives us repentance, forgiveness, and fellow workers like Elihu.
Do not fear that this goodness will soon be broken; simply give thanks simply. That is the perfect response that pleases the Lord. The most powerful prayer is thanksgiving.

The only way to survive in this barren and dangerous world, like a wilderness, is to hear the Father's voice. It is to hear that voice and obey it. Under all the false signposts, hold onto the Lord's word alone and go forth in obedience.

"If I do this, I will be happy. I was unhappy because I didn't have this. If I only had this, no one could ignore me. I will stand tall and proud before others without failing again." Satan speaks. "Well done!"

If this were for my own sake, I would fear and worry. But if it is from God, I will finish this race by faith, regardless of the circumstances or outcome. Even if the enemy comes and seizes my weaknesses, threatens me, and takes everything away, I will not give up this path because it was never done for my own satisfaction or success.

While engaging in fierce spiritual warfare here and busy preparing for the retreat, there is one thing I do not forget. It is you. I will not forget you, especially those of you in Korea, and I will pray for you. I will set aside time during the retreat to pray specifically for our brothers and sisters in Korea. Live in a manner worthy of the gospel. We will earnestly cry out in prayer for you. Let the cross of the Lord be the conclusion, not my weakness. That is the truth. Truth has never changed.

Everyone who competes to win has their freedom restricted. Park Tae-hwan entrusted himself to the water in a narrow swimming pool wearing only swim trunks, and later became a gold medalist who enjoyed everything.

Everyone who competes to win practices self-control. To win, one must choose and focus. If you desire something but do not pray, and do not ask for prayer, I guarantee it will never be achieved. You must truly show with faith what you truly desire. When the Holy Spirit comes, you will practice self-control.

Prayers for selfish purposes cannot be sustained. It is shameful. However, some prayers pour out fervently like fire. It is a prayer made with a burning heart, receiving the Lord's heart from my spirit. Pray in the Spirit.
Show your faith at times like these. When will you ever receive a single shot for the Lord? These are but a few days in the year when you can give to the Lord.
If there are so many aching hearts, more must be given.
Stop the theoretical talk and live the Word - 2015 Feb 26.

For those who have already believed in Jesus and become church members, the cross is what they should hold onto, and the gospel is what they should believe. I believe in the gospel that saves all people, all things, and all generations. Whether to Greeks or Jews, Christians or unbelievers...
This retreat was of invaluable significance, memorable for a lifetime. Everything is because of Jesus. Hallelujah~
Please do not come to the "Fire Saturday" meeting just to eat. We would be grateful if each league prepared drinks and desserts~~ Those who can slice meat after the Friday service, please volunteer.

The prayer meeting is at 7:30 this week. This week will likely be the last prayer week. Although the prayer meetings will be suspended, I hope you will continue to be prayer warriors. Last week, the Lord allowed us to gather and pray almost every day for 12 weeks, helping us overcome trials and bringing much healing. Starting next week, cell circulation will begin, and the Sunday evening leader's meeting will likely focus on series rather than prayer meetings. e.g., Inner Healing version of "Acts Expansion," short-term mission projects, LTC, FDTS, Youth Alpha Course, etc.

Summary of this week's Quiet Time: 1 Peter - A summary for those who missed this week's Quiet Time. Please do your Quiet Time. Loren Cunningham also leads 12,000 full-time missionaries through his morning Quiet Time. God speaks through the Bible. 1 Peter is Peter's "Epistle of Suffering" and "Epistle of Hope and Promise" written to suffering Christians. 1 Peter 1 - Purpose of Suffering: To be praised and glorified so as not to be ashamed on that day. (1 Peter 1:7) so that the tested genuineness of your faith—more precious than gold that perishes though it is tested by fire—may be found to result in praise and glory and honor at the revelation of Jesus Christ. 1 Peter 2 - Model of Suffering: Follow the Lord, who is our leader. (1 Peter 2:21) For to this you have been called, because Christ also suffered for you, leaving you an example, so that you might follow in his steps. 1 Peter 3 - Blessing of Suffering: Suffering is not mere hardship. It is hidden blessing—maturity and grace. (1 Peter 3:14) But even if you should suffer for righteousness' sake, you will be blessed. Have no fear of them, nor be troubled, 1 Peter 4 - Meaning of Suffering: Stop drinking and living a chaotic life; live a godly life. (1 Peter 4:1) So, since Christ has suffered in the flesh, arm yourselves with the same way of thinking, for whoever has suffered in the flesh has ceased from sin. (1 Peter 4:2) so that you might no longer live for human passions but for the will of God during the rest of your earthly life. 1 Peter 5 - Reward of Suffering: It is an unfading crown, not a wilting cabbage leaf. Leaders and followers alike receive a crown through suffering. (1 Peter 5:4) And when the chief Shepherd appears, you will receive the unfading crown of glory.
Please come to the dedication service this week, and the Saturday meeting will proceed as usual. However, it would be good if we could have a meal together before the meeting. Or perhaps later.
I will be responsible for the grace from this Friday to Saturday. Entrust it to me.
There will be no prayer meeting this week due to the special morning prayer services. I will be going around to the cells.
Strangely, my brother's posts aren't showing up well on Facebook lately... Why is that...?
Recommendation for dating: Do not pray for 3 billion other men; pray for the one person destined for you.

The characteristic of a proud person in this world is self-reliance, and their response is fear. Therefore, the Lord says not to fear. Those who fear are proud people. - For Israel may boast against me, saying, 'My own hand has delivered me.' Now you shall say to them, 'Thus says the Lord, the God of Israel: I will bring upon you the inhabitants of Gilead, and you shall flee from them. And I will give them into your hand. And I will cut off the three commanders of the...]

The Israelites lived in the wilderness for 40 years with only one set of clothes and shoes. They were unsophisticated nomads who had never even set foot in a school. In contrast, the Canaanites were a more developed, centralized kingdom, a farming people with experience and skill. God tells us not to envy or be intimidated by any of these things. He also commanded us not to accept idols to learn them. (At that time, idol exchange was a prerequisite for trade and commerce.) Even without an army, they had Levites, and though they lacked powerful chariots and sophisticated temples, the Lord protected and prospered the people who had 'worship.' The world envies academic background, wealth, and honor, desiring success in all these areas. However, God's people hold onto one crucial thing. That one thing makes our weakness strong and our strength weak. That one thing is holding onto Jesus.

The safest place in Israel was the temple. But when the temple's light goes out and the Word disappears, it becomes the most dangerous place in the world. Christians are precious. But if they lose their savor, they become worse than unbelievers, the most dangerous, and will be trampled underfoot. A Christian must have the flavor of Jesus. Do not believe the lie, 'This is the temple of the Lord, the temple of the Lord, the temple of the Lord' (Jeremiah 7:4). Thanks be to God, who always leads us in triumphal procession in Christ and through us spreads the fragrance of the knowledge of him everywhere. For we are the aroma of Christ to God among those who are being saved and among those who are perishing. To one a fragrance from death to death, and to the other a fragrance from life to life. Who is sufficient for these things? (2 Corinthians 2:14-17)

Israel was not a nation protected by its army. It was a nation protected by faithful priests. Even if the people sinned and the king fell into corruption, as long as the priests' eyes were alive, the nation had hope. If my place of thanksgiving and a living sacrifice is offered, victory is already achieved.

How precious is the power of the blood? The hymns about the blood are so beautiful. But we shouldn't sing them meaninglessly and carelessly. When we sing them with deep confession, we become so thankful.
The reason is not that I am spiritual, but that Jesus took away my dirty sins.
Those who pursue profit cannot bear loss. Those who pursue honor cannot endure shame. Those who love the Lord and love Him with all their lives can bear anything.

I have erased the past from my memory. I don't even dream of having fully achieved it now. Even if believers hear about holiness, repentance, and judgment, but reinterpreting it according to their own standards, they still rationalize their sin and impurity and do not change, I will not be weary or disappointed. The Lord sees, the Lord hears, and the Lord knows me. Rather, I will become more humble and prostrate as the Lord desires, becoming holy like the Lord. Not that I have already obtained this or am already perfect, but I press on to make it my own, because Christ Jesus has made me his own. Brothers, I do not consider that I have made it my own. But one thing I do: forgetting what lies behind and straining forward to what lies ahead, I press on toward the goal for the prize of the upward call of God in Christ Jesus. - Philippians 3:12-14
We are now running towards the end. Please pray for the complete healing to be finished until the end.
Now cease speaking and come before the throne.
I just saw the message. I had a good birthday. Thank you for remembering me. Have a wonderful day today too ^^

The president of Egypt stepped down through an 18-day civil protest. However, 3,500 years ago in Egypt, the dictator Pharaoh fell when the Israelites ate lamb and applied its blood. What does my problem have to do with slaughtering a lamb? From the world's perspective, what does the Roman execution of Jesus 2,000 years ago have to do with my problems living in the 21st century? But that is God's method. Come to the altar and become a sacrifice and die. If you give up your rights, you will see God's glory.

Economy is better than Business, and Business is better than First Class. However, if the plane is crashing, the problem is not the class, but fundamentally flying on a plane that doesn't crash. Jesus never crashes.
Love that lacks understanding is violent love. We can love as much as we understand and know.
Familiar places seem safe, but they are the most dangerous. This is because we do not experience God there.

All human relationships combined—spouses, teachers and disciples, parents and children, friends who risk their lives—only metaphorically represent our relationship with God, and cannot fully express its oneness and perfection. This is because there is nothing comparable to God's love.
It is impossible for humans to abandon idols on their own. It requires holding onto the cross and obeying, and receiving the Holy Spirit and being refined.

Humans are corrupt and decaying beings. Moses and Paul were great people, but it is by God's grace that I am who I am. God is great. That is why no heroes emerge from the church. Excessive praise and encouragement are not appropriate. All praise belongs to the name of Jesus.

The most humans can do with their wisdom is to 'think rationally.' This is a phrase often used by stock analysts. The problem is that such rational conclusions are rarely realized. The plan prepared by the Lord will be fulfilled.

One of the most foolish things humans do is waste their short lives trying to acquire much. Yet, the more they do so, the more their lives become depleted. Only after regurgitating what they gathered to recover wasted health and relationships do they realize at an awkward time that they have reached the end of their lives. Therefore, Satan's strategy is not to stop them but to let them live moderately.

The 'righteousness' that humans possess is a relative, 'ragged righteousness.' It is ultimately determined by 'convenience' related to one's own benefit and subjectivity. It's not about truth, but about whether it helps me, which creates allies and enemies. When we take off our shoes before God and become His servants, we will be freed from 'self.'

From a human perspective, when we face Abraham's test, we hope to gain some evidence by glancing at the 'ram' caught in the thicket. If there were a more certain sign on the path I am walking, it would be much easier... However, the Lord does not reveal the ram's existence until the very last moment. If Abraham had known that the ram was prepared in advance, he could not have become a friend of God. Would I hide from Abraham what I am about to do? Genesis 8:17

Human help cannot establish God's kingdom. If we diligently work in the place the Lord has appointed, the Lord will receive glory and grant revival. Just as not all smiles are genuine smiles, not everything that looks good is good.
Guidance The Bible uses guidance and anointing together. For all who are led by the Spirit of God are sons of God. - Romans 8:14

If we perceive what stands directly before our lives as an obstacle, we will be discouraged. Rather than being an obstacle or a deficiency, it is the Lord's request to increase the intensity and level of prayer. How can a life enjoyed without prayer be the same as a life broken through with tears and fasting? If a family is more precious, the Lord will give more prayer requests, and if a gift is more precious, He will want us to pray more and receive it to serve.
Life and grace are real-time. After the Wednesday service.

There are always wars in life. But the most important true enemy is the war within us against impatience. Impatience makes us overly sensitive to reactions and situations, steals our peace, makes us make excuses for outcomes, and causes us to cross lines we shouldn't. King Saul, out of impatience, was sensitive to the Philistines, consistently made excuses to Samuel, and tried to achieve his own purposes by using worship.

There are days in life when things don't go according to my will. When that happens, it's okay to say, 'Today is a day when things don't go according to my will.' We live by faith, not by emotion. David also experienced discouragement in his heart, but he did not let himself live that way. Do not hide it; reveal and confess it. That is normal.
What is important in life is not the number of times, but the meaning.
Life is panic and tough. But it's okay. If the Lord gives peace, everything is okay.
Life never goes as calculated. It goes as entrusted and trusted.

Life must pass through the night to bloom. Betrayal, frustration, and failure's nights purify the soul by removing its poison. Though we desire continuous success, the Lord makes us pass through the night to prevent pride and wickedness. To see the morning, first remove the poison.

Life concludes in two ways: following the lusts of the flesh to death, or following the Spirit to life. I don't understand why this simple truth is made so complicated. Life is a choice. Natural man chooses according to the flesh. But when we pray, we choose by faith, and our destiny changes, for faith determines us to obtain a better reward.
Life is not easy. It doesn't end with one college entrance exam. Life is about intensely questioning and doing what you truly believe is meaningful without regret.
As we walk towards our purpose in life, there are things we gain and enjoy. However, we do not walk through life to gain and enjoy. May the Lord be your purpose.

Happiness and success in life do not come from visible possessions and comparisons. The unseen is eternal, and true happiness and success are determined by hidden roots. Those roots are the soul and the relationship with God.

Life is much shorter than we think. How we fill those short moments is a personal choice. If filled with misunderstanding and speculation, it will be a life of utter vanity. If filled with love and forgiveness, it will shine like the stars in heaven.
Life is not solved by a single test. The Lord opens my path and holds my feet.
If you view life in terms of rankings and speed, you will always be frustrated. However, if you accept it as direction and mission, it begins to make sense and be interpreted.
There are times in life when we have nothing fitting to say. At such times, there is a saying: "My only word forever is the blood of Jesus."

As we live life, we see things not going according to our will and twisting slightly. There is One behind the scenes adjusting them, and that is God. When we strive to go but cannot possess, strive to open but it does not open... at this time, if we die to ourselves and obey Him, we save many people.

To be trained enough to maintain faith even in the turbulent 20s and 30s, mere fun and fellowship are not enough. Such fun is abundant in the world, and even more so, so there is no reason to stay in church. That is the crisis of youth. Only those filled with Jesus to their veins and bones, whether young or mature, will not fall even if they walk through a dry land all day.
If the goal of life is human approval, it is a declining life. When your sole desire is to see the Lord's beauty, it becomes a truly glorious life.
When we encounter trials in life, the path of life becomes clear. May you become people of faith who choose the good side in that moment.

The beautiful and happy moments in life are when we have been faithful before the Lord. No matter how much fortune, abundance, and fulfillment of desires we had, if we acted wickedly before the Lord, we lived in constant anxiety and fear. Revival happens when we act faithfully and keep going. I hope you overcome the evil enemy who prevents faithfulness and continuation by ignoring him.

When we face difficulties in life, it feels like a waste of time. However, it is not a wasted place but a waiting place for the Lord. To those who wait for the Lord with patience, He will eventually show His way by accompanying them.
Faith is not believing in oneself or finding security in conditions.
The true winner in life is the one with a soft heart. With good specs but no God, you become Goliath. But though weak, if you rely on the Lord, you become David. May you become like David and win.
The focus of life should not stop at the problem. It should move beyond the problem and be concentrated on God, on Him.

Only at life's halftime did Abraham leave his relatively stable life and embark on a journey towards the "land to be shown," not the "land shown." The path of vision is certainly not easy. But a more sorrowful life is one where, fearing failure, we settle for an anxious reality and attempt nothing.

Life's voyage will not run aground and will reach its destination fully only if we navigate by light. Yet, among people, there are those who follow the lights of other moving ships. This is foolishness. Those lights pass away and cannot be a standard. We must cling only to Jesus, the lighthouse of truth, who always is and is eternal. If God is the standard, the power to overcome the world will be bestowed.
In life's difficult moments, the Lord opened the way. He made a human out of someone who couldn't function as a person. Such a Lord will continue to act before me.
People say life is just like that. Know this for sure: life is never like that. God does not let those with eyes of faith live only the routine path that others tread. May you rise high.
Life hurts because we choose wounds and are stingy with grace, having superhuman memory for wounds and amazing forgetfulness for grace. Life is something to be thankful for.
If you truly want life to change, you must design your life and change your priorities for using time. Without such a decision, you do not truly want life to change.
When life is mistaken, God sounds an alarm. It is His grace, not your strength, and that this kind does not go out without prayer.

When life is difficult and hardships pile up, look to the Lord. And earnestly pray that you may see this situation from the Lord's perspective. Pray that you may see this situation as the Lord sees me...
Even without artificial force, God's guidance alone is abundantly beautiful.
I hear that people express themselves through writing on the internet. More important than spelling is observing etiquette.

In normal situations, faith is not apparent. True faith appears when we rely on the Lord and gain strength in abnormal situations, in moments of crisis. "The people were so distressed that they were about to stone him; but David found strength in the Lord his God." - 1 Samuel 30:6

The question I asked earlier was... In England, the social system is structured such that it is not easy to establish a church, unlike in Korea... If we consider free will versus predestination... what is the stance of British Christians... Is predestination mainstream like Korean Christians... Given it's Wesley's homeland, it's likely leaning towards free will...
They say the early bird catches the worm. Then, someone always comes along saying the early worm gets eaten. The biggest problem lies in the identity of thinking you are the worm.

If forgotten, it is not love. Love is something you can never forget, no matter how hard you try. Things that are not truth and love are not remembered. You cannot grasp it until your time comes. If you don't remember, it's not love. Please remember the Lord.

It is foolish to acknowledge yourself. It must be a faith that the Lord acknowledges. That is a person who is perfectly in accordance with God's heart. The Lord accomplishes His will through such people.
If you humble yourself, people will forget you. Then God will find you.

If you do not love and forgive yourself, you cannot lead anyone. I must accept myself as God has accepted me. I hope you become a person of faith who sees the Lord's mercy as greater than your own shortcomings.

Those who practice self-control and humility are stable and do not feel anxious or worried. A sober person is a wise person who knows what to focus on and what to control, so they do not fear. Reverence for God is sobriety, and knowing Him is wisdom.

Only when you do not rely on yourself can you seek grace. God looks for such people. Without grace, you must become someone who crumbles. The Lord is near to all who call on Him, to all who call on Him in truth. (Psalm 145:18)
Prepare yourselves. The Lord will work among us.

Those who stand up relying on their own cleverness fall by their own cleverness. However, those who humbly confess their weaknesses are shown mercy and are granted the Word and His presence. Intimacy is power, so win through intimacy.

Prayers for one's own desires and glory are difficult to sustain and hard to receive answers. Prayers for His kingdom and His righteousness are a joy to God, so He gives strength to pray and answers. This is an era that needs prayers for God's reign to be established where we stand, prayers for His kingdom and righteousness, prayers for our nation and people, and intercessory prayers for others.
Do not believe your psychological state, but believe the conclusion God has given through the cross. You win by believing and accepting that victory.

People who lament their circumstances, frustrated that their appearance is not a jewel, say, "Others are doing well (comparison), why am I not succeeding?" It is not by undergoing plastic surgery to look like a jewel or upgrading your specs that life turns around. You just need to become a true clay vessel and focus on the Lord, who is the precious treasure. I have never been forced to be a jewel, nor can I become one. Only Jesus is the jewel. The secret to overcoming despair and pride at the same time is knowing that truth. I am a clay vessel, the Lord is the jewel. 2 Corinthians 4:7 But we have this treasure in jars of clay to show that this all-surpassing power is from God and not from us.
To say you will love by your own strength is arrogance and delusion. How absurd is the idea of a branch leaving the vine and living independently?
You think you can't do it because you are insufficient. That is immensely limiting the Almighty God. The Lord is listening now and seeking you. He intends to guide you.

Greed lies in what makes you uncomfortable. A dog does not get angry or jealous when it holds two bones. This is because the level of a dog and a human is different. However, God said He loves sinful humans to the point of jealousy. It's nonsensical. That's why God's love was immeasurable by human language from the beginning.
When you feel insignificant, look to God as your maker. God doesn't make junk.

People with low self-esteem rejoice when things go well and become depressed when they don't. Because they cannot be happy in their being, they try to fill their satisfaction with numbers. Our identity is in Jesus.
Falling often is proof that you are relying on your own strength. If you relied on the Lord, you would not fall. This is because Jesus, whom I believe in and rely on, never falls.
Faith is moving forward without regard.

Small decisions change the course of life. Therefore, choices determine destiny. Making a decision that you would not make without the Lord, rather than a decision your flesh desires, is 'faith'. A decision of faith is on the good side that the Almighty Lord thinks. Therefore, through that choice, your life becomes one that glorifies God.
There will be small challenges, but also great trials. However, the principle for overcoming them is the same. It is to act in faith. Through Jesus, shame and tribulation become insignificant.
Instead of scheming or lamenting, I hope you ask in faith and be bold. Whether it is scheming or faith can be inferred from the degree of 'impatience'.
How are you? Just stopping by... Have a happy day today. ^^

There is much to see if you pause for a moment. If you step back, things you couldn't see become visible. That's why consideration is possible. And you can shed tears and pat someone on the back with the same heart. It is love for that soul, not the love I want, so it embraces and restores. That is selfless love. Not forced...
Proverbs 12:18 Reckless words pierce like swords, but the tongue of the wise brings healing.

The problem is that Jesus is not in the heart, and the more serious problem is mistaking that He is there when He is not. People bring forth good from what they have stored up, and evil from what they have stored up. If Jesus is present, suffering and joy will be exchanged, and you will act like Abraham. It is obedience and faith.
There is something more important than having talent, ability, or academic background, and that is faith. Look at Jabez. He had nothing, but he believed in the Lord's help.
Only when all my strength and ability are broken does the Lord accomplish His work.

I am a minister. I tend to be quite zealous. However, our young people, though they may struggle without me, will not be unable to live. This is because God is with them. For the righteous live by 'faith' alone.
I am confident that the Lord will grant much grace at this retreat. This is because I see the members serving with a spirit of humility, to the point of sacrificing themselves.
If you want to be happy, at least, the most important thing is to look in the same direction. The same truth, the same Lord, Jesus Christ.

Through the precious blood shed by His Son Jesus, who was in the perfect love of God the Almighty Father, He showed His greatest love. Through the power of the precious blood, the power of sin is shattered, all trials are overcome, and we are not deceived by the enemy's lies. The power of the precious blood is the greatest victory and power, both from God's side and for humanity.
I believe in God the Almighty and in His only begotten Son Jesus Christ. I believe in the Holy Spirit, the forgiveness of sins, and the life everlasting.

Professional traders analyze, calculate, and compare extensively because they want to avoid financial risk. Therefore, humans, who are inherently sinful, instinctively analyze, calculate, and compare to avoid fear, and then fall into despair. These human defense mechanisms are not easily abandoned. They are abandoned only when a better value is discovered. But I consider everything else a loss compared to the priceless gain of knowing Christ Jesus my Lord. For his sake I have discarded everything, and consider it rubbish, in order to gain Christ and be found in him, not having a righteousness of my own, based on the law, but that which is through faith in Christ, the righteousness from God that depends on faith. - Philippians 3:7,8,9

When we trust the Lord with all our heart, the Lord works. Seeking the Lord with all our heart does not require any qualifications, grades, or reputation. We seek because we are lacking, because we are not fundamentally sound. When we deeply feel our shortcomings, the Lord's work begins.
Revelation that came in despair: Christ alone.

Even if the hearts of the young are broken, they pray, and even if it seems like the sun won't rise tomorrow, they run. Living by Jesus, not by circumstances, is what Hebrews calls a person of faith that the world cannot overcome.
To know someone, you can look at the people they love. In disciples who prayed together and shared the Word, there are undoubtedly undeniable traces of a life where they have made disciples.
The answer is, of course, "Jesus Christ."

It is wisdom to discard what is perishable in order to hold onto what is truly precious. Faith is looking only to the Lord and holding fast to the path given to me, regardless of reactions and circumstances. It is loving Jesus. Then you will be free from all trials.

When you earnestly desire something, you are moved to achieve and obtain it. Not praying earnestly for what you desire means you don't truly want it. Consider what you want now, and what you want to see.

No one would think it a waste of time to make reservations, research good restaurants, and prepare to spend sweet time with someone they truly love. The most valuable thing in the world is prayer. The world's people do not understand it at all, nor can they. This is because it is a statement that presupposes the Lord's living existence.

The truly amazing thing is that when I let go of my pride and admit what I don't want to admit, my shortcomings and failures, the work of the Almighty Father begins. This is why, under the precious blood, even failures become hope for Christians.

Do you truly believe in Jesus? Then the crisis in its true sense has already been overcome. It is the Lord's work, not tomorrow's. We will be faithful and diligent stewards, but all responsibility and resolution belong to the Owner, the Lord.
Do you truly believe in God the Almighty? I believe in that God. And I believe He will work.

Truly, the vast majority of young people have been transformed. This is a miracle and God's compelling grace. Even after returning to Korea, their resolve to obey at all costs does not waver, and they continue to exert a positive influence. Therefore, they will never give up those high standards. The standard is the core. So, when other standards praise the youth, I challenge them. Abandon idols and offer your lives.

If you truly want to have good faith, you must abandon expectations. You must cast away any hope of being recognized or remembered and run for the Lord. This is the way to absolute faith and infinite loyalty.

When it is so hard that you feel like you're going to die, when just moments ago you couldn't breathe and were on the brink of death, the reason you can cry out "One more time~" is because you believe in the Lord and live for the Lord. Everything is reset before the Lord.

I hope you have the faith to make the decisive choice to skip less important things in order to say truly important words. Jesus had many things to rebuke the Jews about, but He said more important things. "I have many things to say and to judge about you, but the one who sent me is true, and I declare to the world what I have heard from him." (John 8:26)

In all my years of working for the Lord, there has been almost nothing that succeeded because I did it well. God uses our weaknesses to His advantage with His power. I hope you experience the power of becoming stronger in weakness.
The most frustrating thing is when you can't go crazy because of Jesus. A person of faith has nothing to fear, but should fear the absence of Jesus.
Please leave some really good and impactful writings that can be helpful for the month, my dear and respected missionary. Kekekekeke.
To be moved by loving the Lord unconditionally, to be captivated by His beauty, that is faith.

If you confuse conditions and results, you won't find the answer. Solutions, fruits, phenomena, and victories are results, not conditions. The condition and the cause are Jesus. There must be a cause for a result. A result without a cause is hypocrisy.
Please come a little early. It seems like there won't be enough seats.
Not being impatient is faith. When you decide, "If I die, I die; if I lose, I lose," all conditions disappear, and only the Lord becomes your reliance. That is faith.
A person of faith doesn't live extraordinarily; they simply have a clear purpose.

Being able to respect those who deserve respect is a gift. Not everyone can do it, nor is it granted to everyone. Recognizing those whom God has sent is a great spiritual insight. Be a blessed person. Please...
To be more precise, Peter doubted but did not sink. He was caught by Jesus when he began to sink. Though we are lacking, when we approach Jesus, the Lord holds us.

Liking is easy. But loving is difficult. A cat likes mice because mice have what is beneficial to it. But for the mouse, that is not happiness. We are grateful for the weakness of the one we love. It is fortunate that they are as imperfect as I am. Because they have what I lack, I can enter that emptiness and become a part of them, and because I have what they lack, they can enter me and become a part of me.

Behind good leaders are good followers. Good followers eventually become good leaders. Everything you did as a follower will be returned to you doubled and multiplied when you become a leader. Obedience to a leader does not end with obedience. It bears fruit as obedience to the unseen God. A life of disobedience simply becomes mixed.

It is very difficult to distinguish between what is good and what looks good. However, there is a fundamental difference, and that is whether you pay the price. Faith that looks good and good faith can be known through paying the price.
Have good faith.
There is absolutely no need to pretend to be a good person. This is because you are good and beautiful enough in the Lord's sight.
Good question Q. When the heart and mind differ, which comes first, the heart or the mind? A. Faith comes first.

It is very difficult to abandon sin. This is because sin has a power that transcends human will. However, if you truly believe in Jesus, it becomes difficult to sin. This is because when you truly love Jesus, what cannot be broken is broken. If you love Jesus, other things can be discarded like dung. "But whatever was to my profit I now consider loss for the sake of Christ. What is more, I consider everything a loss compared to the surpassing greatness of knowing Christ Jesus my Lord, for whose sake I have lost all things. I consider them rubbish, that I may gain Christ and be found in him, not having a righteousness of my own that comes from the law, but that which is through faith in Christ—the righteousness that comes from God on the basis of faith." - Philippians 3:7-9

The secret to overcoming sin and the wicked world is to fear the Lord. If you always seek the Lord with all your heart and rely on His precious blood, your life will transform from falling to singing and testifying.

* Reasons why you should not be disappointed in yourself: The reason I am who I am is by the grace of God. Disappointing myself and living with a mask is disrespecting the God who created me. If I am God's reason, there is no need to live differently or seek attention in a different way. When I live as my true self, it is the most beautiful life, in line with God's intention. If someone dislikes that aspect of me, I don't need to dwell on it. It is greedy to expect all relationships to be perfect. A person who loves your core is more precious than someone who simply likes you. ^^ "By the grace of God I am what I am" - 1 Corinthians 15:10 Though the whole world forsake me, Jesus will not forsake me. He looks after me until the end. - Hymn 88
The reason we can be bold in the face of sin's challenges is knowing and believing that the Lord holds us. The Lord never lets us go. The cross overcomes sin.

No one is free from the temptation of sin. Therefore, we must rely on the Lord's precious blood. There is no sin that the precious blood cannot wash away, and there is no sin that can be washed away except by the precious blood.

When the temptation of sin is strong, do not grit your teeth and endure. Instead, pray like this: "Lord, let me remain under Your grace. I am about to fall. By Your cross, to the throne of grace, let me go now."
The only reason I can stand is His boundless mercy.
Live by faith. Act to the extent He has permitted and in the way He desires.
The Lord's precious blood has power. There is nothing more to say. No other name has been given to mankind by which we must be saved.
God does not turn away those who flee to Him.

Three functions of confession: 1. It allows us to see who God is. 2. It allows us to see who we are through the Lord's eyes. 3. Knowing God and looking at ourselves enables us to bind all afflictions and enemies and achieve victory. Confess moment by moment that you believe in the Lord, love Him, and are loved by Him. That will be your strength and power. When the enemy touches your wounds, confessing them becomes an opportunity to draw closer to the Lord. Hallelujah!
The Lord will speak through His Word. The time will come when you hear His voice, and when you hear that voice, you will come alive.

The love the Lord pours out is so great that no falsehood or deception can block it, and no affliction or hardship can oppose it. Nothing is as strong and eternal as love, and because of it, we can run without stopping and without regret. I love You.
If you entrust yourself to the Lord's hands and trust Him, you don't need to use tricks. The Lord's hands will hold you. He is the reason.

The evidence of being in the Lord is not being anxious or rushed. If I try to control the situation, I will be anxious, but when I entrust it to the Lord, I will not only have peace but also make the best decisions and His will will be done.

Paul throws away the position of a praised rabbi like trash. This is because he saw the real thing on the road to Damascus. Faith is not about not going; it's about being unable to go. This is because you have never seen the truth that captivates you.

"Once saved in the Lord means past, present, and future sins are forgiven" does not mean you have obtained a license to sin freely. It means that because we are under grace, not the law, sin can no longer dominate us. - Romans 6:14

In the Lord, sad things do not end sadly, and fearful things do not end fearfully. Life makes us arrogant when things are favorable and despair when they are unfavorable, but people of faith trust only in the Lord who knows and vindicates them in any situation. "With the Lord on my side I will not fear; what can mortals do to me? With the Lord on my side I am a helper." - Hebrews 13:6
Those who humbly bow before the Lord will experience Him personally governing problems that human words cannot express. All problems melt away before the Lord's sovereignty.
Expecting any other good without kneeling before the Lord is a deception.

When we stand before the Lord with infinite inadequacy, the Lord gives us mission and new strength. We should not be people who hide our true selves. Whether it turns out well or poorly, when we stand before the Lord in our true selves, even if it is confessed with sighs from our lips, we go forward believing that the Lord will act.

If we faithfully do the small things before the Lord, He will do great things on His part. The two loaves and five fish are insignificant, but when placed in the Lord's hands, they feed 5,000 people and bring forth life. Sow them in good ground with faith.
Paradise without the Lord becomes more horrific than original hell.
Conversations without the Lord are meaningless. Until the Lord intervenes, life is like a business on hold with no solution.
Zeal without the Lord is worse than laziness. The core is more important than zeal. Blessed is the life where the Lord is the core.
The Lord's work is not done by those who are supported by everyone or by perfect people. It is done by those who have received grace and forgiveness.
Grant us, Lord God, Your love and revival. What I desire is not evaluation, but to love and gain life in the Lord.
To be satisfied with the Lord alone is a confession that comes after paying a great price. It is never a cosmetic to hide my greed.

A deep illness of 12 years was healed simply by touching the Lord's garment. No matter how deep the sighs and pain, from the Lord's perspective, it is merely a matter of faith. Confess and declare your faith. "If I only touch his clothes, I will be healed." - Mark 5:25
To walk with the Lord, two things must be presupposed: 1. Faith, and 2. Holiness. - Joshua 1:8

To pray to the Lord is to simultaneously believe that He will surely hear and answer, and to be thankful even if He does not. "Be pleased, O LORD, to deliver me! O LORD, make haste to help me! Surely he will deliver me from the hand of the king. And though the lions roar, and the young lions growl at me, yet the LORD will not be angry with me."
Blessed is the life that cannot advance a single step without giving its heart to the Lord, and without His grace.

Let us fix our eyes on Jesus, the pioneer and perfecter of faith. - Hebrews 12:2 Not constantly looking to Jesus is already sin and a wound to the heart. Therefore, Jesus is not an event. We must always cultivate our hearts with the true Word.

You just need to walk by faith on the path the Lord has declared right. Even if it's like hitting a rock with an egg, do it with faith. Your life should not be staked on probability, but on living by the Word.
For the perfect promises given by the Lord to manifest not only in our afterlife but also in our present reality, we need faith and absolute obedience to His Word.

When you only look to the Lord, you will feel that you have no room to be conscious of other things. David sinned when he had plenty of leisure and took a nap. The gaps in time must be filled with the most precious things.

One who fears only the Lord has nothing to boast about or show off. Having nothing to boast about or show off, they do not cling to things. Not clinging to things, they do not become attached to positions. Not being attached, they do not carelessly abandon their responsibilities.

You must look only to the Lord. You must love the Lord. You must praise only the Lord with your whole heart. If you look to people, love people more, and are more conscious of people, woe to you. 1 Corinthians 16:22 KJV If anyone does not love the Lord, let him be accursed. The Lord is coming.
Please pray that the Lord alone may become my hope. It is something so obvious, yet it only becomes clear in desperation.
If you cannot be happy in the Lord, nothing else has any meaning. Please find your answer in the Lord.

The Lord desires us to give thanks. Not only for what He has done for me, but also for what has not yet been accomplished. Therefore, thanksgiving is done by faith. Jesus gave thanks to His Heavenly Father before the miracle of the five loaves and two fish occurred.
The Lord is salvation.

The Lord said not to be troubled. "Do not let your hearts be troubled." This is what He said to the disciples who followed Him for three and a half years and lived in complete dependence, as He was about to depart. As a basis for escaping trouble, the Lord says, "You believe in God; believe also in me." This means faith. Do not look for it from afar; believe. Then you will be free from trouble. John 14:1
The Lord was with the lowly. Please think of those with broken hearts. There you will find the Lord who cherishes the marginalized.
When causeless anxiety sometimes arises, there is something you must do. It is to hold onto Jesus, who is the most certain cause. Faith is a life that precedes feelings.

The Lord commands us to pray for souls and to serve humbly. Even if no one wants to, it's not something you can do just by wanting to. It is something that happens when the Lord grants grace and mercy.
The Lord was almighty, yet He offered His body out of love. If you do not know that fact, you will act carelessly.
The Lord is a good Lord. Believe that the Lord fights for you. Whether the suffering is chosen by you or caused by others, the Lord does not turn away from us.
The Lord is touching your wounded heart through His Word and the Holy Spirit right now.
The Lord has never taken His eyes off me for a single moment. Even when I was an unbeliever, His eyes were upon me.
What happens if you do not expect the Lord and believe in His work? Answer) You will never be heard. You will become barren.

Become a follower of the Lord. Follow even when you are afraid, follow even when it is difficult. Even if your opinions differ, if the Lord goes, you let go and follow without a second word. That is what a Christian is. The Lord works.
Faith in the Lord conquers all things. It even conquers death. Be courageous. The Lord has conquered.
You couldn't do it without me, I wouldn't do it without you. You are so special to me. Cheer up.
To give up something in order to hold onto the Lord is the greatest investment.

If you have fully loved the Lord and truly walked in that love, there is nothing more to fear. This is because you have done what God commanded, regardless of the outcome. What the Lord desires is not success, but obedience.
I have trusted in the Lord and preached the gospel with all my heart. I had the opportunity to watch and share the Bridge video. I entrust myself to the Lord.

The characteristic of one who trusts in the Lord is silence. Those who trust in God's intervention do not easily get excited or act on emotion. I am like one who cannot hear; my mouth has no reply, O Lord, I waited for you, and my God will answer me. Psalm 38:14,15
I have no choice but to trust in the Lord. That is why I pray.

It is truly foolish to argue about the cause of a problem. This is because more important than the superficial cause of the problem is my response to it, which is faith. The Lord wants to see my faith when the storm arises. Where is your faith? -Mark 4:40

Those who do not see the Lord's love also fail to see their own sin. It is only in the light of that love that I realize my sin is not an accidental misstep of the past, but inherent in my fundamental attitude of 'self-love.' That is why, when Jesus brought me to God's heart, I put my hand to my lips and lamented, "Woe is me! I am ruined! For I am a man of unclean lips..." -Isaiah 6:5
I see the greatest strength in those who say they have nothing to hope for outside of the Lord's love. Beyond strength, I feel a longing that is almost enviable. This is faith. It is all there is.
Before the Lord's cross, all problems are small. Rise up and hold onto the cross.

To seek the Lord's glory means to have an unyielding faith. Even if you seek the Lord's glory, situations you cannot avoid and things you desperately want to escape may still come upon you. Nevertheless, to continuously seek only the Lord's glory without significant alteration, and to be able to rejoice, "Glory to the Lord, even if I die here," is faith.

The most basic way to hear the Lord's voice is to have an attitude of obedience to whatever word is spoken. The Lord will never reveal His will to those who listen only to what they like and discard the rest.
Obey the Lord's guidance with courage. You will not die. Rather, you will experience the Lord's work.
Trust in the Lord's omnipotence and wait patiently. Humans always worsen situations due to fear. Yet, God's love and grace, which turn those circumstances around, are truly astonishing.
The greatest obstacle to trusting and relying on the Lord's omnipotence is not Satan, but my own self-effort. Believing in the Lord begins with acknowledging my powerlessness.

There are two ways to respond in faith: one is obedience. It is not innate; even Jesus learned obedience through suffering. The second is trust. Trust without obedience is fanaticism, and obedience without trust is blind faith.
The Lord gives something to the discouraged person through His mercy: an opportunity.

When the Lord has compassion, even death loses its power and retreats in shame. -Luke 7 When the Lord has compassion, my prayers are heard and faithfully answered. For the Lord to have compassion means His heart went out to you (Luke 7:13), meaning the Lord's heart is fixed on you. Luke 7:13 If you ask for mercy, the Lord truly shows mercy.
If the Lord had not given us life, we could not even lift a little finger on our own. Within the Lord, nothing is difficult or easy. It is simply the work of Jesus living within us.
If it were not for the Lord, I would not have come this far. The Lord is my reason.
Please resolve to be sober and humble until the Lord works. That is the surest and fastest way.

Even if you say the Lord is everything, the Lord is never deceived. If words were enough, who couldn't say it? Those for whom the Lord is everything are not disappointed by evaluations, because the Lord is everything.
One of the comforts the Lord gives is that He uses us. Through our 부족함 (lack/imperfection), He glorifies His gospel and draws the attention of unbelievers to our small lips. It is truly astonishing.
If the Lord does not give it, we have received nothing. Do not be concerned with many factors; I hope you find peace in the Lord. The Lord will never abandon us.
People who refuse to accept what the Lord has done, who rely on their emotions instead of accepting truth as truth, suffer greatly.

Believe and accept that what the Lord has granted is the best, and that within what you have received, there is not only your portion but also a share that must be given. Though our lives may be like the small loaves and fish, when offered into the Lord's hands, they can save many.
* Performance or Promise? "Truly I tell you, this poor widow has put in more than all the others." Faith is not Performance, but Promise.

* Faith Faith is believing 'just because' in a situation that is utterly impossible to comprehend. When my calculations yield no answer, the Lord has already reached a conclusion. The contradiction of being told to offer Isaac, through whom descendants would be established, as a burnt offering is a contradiction within my ability and logic, but only He holds the answer. Abraham offered Isaac in faith when he was tested, because he was a recipient of the promise, and the one through whom descendants would be named. He considered that God was able to raise him from the dead, and figuratively received him back from death. - Hebrews 11:17, 19

The sorcerer Balaam's curse did not prevail against Israel because God's chosen people are beyond the enemy's range. Do not be intimidated by attacks; draw near to the Lord. Then you will naturally be outside the enemy's attack range. The law that supersedes the world's range is God's dominion. We are in His hands.
Do not lament over options you have not been given; do your best with what you have been given now. That is fullness.
He who is in me is greater than he who is in the world.
Lord, I have come with empty hands and will return with empty hands. Though I may possess nothing, Jesus is in my heart. Thank you, Lord.

Sunday Leader Meeting: 1 Corinthians 12, Gifts are given for edification. Gifts do not bring praise. Bear fruit through gifts. Prophecy is the Word (sermon). You can prophesy (give advice) one by one in order to gain instruction. Gifts are given to those who earnestly desire them. Without love as the motive, they are useless. QT approx. 2:14~ Salvation is by faith alone. The works in James are a mature state of faith. The words "faith" and "obedience" are synonymous. Faith is expressed through words and actions. If your words and actions differ, what will you believe? James found Rahab's righteousness in her actions. The author of Hebrews finds Rahab's righteousness in faith in chapter 11. They express the same thing differently. This is because true faith results in obedience. If you confess true faith with your words but act disobediently, it is false faith.

If I had died, I would have lived and others would have been changed. But as they say, it is not easy. Dying is power. It is the power of faith. Because without faith that the Lord is the resurrected Lord, we want to live, not die.
At the moment of death, only 'relationship with God' remains. That is called 'righteousness'. It means faith.

Blessed are those who are prepared when it is time to be prepared. The reason God cannot pour out His blessings is because we are not prepared. We must pray to be prepared. That is holiness and purity.
Give the best love you can. That is the level of love the Lord has entrusted to me. If I love without regret, the Lord will pour His love into me. Then I will be satisfied.

The way to escape addiction, lethargy, and anger is to be satisfied with the Lord alone. The Lord said that the woman who poured out the perfume had her many sins forgiven, so she expressed much love. Kneel and repent humbly so that many sins may be forgiven. You will become a person who loves the Lord.
The Lord, who sees the heart, is not deceived. The Father cuts me down because He is good. The Father's character is the highest good. Therefore, what He does to me is the highest good.
If complaints arise that there is nothing to rejoice about, look at Habakkuk. Even though no harvest or profit was visible, he rejoiced in Jehovah alone.
The title "Former General Assembly Moderator" clearly means that one is not the current General Assembly Moderator. In conclusion, it means it has no particular significance.
We are eating kimchi stew (half meat, half kimchi) at church now. Friends who can, please come.
Ultimately, it is the Lord's grace, not human favor.

Decide your future now. Time will pass anyway, and if your goal is clear, please make a conclusion about your future at this moment. It is decided by breaking down your current state, which you are merely trying to maintain, and seeing the Lord more. Please make a decision.
Earnestly ask for the Lord's mercy to come upon you at this very moment. The mercy that the Lord gives and bestows is the only power and an undeniable, life-saving work.
What is needed at this moment is to confirm the Lord's love. Then He will touch the unseen wounds. Stand upright truthfully.
Is the place important now? - Shin Bora says (from "Discoveries in Life"). "Is the situation important now?" - Attitude says. The Lord looks at the attitude, not the size of the problem.

I have preached the gospel thousands of times over decades. Yet, when I think about it, I am preaching the same content. 1. Rely on the precious blood. 2. Look only to the Lord. 3. Ask for the Holy Spirit. In the end, the conclusion is the cross.

If you have lived by God's grace until now, you must continue to rely on the Lord's grace. A life that quickly leaves the Lord when it becomes comfortable is truly like "spilling porridge to a dog." If you are going to believe, believe well. There is only one God, but there are genuine and counterfeit faiths.

Even now, the education of the Israelites involves repeatedly teaching the basics. They memorize it beyond repetition. An elementary school student in Israel who cannot memorize the Pentateuch is quite a problem child. That is why the most frequent word in Deuteronomy is "remember." It is not surprising that the grace of God, which seemed unforgettable for thousands of years, disappears within a month of returning to Korea from England. Remember it well. That is why it is repeated.

Have you recently made an unfavorable choice for the Lord? Faith does not follow 'self' but 'righteousness'. Therefore, it is sometimes 'unfavorable'. Blessed are those who are persecuted for righteousness' sake.
I bless our friends with faith. I believe I have such a blessing. Because God loves us and young people need it. He pours it out when needed.

Wisdom is a heart that hears and discerns the Lord's voice. Therefore, the person who has received the Lord's heart is the wisest person. The perspective of God looking at this situation is wisdom. "The fear of the Lord is the beginning of wisdom, and the knowledge of the Holy One is understanding." - Proverbs 9:10

Victory in the workplace and school is not easy. Especially when your boss or professor seems to hold your life and death in their hands. No matter how big people and problems seem, you must acknowledge that God is almighty. Then the issue becomes mere dust.

Truth is sufficient to stand on its own. Any attempt to co-opt worldly values or worldly energy is evil. The Lord has given us sufficient gospel, sufficient Jesus. If you have been zealous for anything other than truth, repent and let us live sufficiently with Jesus alone.
"You will know the truth, and the truth will set you free." - John 8:32
True love covers all faults and devastates all the schemes of darkness.

Without sincerity, one cannot speak what one knows, nor can one step forward even with ability. Always living with others in mind, we miss the parts we should live for ourselves and live the lives of others. Therefore, we always delve into "What do others think of me?" It is not because we cannot act due to lack of ability or circumstances, but because of a lack of sincerity. A humble truth is better than a flashy lie. This is why the tax collector was declared more righteous than the Pharisees. Luke 18:11-14
A true Christian will know that holiness like the Lord's is happier than 'one's own happiness'. Faith is not complicated. Whom do you love more?
If our language had no word for 'love', we would have to use a simile like this: "I truly think of you with the heart of Jesus."
True faith is an unyielding prayer that does not fade or cool down even after decades of weathering. If you have prayed, believe as you have prayed. It will happen.

True worship is to keep only the glorious Lord in your heart, regardless of your emotional state or surrounding circumstances. Become a worshiper through adoration. It is the way to fulfill the purpose of life and the secret to overcoming difficulties. "By faith Jacob, when he was dying, blessed each of Joseph’s sons and bowed in worship as he leaned on the top of his staff." - Hebrews 11:21
True courage comes not from character, but from commitment to truth.
A serious confession of love can become a joke to someone. as below.., Phil Kyung-Pil Park chatting Today

Everyone envies walking the red carpet and photo zones rather than a muddy road. However, the Lord told us not to take the easy, recognized path. Instead, He told us to take the uncomfortable and narrow path. You will feel that the number of people seeking that path is significantly small. What is more important than the quality of the path is who is at the end of that path.
While organizing the house, old relics Willy Wonka & CHOCOLATE FACTORY Humans express their desires as heaven.
Making a mess of the house and cheering
Faith is a battle of response. It is actively responding to God's word, not to circumstances and emotions.
If you cling, you will lose, and if you let go, you will receive abundantly. It's a very simple truth. It took Jacob 125 years to live by this truth.
Jjajangbap,쟁반국수, fruit, and green pastures, still waters
It is a great relief. For the Lord alone is my strength and my shield. Though it is a fierce battlefield, I feel warmth and peace in the Lord's presence.

When talking about first love, there are many hopes. However, the person you end up loving is someone far from those hopes. Because love is about overcoming the conditions you dislike. You come to love even weaknesses and flaws.

When I first evangelize, I say this: Believe in Jesus! To those who have fought the good fight of faith and finished their race, I say this: Believe in Jesus. Looking to Jesus is the beginning and completion of faith. Let us look to Jesus, the founder and perfecter of our faith.
Grace comes to barren places, and the brokenhearted are restored, meaning there was someone faithful. God finds faithful people and bestows power upon them.
Heaven and hell... Proclaim to all who do not know the Lord, right now... Please.

The kingdom of heaven is like this: selling all that one has to buy a field with a hidden treasure. People say it's crazy, but it's not crazy; they've seen a higher value. The reason the treasure buried in the field (Jesus) is not visible is due to the fun and greed of another world.

There is the taste of heaven, the joy of heaven, and the fun of heaven. Therefore, we must become those who covet heaven, that is, those who strive for it. If you get a taste of worldly fun, you will lose the fun of heaven. Those who believe in Jesus go to heaven. Therefore, there is fun and taste in believing in Jesus.

Heavenly reward, church revival. There are many important things, but the most precious longing among them is 'to know Jesus.' Many methods abound for how to long for God, but the most important thing is simply that you 'must long.'

* The only way to holiness. It is impossible for humans to become holy. Therefore, the holy Lord came to us, and only by abiding in Him can we become holy. The way to see Him is for His word to dwell in us. Sanctify them by the truth; your word is truth. John 17:17
Youth Group Sunday Meeting - You can love as much as you interpret. The secret behind the Mona Lisa at the Louvre Museum.
Every day I face my limitations. Each time, there is a word from God. It is 'Look only to the Lord.' Not looking to the Lord is high treason.
You must hold onto faith every moment. Because you fall into temptation the moment you lose faith, even for a moment.

There are two people who can be jealous of David. King Saul, who is currently on the throne, and Jonathan, the next heir. Jonathan is not jealous. Because he loved him. Jealousy destroys both me and the other person, but love saves everyone happily. When David finished speaking to Saul, Jonathan's soul was knit with David's soul, and Jonathan loved him as his own soul. - 1 Samuel 18:1
My heart is not troubled for no reason. It is because the Lord has something to teach me.

No matter how much the ball moves around in soccer, it eventually goes into the goal. If you live as if nothing happened without going through forgiveness, you cannot grow or advance. Running for 10 years and staying in the same place is a disaster. If you forgive, even if you are lacking, it will be truly beautiful in a few days.
I really like the 'burst mode' function on cameras. The fact that you can capture multiple shots while holding down the button for the person you love...
Do not be troubled by the evaluation and reactions of people who do not know you well, but be happy because of the One who made, knows, and calls you. Faith is a battle of sight and focus.

The approach changes when the subject changes. Let us look to Jesus, the founder and perfecter of our faith. For the joy set before him he endured the cross, scorning its shame, and sat down at the right hand of God. - Hebrews 12:2 -> Elementary school internet version Let's look to Jesus, the ultimate boss and final boss of faith. He despised the cross for the great reward before him, ignored the shame, and became the king at God's right hand.
There are no crises for Christians. There are only opportunities. Opportunities to focus on the Lord...
Christians do not need to pretend to be strong. If you are found in the Lord, you will naturally become strong.
Christians do not avoid culture, art, or business. Instead, they conquer them with faith.
Christians must analyze and calculate thoroughly. However, they do not remain within those limits. Faith is about overcoming what is impossible by conditions.

Christians work with 'identity'. It is not the 'me' I think of, but the 'me' who died to the old self and was resurrected through the cross. In the Lord, 'I' will never crumble under any challenge or external pressure. I hope you believe this and lift your heads.
Christians are not ambiguous beings. My only message, forever, is the blood of Jesus.
If someone were to peek at a Christian when they are alone, they would surely find them praying. Please continue to pray that the precious blood of the Lord may cover your heart, mind, and soul.

Among the abilities Christians possess, the extraordinary one is the ability to 'interpret'. When you interpret situations and life from God's perspective, it doesn't end with evaluation; instead, you receive back a miraculous life. I hope you gain the eyes of the Lord.

When my eldest child was about to crawl, they were fixated on the toilet bowl. It must have seemed appealing to them at the time. Their mother disliked it, scolded them, and even spanked them, but it was no use, and they became more cunning each day. However, now that they are a grown young woman, this no longer happens. This is because their values have changed. My change means that the object to which I assign value has changed. A change in affection is a change in life.
Please stop calculating and believe in the Lord. If you follow the flesh, you live by probability; if you follow faith, you see glory.
The greatest and most beautiful miracle is transformation. Only the Lord can do this.

The height of the waves and the depth of the trials are not important; what is important is overcoming them by faith. The victory that overcomes the world is not success or achievement, but our faith. No one who believes that Jesus is the Christ has overcome the world, and only faith overcomes all things. Faith alone.

Peace is not a situation, but a power. Only those with authority can be at peace. True authority comes from the faith of believing and trusting in the Lord. Conversely, fearing is a strong testament to God's absence. I hope you become servants of shalom who build an altar to Yahweh like Gideon, find peace in worship (presence), and spread peace. Gideon built an altar there to the Lord and called its name the Lord is Peace. - Judges 6:24

A life that was peaceful but suddenly becomes fearful for some reason, like walking on a prison wall, so precarious that one wrong step could be irreversible – in such a life, what is safe is 1. that there is no condemnation in Jesus, and 2. having the ability to firmly believe that truth and ignore it. This is enough.
If you give up, you will lose something precious. You must hold on continuously.

The self-reflection after the return from exile was not about improving the system. It was about the restoration of worship, people, and the communities and collaborators they belonged to. For individuals, the priority is believing in the blood of the cross and holiness in the Lord. Unexpected breakthroughs will come.
Storms have a purpose. "Where is your faith?" It means to show your faith. If you respond with faith, the purpose will be fulfilled, and the storm will subside.
Being tired, struggling, and suffering are not always things to be disliked. Who it is for is more important. If it is for the Lord, I go without regret.
In the kingdom of God, mercy triumphs over justice.

The two pillars of God's temple, Jachin and Boaz. God Himself established them. Only He is our strength. God's church was established by God Himself, and the Lord is its strength. The two pillars, the gospel and prayer, are sufficient.

Those without God rise up against unreasonable authority with a sword. However, David's methods were fleeing, praying, and forgiving. When you respond correctly to authority, God grants true authority. You are being refined now, and the Lord wants you to pass that test well.
God, grant us the land you promised on that day.
God, Mom, Dad, older sister, grandpa, grandma

Please be sure to seek God's mercy. No matter how well you are doing, if you lack God's mercy, you will be ruined in an instant. What I truly need is not human attention and recognition, but God's mercy. God's mercy enables me to live my best in all relationships, ministries, and life. Have mercy on me, O God, according to your unfailing love; according to your abundant compassion blot out my transgressions. Wash me thoroughly from my iniquity and cleanse me from my sin. For I know my transgressions, and my sin is ever before me. Against you, you only, have I sinned and done what is evil in your sight, so that you are proved right when you speak and justified when you judge. Surely I was brought forth in iniquity, and in sin did my mother conceive me. Yet you desired faithfulness even in the womb; you taught me wisdom in that secret place. Cleanse me with hyssop, and I will be clean; wash me, and I will be whiter than snow. Let me hear joy and gladness; let the bones you have crushed rejoice. Hide your face from my sins and blot out all my iniquity. Create in me a clean heart, O God, and renew a steadfast spirit within me. Do not cast me from your presence or take your Holy Spirit from me. Restore to me the joy of your salvation, and uphold me with a willing spirit. Then I will teach transgressors your ways, and sinners will turn back to you. Deliver me from the guilt of bloodshed, O God, you who are the God of my salvation, and my tongue will sing of your righteousness. O Lord, open my lips, and my mouth will declare your praise. You do not desire a sacrifice, or I would give it; you do not delight in burnt offerings. The sacrifices you desire are a broken spirit; a broken and contrite heart, O God, you will not despise. In your good pleasure, cause Zion to prosper; build up the walls of Jerusalem. Then you will delight in the sacrifices of righteousness, in burnt offerings and in whole burnt offerings; then bulls will be offered on your altar. Psalm 57:1
No one has given anything to God. The origin of all authority is God.

The life of faith that God encourages is like a race. In the race of faith, 1. remove unnecessary burdens, 2. break the chains of persistent sin, and 3. live with Jesus as your sole focus. You must live simply and with concentration. In times of crisis, in difficult moments, let go of complexity and do only the few things the Lord has told you to do, thinking only of the Lord with patience. That is living by faith. Therefore, since we are surrounded by such a great cloud of witnesses, let us throw off everything that hinders and the sin that so easily entangles. And let us run with perseverance the race marked out for us, fixing our eyes on Jesus, the pioneer and perfecter of faith. For the joy set before him he endured the cross, scorning its shame, and sat down at the right hand of the throne of God. Hebrews 12:1,2

God is humbling me to see if I keep His law or not. The most powerful person is one who is obedient and transforms. Do not change the situation; change your attitude, and God-level power will come. However, determining your attitude is possible only when you know the Lord's will.
If God loved people so much that He gave His only begotten Son, then we have no right to hate anyone. God's grace is stronger than hatred and greater than resentment.
The land God wants to give us is not a plausible land, not a decent land. The land He truly wants to give is the promised 'that land'.

When you experience God working, you realize He is creative (for He is the Father of creation) and unpredictable. The stance of 'God, please uphold my principles and work according to my thoughts and plans' means that I am truly an 'inconvenient person' for God to use. Hearing God's voice is initially a truly 'uncomfortable feeling' because it means I must abandon my will and obey.
On the first Sunday, at the youth group meeting, God spoke about the most important thing, the beginning and end of faith: 'Love for Jesus'.
God does not coerce; He moves. His love compels us.

It is Jehovah God who leads that path. Instead of being driven by circumstances and betting on the higher probability, when you trust in faith and look to Him, He grants signs at the appropriate time. What is important is the preparation of self-reflection.

Those who rely on anything other than God will surely increase their suffering. The Lord is the living water, and the Lord is the only solution. Those who pursue possessions, recognition, and carnal satisfaction instead of God will surely increase their suffering if they wait a little longer. It is truly foolish. Those who offer sacrifices to other gods will increase their suffering. I will not offer their blood libations, nor will I call their names to my lips. Psalm 16:4
You must become a person who is not satisfied with anything other than God. A person whom nothing can stop, whether it be a furnace seven times hotter or a den of hungry lions.
God is not deceived by results. Rather, He examines the motives. Therefore, if you die, you will live.

Everything is a matter of life. If there is life, you live like a flame; if not, you fade away. Jesus declares that He Himself is life. However, it is difficult to meet Him by simply searching. You must 'seek and seek again.' I have never seen life overflow in someone who has not repeatedly sought the Lord. Faith is simply the power of repeating the cross.
God has not called me to be outstanding. He wants me to be perfect. Becoming one with belief and knowledge, Ephesians 4:13.
God knows me and knows my circumstances. I can feel that when I pray. Because He has heard, I am assured that He will also accomplish it.

God loved me with His life even when I did not love Him so much. Therefore, it is fitting that we love Him in the same way. Do not look at the reaction, but look at the Lord. In His eyes, everyone is love. Romans 5:8.

God is love. When I follow God, I break free from my sticky limitations. Loving people of faith is 'fellowship.' Loving unbelievers is 'mission.' And loving God is 'worship.' And when we were sinners, Christ died for us, proving God's love. Therefore, love is Jesus. Thus, fellowship is in Jesus. Mission proclaims Jesus. Worship is possible only through Jesus. Jesus is the center of all truth.

God prepared an unpleasant event for Saul to find, prepare, and anoint him as king. The incident of losing precious female donkeys. The grace prepared by the Lord may not be visible until something is lost.
God does not make mistakes and does not give up. That is called hope.
God told Abraham to look north, south, east, and west and promised him that land. It means He will give as much as Abraham sees. Therefore, seeing is power.

God encourages us, and God's people encourage each other. This is because God is self-sufficient, but we are beings who can only live if we are supplied. To start again what was abandoned requires even greater strength than at the beginning. One of the important strengths for this is encouragement.

God has predetermined where and when we will live and where we will reside. We are within the Lord's care and love. He made all the nations of mankind from one blood and settled them all over the earth, determining their periods and the boundaries of their dwelling places (Acts 17:26).

God always gives us good things in the form of 'seeds.' If we embrace them and transform, they bear good fruit. We instinctively want finished products, but in the end, we see many who possess finished products crumble because of them. Seeds bear fruit through labor and hardship.
God knows what is best for our lives. He also knows how to bring it about better than I do.
When God answers, He only looks at faith. Even if everything collapses, we must not retreat with faith in God's omnipotence and faithfulness. I hope you win by faith.
God does not call those who work well. He calls those who can obey. When we obey the calling, change occurs, and a path opens for the changed person.
Please seek the Lord so that dry places may become holy. If you fill your weaknesses and flaws with Jesus, you become spiritually strong.

There is a reason why people cannot meet God. It is due to a wrong premise. It is due to the hypothesis that 'God will receive glory because of my "success." ' The idea that He only receives glory through gold medals, prestigious universities, good jobs, and social status. This is a wrong idea. The Bible says that what you believe in is glory. It says blessed is the one who does not stand in the way of evil. It is the glory of a saint to cry out in pain amidst suffering. I hope you become believers who hold onto the One who not only is with me but also shares my pain and sheds tears with me in my hardships and difficulties, and who, despite all this, does not give up through the absolute solution of the cross.
The tabernacle that houses God, the clay jar that houses Jesus, is strong.

A person who does not look to God is fixated on something. When you are fixated, your eyes and ears become deafened. You fail to see the obvious as obvious. Fixation is idolatry, so God will surely demand it back. Let it go. You must let go until you can say that even if you lose everything, you are satisfied with the Lord alone.
If a group that truly loves God, loves the church, and truly loves one another can put their heads together for an appropriate amount of time on any issue, there is no mountain we cannot move.
If you truly love God the most, you truly love your people. Loving someone more than God is truly hating that person. - From a cell group meeting -
The kingdom of God will not be shaken by such things. Believe in the power of the precious blood and keep going. Another word for faith is to ignore it.
The power to forgive those who believe in God's will and start again is bestowed. This includes not only others but also yourself.
