If they truly loved...

Do you still hold fast to your purity? - Job 2:9 To all the youth group members who have passed through London over the past 12 years, now grown older, perhaps married and become parents, or are navigating social life with responsibilities and burdens, I send my greetings. If you ask how I am living, I would say, 'By the grace of the Lord.' As the years pass and I grow older, I pray even more and cling more tightly to the Lord's cross. This is because the 'grace of the blood of the cross' that we cried out for is not a trivial matter. As we live in this harsh world, if someone asks, 'Will you still hold fast to your purity when you are young?' I hope you will answer, 'Not only will I keep it, but I regret that I cannot offer even more.' "Jesus Christ is the same yesterday and today and forever." - Hebrews 13:8

The Son of God did not bear the cross of suffering so that I would be crushed and die because of this problem. The Lord's cross is meant to save me. He bore that difficult cross because He was determined to save me. Therefore, we must be bold.
And this is the will of Him who sent me, that I shall lose none of all whom He has given me, but that I shall raise them up at the last day. John 6:39

It is painful, but not unhappy. It is painful, but happy. Because the Lord heals the brokenhearted and gives true rest. To proclaim good news to the poor; He has sent me to heal the brokenhearted, to proclaim liberty to the captives... - Isaiah 61:1

I hope you will find peace by obeying the Lord, not by complaining according to your own calculations. The fact that the Almighty Lord died on the cross in weakness is the gospel. For the foolishness of God is wiser than men, and the weakness of God is stronger than men. - 1 Corinthians 1:25

What has been given to me is a gift of blessing from God, freely given. With it, I must save and bless many people. Joseph's revival was not a personal revival, but it saved his father, his family, King Pharaoh, and all the people of the Near East from famine.
If the joy of meeting the Lord is greater than the weight of the problem, life cannot help but be happier. There is hope under the shadow of the cross.
A cool person sheds tears endlessly. That is the Lord's love and grace.

You must be devoted. It is because of Jesus. It is not a burden, but a joy. If you love the cross, do not do what you want, but stand where you are needed. That is carrying the cross and following the Lord. It is the path of the cross, which even death cannot block.

The leader of a herd of buffalo is the one who has a good sense of the smell of water. A leader is someone who has the ability to set direction. It is important whether the direction of your life aligns with the purpose of life, that is, your mission and the gospel. Do not shout, but cultivate your inner strength.

Just as my laughter is not true laughter, what you see now is not everything. The end is not the end, for the Lord will surely judge and repay. 2 Thessalonians 1:6-10 'when the Lord Jesus is revealed from heaven with his mighty angels in flaming fire, inflicting vengeance on those who do not know God and on those who do not obey the gospel. They will suffer the punishment of eternal destruction, away from the presence of the Lord and from the glory of his might, when he comes on that day to be glorified in his saints, and to be marveled at among all who have believed, because our testimony to you was believed.'
'In the Book of Acts, the early church prayed for 10 days and preached for 10 minutes, and 3,000 people were saved. However, today, we pray for 10 minutes and preach for 10 days, and save 2 people.'
To say you love someone but not share the Lord's love is like providing malnourished food. We are complete through the Lord and from the Lord. Share the Lord's love.
Do not try to be too competent. Instead, try to be a weak fool in the Lord. "My grace is sufficient for thee: for my strength is made perfect in weakness" (2 Corinthians 12:9).

The devil comes only to steal and kill and destroy. He gives a sense of victimhood and alienation, separates from the community, incites discord to cut off spiritual supply, and destroys self-esteem through slander. Ultimately, what he desires is complete destruction, to make you a child of hell. But the Son of Man, Jesus, came to give life, and life more abundantly. There is restoration and reconciliation, peace and joy, forgiveness of sins and the joy of heaven, and the powerful and perfect reign of God. What made this possible was not anything else, but the blood of the cross. The thief comes only to steal and kill and destroy. I came that they may have life and have it more abundantly. (John 10:10)
Do not prove yourself; instead, testify of the Lord. God will anoint you and be with you.
You must realize the most important thing. It is repentance. Repentance cannot be done by someone else. It is something 'I' do by the grace of the Lord alone.
Speak without hesitation. The gospel of the Lord is not bound and works through those who are not ashamed. Acts 4:13

In LA, a woman had her handbag snatched by a robber, but she held on to it even while bleeding. The reason was not because of credit cards or a designer bag. It was for the sake of a few photos of her daughter on her phone inside the bag. She was trying to protect the photos of her daughter who had passed away from cancer 10 weeks prior. Everyone has a core value. For some, it is 'perishable things,' and for others, it is 'heavenly things.' In Colossians 1:28-29, Paul says he strives and labors. His core value was proclaiming Him and building up people. The values for which he would not have hesitated to give his life were 'Jesus' and 'souls.' Love what you should love. You will not be ashamed.
God forgives through the cross and gives boundless grace through His blood. There is no condemnation under His blood. The Lord accepts everyone as they are.
He has set me free from sin. I have overcome temptation and gained victory.

It is the power of the blood that has set me free from sin. It is the power of the blood that gives victory in great tribulation. I pray that the power of the blood will cover all our members tonight.

To stand before the gospel again, to receive the cross as life, means not living by fleshly desires or by lineage, but that even if all is lost, 'the Lord alone is sufficient.' If Jesus is not enough, even if all the things you so desperately desire are filled moment by moment, the deep wounds and emptiness in your heart will continue.
Grant us to stand before the gospel again and to serve with the heart and tears of God. May Your will be done, Lord.

* We sing the special praise, 'He Has Set Me Free From Sin,' which has never been heard before in the world. Please listen to this song repeatedly and immerse yourselves in it. Please also sing this song during your cell group meetings. Pray that the power of the blood will cover Africa, Asia, and Europe.
He has cleansed my sins and given me a new day. His blood has power. His love brings me praise every day. What wondrous power it is.

I hope you will seek grace to stand before the gospel again. To stand before the gospel does not mean you will never make mistakes again, but rather that you will not use the Lord for your own selfish desires, and that you will die to yourself and live for the Lord who gave you life.
Speak with complete silence, just as Jesus walked the path of death in silence.

The one who preaches the word is a sinner, and the ones who hear the word are also sinners. Although we are all sinners, God said that if He washes us with His blood and anoints us, the presence of Jesus will appear, and we will do even greater things. Rely on the washing of the blood and the sealing of the Spirit today.
The reason I can stand here is because of what Jesus did on the cross. The reason we can serve, however imperfectly, is not because I live, but because Jesus lives in me.

A person with an unadorned self is different from one who has a pragmatic self that demands bread be made from stones. They are generous people who can give and receive love regardless of the outcome of their endeavors.
Christians who eat the flesh of Christ and drink the blood of Christ no longer focus on themselves. This is because my flesh is Christ's flesh and my blood is Christ's blood.
When you stake your life, you think it's a crisis. No. Not staking your life is the real crisis. Stake your life on the gospel that gave up life.

Many people live as if they are acting. This is because they believe they can be happy. It is rather tiring. I lived diligently, but it is not my life. Please be true to yourself. You are a precious being, the only one in the world, and God's Son laid down His life for that preciousness. Don't act, be faithful.
I don't necessarily think of it as preaching the gospel. But if I do not open my mouth, the stones will cry out. Amen, Lord Jesus, come.
Tears are love, and bringing joy is love, but true love is becoming a grain of wheat and denying oneself daily to bear the cross.

Police cars are exempt from speeding violations for public safety, and ambulances are exempt from traffic law violations when rushing. This is because they are given exceptions in life-saving situations. We must always proceed exceptionally in matters of saving lives, receiving grace, and meeting the Lord.

The principle of the Magi: The Magi, who lived in different countries, followed the star through their respective routes and finally met before the infant Jesus. God calls various people in different ways for His kingdom and His glory.

The most foolish thing is to criticize others. Even more foolish is to judge others based on imagination. God's healing and restoration have no side effects. Jesus did not come to condemn, but rather to be condemned for us.
Prayer: The ability to start over. When everything is dark and you don't know what to do, pray that the Lord becomes your lamp. Stop self-defense, excuses, and pity, and pour out your heart before the Lord's throne, and the Father will heal, restore, and give you the strength to start again. There is nothing you cannot say before Him, and no request is too difficult.

To obtain the grace of being able to discern weeds from wheat in due time, we must approach the Lord's throne every moment. The enemy naturally sows weeds and wants to hinder believers if possible. The most effective weed is 'self-defense,' and the weapon that breaks through this and allows us to boldly approach the King's throne is 'self-denial,' that is, the 'cross.'
Calculate less and pray more. Calculations will be shorter, but complex problems will be solved.

The reason the heart aches so deeply is due to spiritual laziness, which forces us to seek the Lord. It is the reason why a stiff soul, which only has a heart but doesn't know how to pray, can hold its chest and cry out to the Lord in tears.

Comfort my people. Pray for God's comfort to come. Especially pray earnestly for yourself, who needs that comfort the most. This is needed not only for myself but even more for my family and friends. Only then can I avoid being cruel.

Even if your heart is hurt, never stop praying. Sometimes God uses our deep pain as a channel for His amazing plan. This is because pain leads us to kneel against the flesh and to a place of intense prayer where we seek the Lord's face beyond human desires. Even now, the Lord surveys the whole world, looking for those who cannot live without Him (those with whole hearts), and challenges them to receive God's desires, not human desires, and to reach that level of prayer. Instead of answering the prayers of many women who ask for sons, He leads them to pray for Samuel, who ushers in the dawn of history.
Be watchful and pray. Pray that the Lord becomes your lamp. He is the lamp in the storm and the song in the dark night.
Heavenly father, You're the defender of the weak. You comfort those in need.
Give glory. Let us not lament what we have not been given, but let us give glory by offering what we have already received.

I walk in sorrow all day long. - Psalm 38:6 The causes of sorrow in Psalm 38 were health problems and interpersonal relationship problems. However, it states that the root of all these peripheral problems is the relationship with God and oneself. If there is no sorrow despite having problems with God, and instead there is joy and delight, this is a cursed life. A life that is happy only through the cross, a life satisfied only by the Lord, will walk in sorrow all day long if the focus of life is even slightly shaken. I hope that we will become young lions who sing of the Lord's salvation and help whenever we are sad in the future. I am sick and bent over, and walk in sorrow all day long; help me quickly, O Lord, my salvation. - Psalm 38
The reason things get tangled is because we use our feet more than our knees.
The reason authority doesn't stand is because we speak more than we pray.
Don't regret your prime days; pray right now. This very moment of prayer will surely become the best moment.
I pray for all those who need prayer. May the Lord guide their hearts.

The more storms and waves arise, the more we must abandon the habit of calculating. Don't try to find answers; it is enough to stand on the path the Lord will surely provide. If you are impatient, you seek answers, but if you have faith, you pray.
Two reasons for unceasing prayer: because there is a vision, and because there is love.
Pray. Wherever you are, you can be the Lord's joy. The center is more important than the place, and God is the one who receives that center.

Shame. Although the Korean church receives much criticism, I bow my head when I meet faithful pastors who are like jewels. With a feeling of endless shame, I pray that you entrust your souls to such precious people.

The method of healing: When facing trials, the intercession of faithful friends and leaders is needed. Pray for the healing of wounded hearts. "I have prayed for you, that your faith may not fail. And when you have turned back, strengthen your brothers." (Luke 22:32)
God desires to love us more than we love, and to bless us more than we bless. Therefore, He asks us to believe and intercede for those we love.
May Your perfect will be done, not my will, nor my good will.
Prayer of empty hands
Earnest prayer
Fill up the measure
If you don't do what is right, you will rot
The way to change all
When you are happy
A good player keeps going
Pray and love
If you pray, He will work
What I feel when I go on a business trip
A question that may seem slightly irreverent
The spirit of opposition
Truly God's peace
What can be obtained through me
Healing from addiction
The voice of God
Reasons for collapse
Why are you sleeping?
Prayer gives birth to prayer
Refuse comfort
Why is there no strength?
When you encounter a problem
When you encounter a trial
Don't drink muddy water, drink fresh water
Why are you not happy?
Pray like this
Reasons for the fight
I will make you new
Reasons why it cannot be discarded
A community that does not pray selectively based on people
Boldness comes from humility. Lack of boldness stems from losing one's place. Prayer brings boldness, as humility that finds one's place descends.

Why do we pray before worship team prayer meetings? Is it to gain fleeting power through a last-minute sprint to ensure a good worship service? It is to remember that we are before God and to move to the 'position' of a true worshiper.
There are two most important things in leading worship: longing and obedience. Longing is achieved through supplication, and obedience through repentance.
When you continuously and persistently ask for what you have 'supplicated' before the Lord, you become a person of the Spirit. This means becoming a person who loves everyone without fear.

You should have peace when you pray. If you are still anxious, it is because you subconsciously know your priorities are wrong. You first realize that if your priorities are wrong, you cannot dwell in God's guidance and security.

Seek the 'Why' rather than the 'How'. Do not pray about how to fulfill your position well, but pray about why you must fulfill it well. You will cast aside selfish desires and discover your mission. When the purpose is clear, the methods become sharp.

The reason for exploding in anger is failing to satisfy one's own desires. This is why people quarrel and even murder. You can tell when you have asked wrongly for selfish desires by your reaction when what you asked for is not granted. The best answer is to ask according to God's will and to trust His timing and methods.

Rejoice when you face limitations. There has never been a time without limitations, and it is because of these limitations that we pray. Pray for a revival that cannot be stopped by people, traditions, customs, or prejudices.
Today, grant me the breath you have given me to serve humbly, without seeking recognition from others, but to stand worthy before you. Help me to look only to you every moment.
God, grant that I may serve humbly in the places where I am needed, without name or recognition.
We do not collapse suddenly. It is our knees for prayer that collapsed first.
The way to control the desires of sin is to pour out a broken heart to the Lord.

Why send water from the reservoir? It is not to wet the pipes, but to quench thirst through the pipes. If you pray for yourself, a small power will manifest, but power will be poured out when you seek to save souls.

True concern is to think of and earnestly pray for our brothers and sisters suffering tribulation and hardship at this time. If you only seek relationships that you desire, what is the difference between you and unbelievers?

If you put the first button on incorrectly, it is difficult to fix it no matter how well you do later. Sin is already determined by the first action you take. Please begin everything with prayer and end it with prayer.
There is nothing more empty than seeking guidance without the willingness to be lost.
What is more important than 'How did you start?' is 'How do you finish?'. That is why we pray.
I always remember and pray.
If you think today is the last day, you will remember many of your shortcomings rather than things you felt sad about. Therefore, today too, I lay down my shortcomings and pray.
Try praying instead of worrying. Grace will cover you.

The reason prayers are not answered - the first button is wrong. We pray out of a desperate need for something to change, but the prayers are not answered. This is because one thing has been missed. There is an order to that change, and the environment and relationships change only when I change. Therefore, the prayer asking to change me is the first button of answered prayer.

The best way to waste time is not to pray. Because you are not filled, you constantly react to unnecessary things. The moment your focus is stolen, it becomes lost time. For some, it may be a lost year, and for others, it may be a lost 20 years.

If you do not pray, you will be dragged along. If you do not pray, others will decide your life. Prayer is the best way to live your life. Pray abundantly and raise the level of grace. Do not turn away from that easy method. Fullness is always the problem.

A ship without a captain does not know where to go. The authority given to bear responsibility, if evaded and abandoned, will return as a great disaster. People die because of people. Beautiful lives die because of foolish and ignorant people, and greedy and irresponsible people. Even ministers do not understand all of God's will. However, until sin overflows in this world, we who failed to protect young souls must pray with tears and wailing as if we shed blood.

When you are tested, it means you are not giving thanks, you are not staying awake in prayer for even an hour, you are not loving, and you are thinking entirely self-centrically. The Lord prayed that your faith would not fail. Respond with intercession and faith.
I am sorry. My heart aches deeply, and my tears do not stop. I pray for the bereaved families and everyone.
The environment is not evil. It is simply that evil things react because I cannot humble myself. Humble yourself and pray. Souls will return to the Lord.
Do not worry about anything. The Lord will decide and take responsibility for everything. Let fate come. I am not afraid.
Pray for the Lord's will to be done. Your own will is anxious.

Please pray for the Cambridge Revival Church meeting tomorrow. Those participating will depart from the church at 1:30 PM and 4:30 PM respectively, so please contact us in advance. The actual meetings are at 4:30 PM and 7:00 PM.

True prayer cannot be offered sincerely without the help of the Holy Spirit; we must acknowledge this and rely on the Holy Spirit. In the same way the Spirit also helps our weakness, for we do not know what to pray for as we should, but the Spirit Himself intercedes for us with groanings too deep for words. - Romans 8:26
One skill of love is prayer, and another is becoming holy like the Lord. Then those who belong to me will truly be blessed.

If you are called to it, you will not be frustrated. You are not called to complain about your circumstances. Do what you can. That is to pray where you stand and live according to the Lord's word. The holy Lord reigns with sovereignty.
Are you losing your temper? I pray. Fight against the spirit of the antichrist in Jesus' name.

When you don't even have the strength to eat – when you lack the energy to overcome challenges – you need to eat properly, but you also need the strength to eat. You gain strength by listening to the Word, but you need the basic ability to listen. Please pray for the strength and ability to listen.
If you love, you will pray. If you say you love without praying, it is not love, but a past desire to love.

The time of trial is a time surrendered to darkness; you must humble yourself and wait for that time of darkness to pass by praying. Peter, unable to stay awake and pray, fell into temptation by going to the wrong place.

The most important thing for a preacher's preparation is to love. If you do not love, it is all in vain, and preaching God's Word is not meant to be in vain. If you truly want to love, you must love through prayer and live in obedience to God's Word. The crisis of the church is the crisis of the preacher. Therefore, we must become poorer and repent.
For revival to come, it is for those who have tasted revival to have a holy dissatisfaction with the state of no revival and to continuously kneel. It is to advance as much as you long for glory.
The way to restore lost glory is to restore lost prayer.
When you set aside time, it is time to give your heart. Do you have such time, such a private room, to give your sincere heart once? If it is scarce, it means you are a nominal Christian.
Grant me, O Lord, the loyalty to do my best in the tasks entrusted to me, the trust to entrust what I cannot do, and the wisdom to discern to whom all of this belongs.
Do not be anxious, but pray about everything. The faithful Lord will answer.
For the healing camp preparation, please humble yourself, repent, and seek the Lord's face. Only then can I live and save everyone, and that is the greatest gift.

The reason I am not afraid of the future and look forward to it is not because of the uncertainty ahead, but a sign that I have not been fully united with the Lord. If you pray with earnestness and unite with the Lord, you will instead look forward to the providence that the Lord will work and bring about. For there is nothing you cannot do, and no plan you cannot accomplish. - Job 42:2
If you continue to fail even in resolving to pray, command that the bondage be broken in Jesus' name and pray for prayer. This problem must be brought to the cross.

If you pray but do not sow, it is fanaticism. If you sow diligently but do not pray, it is unbelief. If you pray and sow diligently but have vague expectations without the Word, it is superstition. Believing firmly on your own when God does not think so is blind faith.
Lord, may you not allow any worldly success that hinders me from drawing near to you.

Do not worry, but pray. Worry means it is not within my domain. That is why we pray. Entrust everything you cannot do and simply give thanks. The One who receives that thanksgiving will do His work, and I need only to worship and give glory, seeking the kingdom and His righteousness.
The victory in life depends on who you connect with. When my soul was weary within me, I thought of the Lord, and my prayer came to your holy temple. - Jonah 2:7
May whatever pleasure of mine that hinders God's revival be blotted out.
Without prayer, you can never win. That means if you pray, you will surely win. This kind does not go out except by prayer and fasting. - Matthew 17:21
Pray earnestly for the courage of a storm and the wisdom to overcome enemies and adversaries.
May my breathing become a comfort and a gift to someone.

Do not worry, but entrust, and it will be accomplished. Worrying about tomorrow when you cannot control today's events is an overreach. Jesus Himself said that worrying about matters of food and clothing is unnecessary. Overcoming worry is to pray about everything, and this drives out fear with the 'peace of God, which surpasses all understanding' (Philippians 4:7). Commit your way to the Lord; trust in him, and he will act. - Psalm 37:5

Pray based on the Word. Cling to the words of promise and hope and pray as you follow them. The devil will be defeated. Do not be anxious about anything, but in everything by prayer and supplication with thanksgiving let your requests be made known to God. And the peace of God, which surpasses all understanding, will guard your hearts and your minds in Christ Jesus. - Philippians 4:6,7
If you give thanks, you have already won. Prayers of thanksgiving bring peace, peace is the Lord's presence, and within the Lord's presence, the Almighty's answer comes.

Simon, Simon, behold, Satan demanded to have you, that he might sift you like wheat, but I have prayed for you, that your faith may not fail. And when you have turned back, strengthen your brothers. - Luke 22:31,32 Stay awake and pray. If you do not want to lose what is truly important...
The basis for the answer is to pray holding onto promises and based on the Word. The basis is His faithfulness, who cannot change and cannot lie.
Prayer is combat and the surest victory. Please ignite the fire of prayer. - Sunday Meeting
Due to a catering failure, there will be no Sunday fellowship meal for the 3rd service. Please improvise as needed. Hallelujah.
With Snow White... (Deacon Sang Hoon Lee, are you watching?)

If you cannot let go of what you should discard, you cannot pray, and if you cannot hold onto what you should hold onto, you cannot obey. To discard what should be discarded and hold onto what should be held onto is to fear the Lord.

The greatest focus of sinful humanity is 'themselves.' They focus on their problems, their money, their homes, their families, and their success. If they focused this way, their problems should be solved, but they become more tangled like a ball of yarn. This is because problems grow the more you look at them. When you look to the Lord in prayer, even the biggest problems become small. This is because the Lord is vast. I hope you have faith to see the Lord as great.

* The reason prayer problems arise is due to a lack of prayer. You must raise the temperature of your prayer until it burns away and melts the problems. When you have time, stop being a slave to useless decay and cry out in prayer.

Trying other medicines for illness is useless. You need a special cure. The special cure for worry is not 'entertainment' or 'achievement,' but 'prayer.' Do not be anxious about anything, but in everything by prayer and supplication with thanksgiving let your requests be made known to God. (Philippians 4:6-7)

* Pray silently with tears. We are not called to receive the approval of men. We are called to love. This is received from God, so it is enough to receive God's approval, and we pray silently with tears, trusting that God will take responsibility.

Parents do not teach their children the know-how of cheating when teaching them how to get good grades. I pray. I am not trying to become a spiritual worker that cannot be ignored. I am simply trying not to become an evil worker. To try to gain life without prayer is evil.

When you feel inadequate, the easiest thought that comes to mind is to leave or give up. However, that is not inadequacy, but the revelation of your own nature that had no potential from the beginning. There was no possibility from the beginning, but I have walked by believing in the Lord, and I can continue to walk with the Lord in the future. If you feel inadequate, you must kneel and ask for mercy.

Why do you not pray when you feel inadequate? Pray before you despair. He shows great and hidden ways in places where I thought there was no way. One who does not reach their desired wishes or does not have the earnestness to express them cannot pray.
When revival comes, all the thorns in life are pulled out. Revival does not come without prayer, and prayer is for those whose hearts bleed drop by drop.
Anger blocks prayer and wisdom. However, when you pray in anger, you gain wisdom to control and manage the situation.

To turn anxiety into peace is to stand before the Lord and look only to the Lord. Revival overwhelms fear. For we have no power against this great multitude that is coming against us, nor do we know what to do, but our eyes are on you. All the men of Judah, with their wives, their little ones, and their children, stood before the LORD. (2 Chronicles 20:12-13)
If you are anxious, please let it go. When you let go and entrust it into the Lord's hands, peace comes, and solutions follow that peace.
Are you anxious? Entrust it into the Lord's hands. You will have peace. Because the Lord's hand holds me...
I am anxious. It is because I have momentarily lost the Lord. By remembering the Lord again and interceding for everyone, I will find the peace I have lost. Any peace without Jesus is fake.
Burning prayer. If you pray for what God desires, you will feel your prayer being drawn up to heaven, and you will feel how ecstatic prayer can be.

* Prayer. Grant our friends wisdom to overcome the schemes of the enemy, and in a world that oppresses and intimidates, may they be not only peaceful but also bold. May they believe that He who has begun a good work in them will bring it to completion until the day of Jesus Christ, trusting that even now, as they offer the incense of prayer and shed tears before God, He hears their prayers and works in every moment. I believe the Spirit of truth will not leave them as orphans.

Some members remain silent, refraining even from speaking, because they are told not to complain. In Psalms, there are many passages that seem strange to be in scripture. However, after going through such inner turmoil, complaints do not end as complaints but transform into the confession, 'I will praise Him instead.' Urgent pleas should not remain as complaints but should move towards prayer that details the current circumstances. You must open your mouth and say, 'It hurts if it hurts,' and 'It's hard if it's hard.' O my people, trust in him at all times; pour out your hearts before him, for God is our refuge. (Psalm 62:8)

Even in a deadly drought where not a single drop of rain falls, the one who prays to God and brings down fire hears the sound of great rain alone beforehand. And they prepare the way for the rain to fall. They hear the sound of revival at a great cost. So Elijah said to Ahab, "Go up, eat and drink, for there is the sound of a great rain." (1 Kings 18:41)

Just as an airplane needs a certain speed and distance to take off, it is insane to expect anything without dedicating absolute time. If you desire it, please dedicate it. If you truly desire it, I truly hope it is dedicated. There is no other way.

An airplane must travel 800 meters at a speed of over 350 km/h to fly. Without absolute speed and absolute distance, even the best airplane is more inconvenient than a Tesco cart. Without absolute prayer dedicated to the Lord, what spiritual warfare is this? It is simply spiritual play. It's like an airplane parked in a Tesco parking lot because it can't fly, and neighborhood kids are throwing rocks at it. Don't just sit there, soar!

Satan tries by all means to prevent us from advancing. He causes mental breakdowns, trials, and relationship difficulties. When problems arise, they tend to erupt suddenly and simultaneously. You suddenly receive an urgent call, and school is about to start, but on that particular day, the train decides to play tortoise. On the train, only I am impatient. And on that day, my stomach hurts. But there is no restroom. For they said, to frighten us, so that we might not do the work and it not be done. (Nehemiah 6:9) Do not be discouraged at this. Nehemiah just brushes them off and says, "Now strengthen my hands." He prays like that and moves forward with that faith. If I asked for strength, He gave me strength.

People say they solve things through 'conversation.' More often than not, misunderstandings arise rather than solutions. When you pray to the Lord, you have intimate 'conversation' with your Almighty Father and receive heavenly power.
People get hurt and sin. People especially get hurt and sin in places without God. Blessed is the one who comes to the Lord's Most Holy Place and meets the hidden God.
A person who is infinitely inadequate, wanting to bless their loved ones, becomes a praying person and a servant of God.

* Jacob's Shameless Prayer. I am not worthy of all the grace and love you have shown me... Save me from my brother Esau. (Genesis 32:10-11) "I am a good person because I try so hard" and "You show grace even though I am deceitful and hypocritical" have different starting points. The elder brother of the prodigal son condemns due to 'proud delusion,' while the prodigal son is the one who receives 'unbearable grace.' Those who are forgiven and receive grace love the Lord more and are more accepting of friends.
* How to Entrust Worry. It is knowing who God is and confirming the Lord in your reality moment by moment.
If you love, you pray.

Praying for a mission can be powerful, but it is also dangerous. This is because a mission can sometimes degenerate into ambition and become self-pursuit in the Lord's name. While the mission is certainly important, it is important because of the One who gave it, and therefore, prayer is not about achieving but about loving.
All I can do is give thanks and pray.
It is not because the minister prays that sickness is healed and problems are solved. The Lord has prepared all healing and solutions and has decided to work through His servant.
Now is the time to pray. Raise the level of your prayer. Then a different class of life will unfold.
In life, there will inevitably be things that hurt your heart. If you leave that heart as it is, it becomes corrupt sin, but if you bring it to the Father, it becomes the worship He seeks.

Samson lost his glorious life because he did not pray. He became a slave to the nation he should have conquered. If he had prayed from the beginning, instead of in the twilight of his life, Judges chapter 16 would have concluded with a greater story.
I earnestly pray for all my friends who go around sadly all day due to loss, health, or relationship problems.
Going to the end is possible through prayer. If you have seen the possibility through prayer, you must complete it with supplication. After all, isn't the reason we start to see the end?
I pray when I think of it : ) Blessings to you, my wife, Sharon, and Grace.

Do not be anxious about anything, but in every situation, by prayer and petition, with thanksgiving, present your requests to God. And the peace of God, which transcends all understanding, will guard your hearts and your minds in Christ Jesus. - Philippians 4:6-7
Faith will make it known. Entrust small matters to prayer and thanksgiving. You will understand the reason later.
Do not worry about success, but pray to fulfill the Lord's will. The Lord will keep you in peace.

If you try to find peace by setting your heart on the world, it is excessive desire. When life is complicated and difficult, prayer will not come out just by closing your eyes and praying. Choose one. Either choose the world and live a chaotic life, or look to the Lord and live with power.
The prayer that receives the fastest answer in the world... Shall we try it? God, deal with me.

There are friends who let go of good chances, in worldly terms, to keep their cell group meetings. While the minister cannot take full responsibility, because their heart offered to God is precious, I earnestly pray that He will repay them with good things, even through fasting.
After praying for the retreat...

I pray that the Lord will bestow grace and grant rest to all the members who have prepared and prayed for the retreat. And now, I earnestly hope that they will run without regret with the grace they have received. There is no turning back in faith. I hope they will run and run, blooming like a beautiful fragrance, like a drink offering poured out before the Lord's altar.

They say grenades are powerful weapons. If you hit directly by throwing them, it's a concussion, and even if it grazes, it's a bruise. This is a foolish repurposing. You are not called to dig with a shovel, but to conquer with overflowing prayer.

Hidden evil causes many wounds. If poison is dissolved in medicine, it can heal, but it can also kill as a side effect. I must examine myself and confess so that the poison that existed in the past does not operate and obscure the glory of the Lord.
What is immediately obedient is what is desired now: prayer and thanksgiving, blessings and forgiveness, intercession and love, and running while looking only at Jesus.

There are times when sad tears fall and deep sighs are heard. It is a call to tell the Lord everything and pray. The most foolish thing is the soul that does not understand the signal in the midst of it and falls asleep.
Be watchful and pray so that you may not fall into temptation.

Christian life is prayer life. Ultimately, the battle is about whether you continue to pray. In any case, Satan tries to prevent prayer through various other issues. However, those who move towards the goal continue to go to the place of prayer.

Method of Love 3 You must love with all that you have been given and allowed. And then you must get life insurance. Insurance is originally compensation that comes out when someone passes away. It is to offer unending intercession so that the souls I have loved can continue to look only to the Lord and grow.

To fight without aimlessly fighting and not to strike the air in vain, you must hear the Lord's voice and receive His guidance through prayer and service. That is the boundary that distinguishes worldly zeal from godliness.

No matter how much information you gather or how much you think, you cannot be sure that you will make the right decision. That is why you must pray. Those who follow others do not pray. Decisions without prayer lead to living in disregard of God and denying His image. I hope you will live a life that the Lord takes responsibility for.

Please cherish the small place of prayer where you kneel when you wake up in the morning. It is a far greater thing than eloquent expression and overflowing knowledge (at least it was for me). There lies the dignity of a saint. I love the Lord because he heard my voice and my supplications. Because he inclined his ear to me, I will call on him as long as I live. - Psalm 116:1,2

An African chief received a Toyota 4-wheel drive as a gift. He boasted of using it wonderfully. He said he listens to music on the CD player and rests inside with the air conditioning on when it's hot. And then he walks the long road again. A life without prayer is like digging with a shovel. It's amazing that even after experiencing this, they can't let go of the lingering desire to dig. They have been deeply involved in the organization for a long time, and it's not like they've only been living by faith for a day or two.

The most peaceful prayer. If you fill your deficiencies, it will be convenient, but other anxieties will overwhelm you. The most peaceful prayer is this: I consider everything that was profitable to me as loss and as rubbish... Self-control is power.

Carry a list of intercessory prayer requests in your inner pocket or handbag. Prayer also gains strength with practice. Accumulated prayers are more useful and powerful than the traditions of a prestigious family.
It is regrettable. That I cannot give more... When it is painful, you can give your utmost, and when it is dark, you can look to the Lord the most.

James said that the prayer of a righteous person is powerful. If we do not have God's heart within us, we cannot release His power to work even when we pray. To pray effectively, we must pray with God's heart and attitude towards the situation and the individual. True blessing and prayer are not achieved without forgiveness.

* Absolute Peace Paul conveys three joys to the Philippian believers from prison. He then exhorts them to oppose three adversaries that steal that joy: false love, legalism, and worldly worries. If you truly want peace, you must embrace the mind of Christ, consider what was once beneficial as rubbish, and present your requests to God with thanksgiving. This is the theme of Philippians.

Suppose one day you receive a text or email saying someone will give you tens of thousands of pounds. How grateful and encouraged would you be? However, most offers of that kind are loans that you have to repay with double the principal over six long years. It seems like they are solving your problems as if they are helping, but the conclusion is that they make more money. The Lord does not give cash. The Lord gives promises. Promises bear fruit through prayer and obedience.

* Absolute Anxiety For those who distance themselves from God, are not in places of worship and grace, and forget the merit of Jesus' cross, peace is utterly unattainable. Those whose hearts are filled with the world and people, not Jesus, must be anxious. They must experience panic that shakes them to their roots. The prodigal son seeks his home only when he has nothing left. I earnestly pray that such people will never be able to sleep soundly.
In moments so overwhelming that you don't know where to begin to sort things out, please pray like this: Lord, take control!

* Prayer Vs. Sin Sin hinders prayer. And prayer also hinders sin. The Lord's hand is not too short to save, nor His ear too deaf to hear. It is your iniquities that have separated you from your God, and your sins that have hidden His face from you, so that He does not hear. - Isaiah 59:1-2

I hope you do not cause hurt by speaking words that should not be spoken due to praying carelessly and being led carelessly, or by ruining things out of impatience. The greatest mistake is arbitrary interpretation. Comparing yourself and becoming a victim is not the Lord's will. You must look to the Lord alone with faith.

Yesterday, we prayed for Japan at our prayer meeting. Japan's great suffering may be due to idolatry and sin. But is Korea any better? When the Jews asked about the deaths of many people during the construction of the Siloam pool, Jesus said, "Unless you repent, you too will perish in the same way." Christians must feel a responsibility towards Japan. If our prayers and love are insufficient, more people will suffer. God's primary expectation is not of a fallen world, but of Christians who intercede within it. Let us pray for Japan and for ourselves.
How grateful we are! That we can pray... Prayer transcends borders and regions, is not returned like an unwanted gift, and even transcends time.
I am praying for essays, jobs, health, visas, finances, especially tuition, relationships, family, marriage, and vision. Be bold.
Your Rights You have the right to be truly happy and to receive intercession and prayer wherever you are and whatever you do. That is the duty of a minister who risks their life.

Do not worry. Do not worry, but in everything, by prayer and supplication with thanksgiving, let your requests be made known to God. This is what truth demands. It is impossible with my conviction and dedication alone. Therefore, in Acts chapter 1, the Lord said, "But you will receive power when the Holy Spirit comes on you..."

* Life is a Message Clearly command your disciples to pray earnestly for them and to live great lives. It is to say, "Follow the Lord alone, just as I, who have become a teacher, do." Considering all that was profitable as loss... so that I may be found in Christ... - Philippians 2 I have prayed that your faith may not fail... - Luke 22:32

In spiritual warfare, the most alert people and groups are affected first because they are on the front lines. First are the mission fields, and second are the intercessory prayer warriors. There is no need to be surprised by trials. It is a wrong fast for a wrong god.
Transforming souls is not my work. I must fully and completely entrust it to the Lord. That is why we pray and believe for them.

* The Power to Advance The reason believers advance is not because circumstances permit, but because they change circumstances through prayer. The Lord is amazing. Pray for great things for great things.

* The Reason for Not Rejoicing Do not complain about what you do not have, but be thankful for what you already have and for your daily bread. You will receive more joy as a gift, and other things will be added. Give us this day our daily bread... - The Lord's Prayer

* Pass the Night Like This You must pray for Jesus to be your light in the darkness. The darkness covering you means you have no other option, and that the Lord will be your light. When you pass through darkness, the Lord will be your light.
* Fly rather than Survive Soar beyond mere survival. Therefore, offer different prayers, different worship, and different devotion. That is my calling. We are not just holding on...

Before saying you are lacking, try praying first. Retreating by saying you are lacking is the easiest way, but also the worst choice. If you are lacking, you must come to the Lord and be entrusted to Him. Lord, I entrust my barley-bread-like life to You. Living life without prayer is like a train trying to move without rails.
There are no coincidences. There is only thorough guidance. I hope you will cast aside "what if" and walk the prepared path firmly through prayer. I will not compare myself or wander.
Do not pursue your desires, but pray earnestly for God's will to be done. The Lord will anoint your prayers. Because it is an intention supported by God.

In the midst of suffering like Job, having lost everything and in complete darkness, if the Lord were to ask me what I want, I would ask that all the land I tread upon would worship Him. I would say, let me see it covered by His precious blood. Let the place where I stand become a holy place, and let it be permeated with His fragrance.

Our Lord God, worthy of all great glory and honor, God who is here now... God is faithful and holy. We listen to praise together, hold hands, and pray. Now I worry about others. When they say they are so grateful because things have improved... they say no, they are grateful because you prayed for them. The Lord hears our prayers.
When we pray, God begins to work.

All that we cannot do is not a material for despair, but a 'subject for prayer.' Therefore, we must earnestly pray for the 'power of prayer' and for guidance in the most important thing we cannot do with our own strength: 'to pray.' Pray to pray.

Our lives were so difficult and hard that I began to pray with the young people for grace and power. In that short day, God poured out grace that had been prepared from long ago. I thought I loved Him truly, but I love Him more, hold Him closer to my heart, and shed more tears.
We must pray for another opportunity to give ourselves to the Lord. To be faithful in life and to become a model in death.

We pray without knowing, but the Lord works with knowledge. We pray inefficiently, but the Lord works with maximum efficiency. We simply lift our hands, but the Lord covers us with His immense hands. We ultimately entrust ourselves, but the Lord engages in unimaginable micro-management of that prayer. Lord, take care of it. Deeply~~~

Our prayers do not bother God. Rather, they give Him glory. The Lord will surely hear our prayers. If Jesus is my Lord, there is no reason why He would not hear. When the name of Jesus is exalted, God the Father rejoices most and will do what pleases Him. Whatever you ask in my name, I will do, so that the Father may be glorified in the Son. If you ask anything in my name, I will do it. John 14:13,14
I hope you learn how to love the human heart, which is wider than the universe and more delicate than a flower petal. That is to ask the Lord. Love without understanding is pain.

The most effective way to teach prayer to young people, who commit sins that don't feel like sins but are great sins, is to enter the furnace of prayer together. Also, if the Lord grants grace and we pray, He kindly leads those who would die without prayer into situations where they feel they would die if they didn't pray. Prayer empowers us with the Holy Spirit, crushes the devil's works, and makes difficult tasks easy. To cease praying is a sin.

Grumbling comes from the victim. However, when you pray, forgiveness and blessings become possible instead of grumbling. This is because what you desire becomes reality, and the victim becomes a beneficiary, and even a helper.

If you desire something but do not ask for it, it is not a desire. If you say you love someone but do not pray for them, you do not love them. A life that does not earnestly desire or passionately love is disliked even in worldly enterprises.
After the Monday dawn prayer meeting, there is a gathering at Starbucks. I will prepare breakfast and we will have a lively conversation at an appropriate place.

Answers require time and patience. This does not mean that God is limited by time, but rather that we need time to let go more, cut away more, and burn away more to become vessels worthy of receiving the Lord's answer. That time is the Lord's "faithful care." If you let go of attachment, you will receive an answer.
I bless and pray for all who are laboring, striving, and running the race of faith at this moment. The good God will give you the best. Let us give thanks.

Pray like this, and you will see the glory of the Lord. If the glory is great, you will overcome suffering abundantly. 1. Ask for what you need with thanksgiving. (Philippians 4:6, Psalm 50:23, Paul's prayer) 2. Pray to be shown glory. (Exodus 33:18, Moses' prayer) 3. Ask for a hearing heart, that is, wisdom. (1 Kings 3:9, Solomon's prayer) 4. Pray that my will be broken and your will be done. (Mark 14:36, Jesus' prayer)
We give thanks, honor, and glory to the Lord who has given us such lovely members and hears our prayers. Lord who works! I love you.

I will be preaching a special lecture on "The Cross and Life" at this retreat. As I prepare for this, I have this thought: Stand there together. I have decided not to minister alone because the Lord told me to do it together. I hope you will pray with me and stand with me for that ministry. I will proclaim it from that place, but before the Lord, I will stand with you, our young people. Please pray for me. It is Wednesday at 9 AM.
Now that I've finished my day's work, I'm off to pray!
The best way to respond to incomprehensible moments is to ask the Lord. God, what should I learn through this?

When you go through the pain of life, pray like this: God, humble me more. That is the fastest way to get through the tunnel. Humble yourself. God opposes the proud and does not allow anyone to be so. Remember that the Lord your God led you through the wilderness for forty years, to humble you and to test you, to know what was in your heart and whether you would keep his commandments or not. Deuteronomy 8:2
To live on your knees while working and studying, your life must be incredibly simple.
To live on your knees while working and studying, your life must be incredibly simple. Jesus was a layman who traveled with fishermen and tax collectors, and he prayed according to his custom.
Well, now for Lesson 8 of the beginner's course... This will probably be my last Bible study with LG. I pray that the Lord's will be done. I also request prayer.

Only those who despair of themselves will seek the Holy Spirit. They will experience the gap between the cross and their own selves and cry out to the Lord. It is Saturday. Let's gather and pray at 6 o'clock.

Holy tears that break oneself control the lusts of the flesh, extinguish the fires of discord, cleanse impure desires, lower proud eyes, refrain from vain talk, pursue intimate fellowship, love silence, and bear the fruit of prayer.
Praying for the Lord's will to be done rather than for your own desires to be fulfilled is the fastest and most peaceful path.

There are times when what you do seems insignificant and your role feels worthless. At those times, the demon of "comparison" will surely visit you. When a person begins to compare, hell begins immediately. At that time, please offer this prayer: God, fulfill your will for me. I came for this, and I want to fulfill your plan. A person who fulfills God's will has no need to compare, because it is not my work, but the Lord's work.
The Lord does not give you trouble again for problems that are free and laid before the Lord. This is because you do not need to retake a subject that you have passed.

They regain their self-esteem and open doors to employment at the last minute, and give bright light amidst much suffering and frustration. The word "restoration" seemed to exist only in books, but it also appears in life. So today, I run, to pray.

Proverbs 6:27 Can a man carry fire next to his body without his clothes being burned? Forgiveness is the prerequisite for the Lord's love. Prayer offered while hiding bitterness is only frustrating. If you love the Lord, you must forgive and let them go.

Instead of despairing because of obstacles, you should ask the Lord how you can be faithful where you are and prostrate yourself. You must pray, receive direction, and obey. If you handle even such insignificant tasks with faithfulness and loyalty, God's will will be accomplished in God's time and in God's way.
I plan to go on a fast and prayer for two weeks starting tomorrow. Please pray for me :-)

If a Zerg player decides to do a Lurker timing rush on a relatively close map, they will be defeated even though they know it's coming. It is easy to listen to Satan's deceptions, even though we know he is deceiving us. It is too human, too persuasive. I hope you will listen to the Lord's voice.
Evening prayer at 7:30 PM @Missionary House. For my sake, for my lips... Lord, may you be glorified. We will have easy prayers. Easy prayer means praying continuously and sufficiently.
After praying for two and a half hours in the evening and returning home, you will realize that there is no time to waste in life. Now, expect an anointing for your studies and career.
I pray that you would grant me the gift of motivation. The time given is 5 minutes.
To the Almighty Father, open your mouth and cry out in prayer.
Please put on the full armor of God. The angels delivering prayers and my co-workers will do the same. The answers to prayer will be swift.
There is something I constantly implore in my youth. It is that no matter where the Lord sends me, I will not go like a dry twig. I want the Lord's anointing. That was the only condition.

In my personal experience, God rarely works in the ways we expect. People think a raft is the only solution at the Red Sea, and returning to slavery is the way. No one thought there was a way through the sea. A way that had never existed before, the Lord shows it when you pray desperately. It is a secret, hidden from the world until now. Call to me and I will answer you and tell you great and hidden things you have not known. - Jeremiah 33:3
I am a little late. Please pray.
It's a little late, but Happy New Year. I pray that the Lord will be with you in all that you do. And thank you always for the good words through Facebook. ^^
Everyone wishes and prays to meet a good spouse. If I meet a good spouse, what is the sin of the person who met unprepared me? Therefore, I must first seek to become a good spouse.

Sin hinders our spiritual growth. If you cannot control sin, your spiritual growth stops. Even if you receive much grace, if you repeatedly sin and fall back, it is like pouring water into a broken jar. Come and pray. So that the Lord can touch you.
The fact is that the Lord wants to hear my prayers.

The prayer 'Lord, mold me' gives a very brief sweet dating period, then crushes all my stubbornness and puts me through a fiery furnace. If you asked to be molded, you should be molded. It is the fastest way. For I know the plans I have for you," declares the Lord, "plans to prosper you and not to harm you, plans to give you hope and a future. Then you will call on me and come and pray to me, and I will listen to you. You will seek me and find me when you seek me with all your heart. - Jeremiah 29:11, 13
Lord, bombard us with Your holiness.
Entrust yourselves into the Lord's hands. So that the Lord's hands may hold you.
I love and intercede in the Lord. Ignore and keep going.
The person who kneels before the Lord the longest is the person who stands the firmest.
Be a person who kneels before the Lord for a long time. You will be the person who stands the firmest.
Lord, I have no intention of stopping until I have finished the race I am to run. Grant me strength to run further. Here I am.

Whether I live or die is not my concern. My eternal purpose is to love and serve You, so grant me Your sufficient grace, the grace to fulfill that purpose. If my life is long, I will serve and praise You all my days, and if my life is short, I will joyfully go to Your throne and worship You. According to my eager expectation and hope, I will not be put to shame in anything, but will boldly proclaim Christ in my body, whether by life or by death. - Philippians 1:20
Lord, You know what I truly long for in the end. I want to be accepted by You.

If you do not maintain an intimate encounter with the Lord, secret times become times of sin. However, for those who have had a deep encounter with the Lord, secret times become the most profound and noble times of grace.
I give my heart to the Lord.
Give your heart to the Lord every moment. Then the Lord will give you His heart. It is offered with a broken heart, and the Father's heart comes upon it.

The statement that the Lord is faithful is not based on my circumstances or qualifications. He is faithful because He is faithful, and prayer is relying on His eternally unchanging character. Success without Jesus is not success. Therefore, failure in Jesus is not failure. You who are in Jesus can never fail.

I want the Lord to give me a burning thirst. A thirst so intense that nothing else can satisfy it, a heart so desperate that imitations cannot resolve it, a heart so parched that only the Lord can fill it. I love You, Lord.
I am happy that I have many people to pray for me. It means I have many loved ones.

Let us look only to the Lord. Even now, the Lord searches the whole earth to show His strength to those who look only to Him (those who turn to Him with all their heart, 2 Chronicles 16:9). Dead fish float downstream. But live fish swim against the current. May all who pray have the strength to go against the path everyone else takes, the strength to live against history, the strength to live with values contrary to the times.

We ask for your vote for our precious brother Moon Hong in the Lord. This is an opportunity for him to receive a professional team trial. Please go to the link below, click on the "Leaderboard" tab, and you will see a list of names. Currently in 5th place, next to Hong Moon, click "Add your vote" and just enter your email. We ask for your favor! https://apps.facebook.com/winaprocontract/?fb_source=bookmark_apps&ref=bookmarks&count=0&fb_bmpos=2_0
They say prayer is like breathing. Because nothing happens naturally without the Lord's help. Everything is by the Lord's boundless grace. Pray continually - 1 Thessalonians 5:16
The Lord always hears our prayers. He knows our hearts and our circumstances. Because He Himself fashioned our innermost being.
When I encounter the Lord, even if I am at work or school, I kneel and pray and repent. Peter knelt and repented among his many colleagues and in his workplace. Stand before the Lord.

A person who truly relies on the Lord and prays is already blessed, satisfied, and answered with the Lord's likeness. And I--in righteousness I will see your face; when I awake, I will be satisfied with seeing your likeness. Psalm 17:15

It is far better to perish in the Lord than to have problems solved without the Lord's help. If the Lord does not help, nothing can help. Even if symptoms are not alleviated by human methods, changes of atmosphere, or justifications, if the prayer the Lord requests deepens, the problem disappears, and it is enough to walk with the Lord. "Lord, I prayed because my heart ached, but now I am satisfied with You, so let Your will be done. My soul is satisfied because of You." "Unless the Lord builds the house, the builders labor in vain. Unless the Lord watches over the city, the guards stand watch in vain." (Psalm 127:1) "My lord the king, help me. The king said, If the Lord does not help you, what can I do to help you?" (2 Chronicles 6:26, 27)

Following the Lord's will is not a game of chance with expectations of greed. It is praying and quietly seeking the Lord's guidance. If you walk by the Spirit, you will not fulfill the desires of the flesh.

It is time to pray for the Lord's will to be fully accomplished in my life. Starting to pray is not from tomorrow's early morning service, next week's evening prayer, or next month's all-night prayer meeting. If so, you will never be able to pray. Pray right now, as soon as you see this message, right where you are. Only then can you hold onto prayer and accomplish the Lord's will.
I want to seek the Lord's face and surrender completely.

We will take time to hear the Lord's voice. I hope that in small groups, you will intercede and bless your fellow members with the heart the Lord gives you. When you live your faith in a place where such prayer requests become unnatural, you will deeply appreciate again how special God's grace bestowed upon you is.
There is a necessary prayer that seeks the Lord's presence, and there is a war that can only be won with the Lord's presence. Now is the time to pray.
I have heard your prayer and seen your tears - 2 Kings 20:5. God hears and sees. This means that when He hears and sees, He accomplishes all things.
When the Lord promises to answer prayer, it does not mean He will tailor the problem to my taste. It means He will review and handle it with God's wisdom.

When the Lord wants to meet us very, very much, He sometimes makes everyone leave. Do not feel lonely because you are alone; accept it as the Lord's special invitation for a date. I hope your heart will be stirred by meeting the Lord, not by meeting people.

The policy regarding youth is generally to act according to your faith. It means not exceeding your strength but acting according to grace. However, there is something I want to do beyond my strength. There is something that requires intense focus, like fire in your eyes. It means you must be strong in seizing opportunities. That is to save souls. Please serve the missionaries who are coming with all your strength and sincerity. I hope it will be a comfort and strength to those who are fighting death, curses, and spiritual warfare in distant lands to save souls. Those who lay down their lives for the Lord are precious. Those who serve such people are equally precious. Such dedication is precious, and those who recognize such dedication are also precious. Please decide on offerings, dedication, and prayer. As a youth leader, this is my first strong request. For this day, I have often not been active in other requests. Above all, I challenge you for the sake of souls and yourselves.

Clutching my empty stomach, I fasted and prayed earnestly with all my might. However, it is the Lord who transforms us and meets us, and He alone is sovereign. Without the Lord's grace, no religious act is of any use. I earnestly pray again for the Lord's presence to be granted on that day.

There is a saying, "whip the running horse." It means to add a whip to a running horse. Even after the Saturday meeting ministry ends, the Lord's work continues. Among the friends who have returned home, I pray more and bow down more so that the Holy Spirit continues to touch them and dwell in their words and thoughts. The Lord is still working, and the minister runs further seeing it.
I run towards Your word. Fierce prayer and answers like fire.
When we seek the Lord's face, God comes with grace that washes and restores us. Therefore, we must always seek the Lord with our hearts.

The wind of the Spirit blows upon those who long for the Lord's house. The wind of the Spirit enables us to pray what we cannot, repent what we cannot, forgive what we cannot, and worship what we cannot. Not by strength or power, but by the Spirit alone...

When we are made to intercede, a compassionate heart is poured out. This is because prayer is done with the Father's heart. God's heart towards the weak and 부족한 us is 'compassion.' An intercessor is someone who shares their heart with God. Therefore, they must be someone who loves. Burning love...
If you intercede, you will make them repent, even if it means striking them with lightning. That is a miracle.
While interceding, God Himself is the King of this retreat.
Please embrace about three times more than you do now. It may cause some muscle soreness to embrace, but you will experience a much more flexible and abundant work.

At this very moment, I pray for friends who are earnestly asking about the path of life, friends who cannot sleep and are working and studying, and friends who cannot find rest because they have too many thoughts. Let us pray.

I ask for intercessory prayer for the members who are working late at this hour, those who are staying up all night under immense pressure due to exams, and those who are far away for various reasons. When love is the motive, miracles happen. May there be peace in their souls, strength in their bodies, and victory in their endeavors. I bless you all in the Lord's name.

Just because we have done well so far does not mean our strength was great. Therefore, even when we become experts in a field, we should never become complacent or treat it lightly. While studying and working, we must earnestly seek the Lord's help and also ask for prayer.
Now is the time to pray.
I pray that the Lord's good hand will help this, the best offer on earth.

I want to be a loving father at home after going to work and coming back, and I run with all my might in tireless prayer meetings with the youth in the evenings, and yet I work overtime until dawn, but my desire is to run more towards the Lord. So that no one can stop me.

To offer true prayer, time must be invested in gathering the heart and remaining in His presence for deep fellowship. However, this is difficult at first. It is because it is a spiritual matter. The desires of the flesh do not allow it. We will be in danger and lose peace and fail in balanced relationships if we do not spend enough time in a secret place. The light of one who fellowships with the Lord in a secret place will not fade even in daily life.

True discernment is having God's perspective. You can see if you approach with compassion or with condemnation and anger. If you first pray with all your heart and convey your sincerity, God will allow His will to be done.

For a true person of God, presence is prioritized over achievement. Before facing Goliath, David had the meditation and prayer contained in the humble shepherd's 'Psalms.' Before opening today, bow before the Lord and seek Him, not His blessing. God and rejoicing in Him is my strength.
Above all, please forgive this situation. And offer it to the Lord. The Lord is almighty. Acknowledge His sovereignty.
If you truly want to love and help someone, please pray like this: "God, help me to serve according to the heart You have given me and the method You have intended."

The most difficult person is a stubborn person. It is the same from the devil's perspective. A person who tells God everything, no matter how trivial, and consults Him, a person who reports every single second repeatedly even though the Lord already knows everything without needing to be told. Such a person will probably be unbearable. Devil: I'm having a hard time too, and we're even now, so I won't bother you, let's just call a truce here! Saint: Lord! The devil says he's having a hard time too and wants a truce, but he won't leave. Destroy him. Destroy, destroy, destroy... keep destroying him.

Social skills teach you how to interact with people. They have a temporary effect. However, the absolute, life-defining relationships are formed through prayer. If a person pleases God with their actions, He is a God of power who reconciles even enemies. God is the Lord of all relationships.
You must pray the first prayer. Look at the cross and give thanks. Then pray for a heart to pray. Prayer is not done as you please.

At first, you pray not to fall apart. It's like grasping at straws. Then, in the midst of the storm, when I meet the Almighty God, I feel like it's okay to fall apart. Not only am I at peace, but I am even bold.
This is how young people want to pray.

Youth group ministry pattern: 1. Eat, listen to the word, pray, eat, listen to the word, pray, put them to sleep, wake them up again, feed them, listen to the word, pray, and then they go home. 2. When they return, they gather and eat a lot. (Kimchi stew or Jjamppong + etc.) 3. And then they share.

If you don't pray enough, you will end up blaming others. You react sensitively to personality, reactions, and words, and above all, you cannot entrust everything to God. When you pray, He quiets my soul. Because I know who the Master is.
O Lord, my strength, I love you. - Prayer 7:30
When it is dark, I have no options to choose from. I can only make room for the Lord to work and cry out in prayer.
Christians do not live by competition, but by answers. Competition requires constant comparison and attack, but prayer saves me and others.

Christians should not only be filled with the Spirit of God with wisdom, understanding, and knowledge, but also research for skillful work. Last Wednesday morning after the holiday, I pray to be a light in the world with diligence, wisdom, and excellence.

If a Christian says they love but does not pray unconditionally and continuously, they are only interesting in spirit. The beginning and end of loving with actions and truth must be earnest intercession.
A leader is one who worries about and prays for the concerns and problems of others as if they were their own.

Saturday Meeting: Without holiness, no one will see the Lord. Without holiness, you live powerless. A Christian who cannot see the Lord, how can they be salt and light without encountering Him? 1. Pay the price. Daniel prioritized prayer and worship in his life to the point of risking his life. He maintained holiness and demonstrated God's power while living abroad, working, and immigrating. 2. You are sanctified by the word and prayer. Dwell in the word and prayer with a heart that pays the price. 3. You are sanctified by the precious blood and the Holy Spirit. Holiness means being set apart for God. Humans cannot create it. It is only possible through the blood of the Lamb and the outpouring of the Holy Spirit. Holiness is God's will, and He hears prayers according to His will.
Really..., was that necessary?..., look to the Lord one more time in that time.

Especially for the co-workers who are preparing and laboring for today's Sunday ministry, I pray that all situations and ministries will be fully governed by the Lord's mighty hand through His lordship. Fear, anxiety, and worry will recede, and only what the Lord permits and does under His sovereignty will be accomplished. The Lord desires it more earnestly than we do.

Do not panic, but give thanks. You will enjoy peace amidst anxiety. Do not be anxious about anything, but in everything, by prayer and supplication with thanksgiving, let your requests be made known to God. Philippians 4:6
May the peace of God overflow in your life...

There are no miracles in times of peace. Miracles come from hospitals, emergencies, and desperate crises. It's not that there are problems, but only prayer requests. Let prayer work. Let prayer arise. Ignite prayer. When prayer overflows, peace comes, and when peace comes, you will surely receive an answer. I hope you become people of faith who sweep away the obstacles blocking your life with overflowing prayer.
The premise of peace: Your will be done. - Matthew 6:10
Release, and what you release on earth will be released in heaven.

Unresolved problems actually protect me. They make me pray and help me avoid wrong choices through deep providence. The princes of the Philistines were angry with him. The princes of the Philistines said to him, "Send this man back to the place to which the king has appointed him, and let him not go down with us to the battle, lest in the battle he become an adversary to us. For with what could this man reconcile himself to his master, if not with the heads of these men? Is not this David, of whom they sang to one another in dances, 'Saul has struck down his thousands, and David his ten thousands'?" - 1 Samuel 29:4,5 Through the opposition of the Philistine officials, God protected the man who was to become king from becoming an enemy of Israel while he was in exile.
God, give me the strength to run for Your glory in this world today.

God, give courage to friends who need courage, and peace to friends who need peace. I pray that You will be a source of strength to friends who are struggling at this time. We desperately need the Lord.
God, if I keep waiting like this... I'm going to die. God: Hmm!!? ......., (He's still not dead... what a guy...) Kids~~ turn up the heat.
God, I pray that You will grant grace so that the least of us can pour out everything one more time.

Without being close to God, or rather, without becoming one with Him, truth cannot be achieved. The only way to become one is through prayer and the word. If this is not happening, stop serving and ministering and remain in the word and prayer. You are sanctified by the word and prayer. 1 Timothy 4:5
Prayer is listening to the Holy Spirit preach to me.

We must earnestly pray for God to give us the necessary gifts and tools. However, when we focus on and obey His calling without just waiting for these things, God is pleased and begins to fill us with everything. It is the calling, not the tools.
Offer your heart to God. You will dislike enjoying other sins due to an immeasurable sense of happiness. Those who give their whole heart have the happiness of their whole heart.

Sometimes God gives us a humble heart. At that time, you must redesign your life. You must change it to a structure of kneeling and intimately meeting the Lord. If you miss that moment, you will have to wait another 10 years. Iron is transformed when it is heated red hot and struck. Give me a humble heart.
What God needs to guide me is not 'my opinion' but prayer and obedience.
God has not answered all my prayers. If He had, I would have married someone else and married multiple times.

God will use our youth group. He will awaken the continent and spread revival like wildfire. He will pour out grace beyond our imagination and thoughts, so that all will marvel. We must continue to pray for human merit to disappear and for the Lord's sovereignty to be established. Please move forward with the belief that the Lord will surely work. What we must hold onto is humility until the end and not being deceived by Satan. I hope you will decide not to react to darkness and respond with a relinquishment of rights and an opposing spirit. May we become youths who set this land ablaze through sacrificial worship and costly sacrifice, continuing to pray for one another. I want to live that way, even if it's just for one day of ministry.
God hears everything and knows everything. If God knows, He will also provide the solution. If you hastily pursue your own methods, it will only worsen the situation, not resolve it.
The life I want to share with the youth through all my ministry can be surprisingly simply summarized: "Preach and pray, be a witness every day" - Hymn 505.

God answers even our groans because He is merciful. However, He does not hold up every weak person. If you complain when you are weak, you will be ruined. Instead, if you praise Him, He will give you strength.
God loves us, who are insignificant. To those who tell Him everything in detail before the Lord, He sends His word to heal, restore, and strengthen them.
The common characteristic that occurs in everyone who seeks God's will is 'answered prayer.'
May my heart be wounded by things that wound God's heart.

Become God's ace. Be someone who can completely change the flow of the game with your appearance. Trust the Lord who holds onto and transforms the person I have pleaded and prayed for, and entrusted to the Lord. May you become brave warriors of faith who open new heavens with faith by reaching out your hands and bowing your heads to the Lord amidst difficult environments and circumstances. Send down fire, the fire of the Spirit upon me...

God will surely accomplish things in His own way. Therefore, now is the time to seek the Lord in all your circumstances. You must call out to the Lord and tell Him exactly how you feel in this situation.

To live according to God's will, you must hear His voice. To decide and live without praying means to live by the voice of the world and darkness. If you truly desire to please God and obey Him, it is strange that you cannot hear His voice.

If God does not help, no one can help. Even if people help and use tricks, it will ultimately end in tragedy and ruin. Pray and obey so that God can help you. Go and tell Hezekiah, "This is what the Lord, the God of your father David, says: 'I have heard your prayer and seen your tears; I will add fifteen years to your life. And I will deliver you and this city from the hand of the king of Assyria. I will defend this city.'" - Isaiah 38:5, 6.

God did not design humans to worry. Naturally, the worries that come to us are not within our capacity. However, if you worry, your 'purpose has been changed,' causing immense wear and tear on the product (human) and eventually breaking it.
