'Do not be anxious about anything, but in every situation, by prayer and petition, with thanksgiving, present your requests to God' (Philippians 4:6) → All your worries should be used as fuel for the altar of prayer. 'But seek first his kingdom and his righteousness, and all these things will be given to you as well' (Matthew 6:33) → If you strive in the Lord's work, worries will disappear. Are you worried? It means you have spare time.

When humans try to solve things that God should work on, it is called 'worrying.' Statistics show that we can only deal with about 4% of the things that happen to us. Ultimately, if something cannot be resolved after about 15 minutes of deliberation, you must coolly entrust it to prayer.
You can make contradictory prayers that God cannot answer. Like this: "God, please give me patience, right now~~~"
If the sorrow and anguish are not from God, I hope you will reject them. If that is difficult, I hope you will ask for the 'ability to ignore them.'

It is quite abnormal to boast only about good restaurants, gifts, and entertainment for a date, yet have no interest or appreciation for the person you love. We pray not just for answers, but because we love being with the Lord. If you seek His face, not just His hand, He will take care of other things and heal you.
It is good to do the prayers God has commanded, the ministry He has assigned, the encounters He has allowed, and the efforts He has asked for. The Lord will handle everything else.

Our Father in heaven~ Our Lord God, the God who is present here, worthy of all great glory and honor - Almighty Father God, this land of Europe needs Your reign. Only You can heal and restore us. We seek Your face. Come and dwell upon us~ For Yours is the kingdom and the power and the glory forever. Amen. * May all the members earnestly pray with longing for the cloud of God's glory to cover our tabernacle on that day.
You are not alone when you are struggling. Because God loves you and watches over you, He moves another soul to share that heart and kneel in earnest prayer.
I visited the rock in Korea where I sought wisdom in my youth and prayed. True wisdom is not about having what you lack, but about enjoying what you have.
Brother Hanseok has been discharged from the hospital. However, intercession continues. We will win until the end.
Thank you for praying for Hanseok. He has improved remarkably, and we give glory to God with the word 'miracle.' Thank you so much. The Lord is wonderful.

Do not be discouraged if you feel you have nothing specific to do. Can't you find people connected to you and pray for them, bless them, and forgive them? These things do not originate from your own strength and ability, but from the heart God has poured into you.

I bless the members and leaders who have been with us. Thank you for following along without complaint for this challenging 14-hour meeting. I give glory especially to the Lord who was with us in prayer and talk.
Turning the absence of the Spirit into His presence is earnest prayer.

Grant clear wisdom and a spirit of revelation amidst confusion, and grant new strength, excitement, and emotion to my weary body and mind. Send someone to preach the gospel to my family back home, and connect me with experts and helping hands to resolve complex legal issues and tangled problems. Grant healing to my physical body, especially pouring the oil of Your healing upon my knees. Fill the emptiness and purposelessness in my heart with Your truth and meaning. Grant me rest in You, not being chased by issues of work and visa. Grant healing to my wrists and joints and cover me with love. Fill my loneliness with Your timing and entrust all my endeavors to You alone, looking only to You. Overcome human ambition with calling and act without light or name. May the heart of judgment and condemnation depart, and may I serve like You with love, mercy, and compassion. Turn things around in my studies, let me meet helping hands, and perform miracles. In situations that are utterly impossible from a human perspective, grant the necessary and prepared power. Guide my path on where to serve You, whether in England or Korea. Pour out upon me the ability to carry out this task. Grant harmony to my parents and open the door of finances to my family. Refine me and establish me as a leader who serves souls, and equip me. May anxiety and worry melt away in the name of Jesus. Deliver me from the temptation of sin and greed, and satisfy me with You alone. May the powerful Lord pour out upon me the ability I can handle. With a heart of concern these days, I pray for my friends like this.
I must go to a depth where I can find peace. That is losing myself in the Lord's great love in a solitary room where no one else is.
When you pray in tribulation, help comes from unexpected places. Sometimes even unbelievers help. The Lord's help cannot be limited.
Spilled water cannot turn a water wheel. Yesterday's grace cannot be today's, nor can yesterday's manna sustain us today. I hope we become fellow believers who humbly kneel and look to the Lord.
When things are difficult, you should pray like this: God, deal with me and humble me further.
Not praying because things are difficult is like saying you won't eat because you're hungry. The secret to quickly becoming happy is to quickly break the cycle of viciousness.

People say they will give up because things are difficult. Before saying it's difficult, you should pray and then speak. This is not being shot down while flying, but falling over on the ground after crawling. Without prayer, you don't even have the right to say things are difficult.

If you pray for 5 minutes, it seems like there will be 5 minutes of work, and if you pray for 10 minutes, 10 minutes of work. That is not the case. He works all at once. He works with low cost and high efficiency. That is why the expression "building up" appears in the Bible. Romans 2:5

* Christians have two options when they see structural evil and injustice in the church: either they simply ignore it, stir up public opinion, or take physical action. The way the church changes the world is, first, through prayer, because the Lord is the master. Then, listening to the Lord's word on how to approach the world, we must protest (appeal) with God's character. Through continuous intercessory prayer, we are guided to specific actions. When the Lord speaks and guides, we can raise our voice. While feeling compassion and love, we must simultaneously hate sin and not tolerate injustice.

Praying only for the problem when encountering a problem is the faith of a child. Behind the problem, God is there. If you pray for His will to be done, you will experience it being resolved in His way within it. You should ask like this: "God, what must I learn through this problem, and what will do You want me to accomplish?"
Not everything is conveyed by speaking. It is the Lord who must do it. Therefore, the principle of ministry is prayer first. Before leaving this city, you must first be filled with the Holy Spirit.
Do not worry about things you cannot do; instead, obey what you can do. Proceed with prayer and thanksgiving only.

Paul taught that if received with thanksgiving, nothing is to be rejected, because it is made holy through prayer and the Word. Ultimately, change, as we experience it, does not happen when we try to please others, but when prayer and the Word are concentrated. I feel that the current prayer meetings are saving many lives and that the Lord is pleased.
Prayer is difficult because we do it little. Prayer becomes sweet when we do it a lot.
When much has collapsed, the prayer is this: God, let me do what I must do now. That is the answer to fulfill my mission and remain in the Lord.
I intercede for our young people who face problems like tangled threads that cannot be expressed in words. Be bold.

If I reduce the time spent praying, singing, and listening to the Word, my life will become more abundant and efficient. No. Your life will not become abundant; rather, it will become impoverished because of it.
Pray at 7:30 @ Mission Education Center.

Looking back, I realize I worried and suffered needlessly. Everything is resolved and solved within the Lord's grace, yet I worry about future events prematurely. We should not worry more than we pray earnestly. The Lord will accomplish it.
I pray because I know what I want and how earnestly I want it.
Do not stop. Persistence becomes true strength. Continue intercession and love without ceasing.
I hope our friends become victors in relationships. Seek boldness and wisdom.
The leader tries to do ministry well. If they just don't interfere, there will be revival. Let me not be a hindrance, but a servant of obedience.

Fasting, roaring, and crying out is a painful thing. However, the result is a transformation of life. If you sow with tears, you will surely reap with joy. That harvest will be received not as wealth, but as life.

Many people send me support and I pray because I long for their love. As prayer deepens, the thought eventually arises that it's okay if everyone else abandons me, because Jesus alone is enough. After receiving this answer, other relationships are also resolved. If you cling, you will lose.
The reason for fasting is not to change the circumstances. It is, above all, to change oneself. Fasting for a long time means that you need to change a lot. As you change, the path will also open.

Things I cannot control are not my domain; it means God must do them. That is why Jacob, at the Jabbok River, did not strategize to fight Esau's 400 men, but appealed to God. How simple it is: what to obey and what to pray for! A simple life given by the Lord. Simple, flexible, intense!
I must pray to pray to beautifully fulfill the Lord's will for me. Because there is One who guides and helps prayer. Powerful prayer begins there.
The greatest prayer is the confession of love for the Lord and the prayer to fulfill His will.
We must increasingly ask for the Lord's intervention, governance, and dealing. So that we may see the Lord's glory in this dark world.

Whether praying on a street corner, or alone in a frantically busy desk, confessing "I rely on the Lord!" like a madman, or even pleading with just a look for the Lord's help amidst unbearable pressure, the Lord sees and hears it all. He cannot possibly turn away from us whom He redeemed with the blood of His Son's cross.
Also, effectively intercede for the lambs in distress, saying, "Lord, govern them..." If the Lord governs that soul, He makes rivers in the desert and flowers bloom in the wilderness.

Please offer the shortest but most intense intercessory prayer. "Lord, deal with him/her." Prayer is simple, but the Lord who applies it is astonishing in His work of making humans by going around the entire earth...
The last words of Jesus, who loved them to the end, were for His disciples to stay awake and pray so they would not fall into temptation, and that He would intercede so their faith would not fail.

*Prayer tips for a spouse! 1. Wherever they are now, fill them with the Holy Spirit, and if they are unbelievers, lead them to the path of faith. 2. When we meet, let us recognize each other so we do not make mistakes driven by emotion or calculate driven by reason. 3. Let me be attractive and lovable, so that I can discover the inner self that others cannot see, and so that I can be that kind of meaning to that person.

*The mission of a minister is to pray to become a person who lives for the Lord even in life and dies for the Lord even in death, or to intercede so that lukewarm people who are neither one nor the other can never die peacefully.

*Spiritual play. Airplanes are made to fly. But if you lose absolute speed and distance (prayer), you are worse than a bicycle. You go grocery shopping at Tesco in an airplane, causing inconvenience with your large wings when parking. The devil's challenges are so strong that people are in an uproar, saying they were hit hard and fell into temptation, crashing. What crash are you talking about when you haven't flown at the absolute speed of prayer? You've just been spinning in the parking lot and hit by stones thrown by neighborhood punks. What spiritual warfare are you talking about without praying for an hour? You're just engaged in spiritual play.

You must pray when going through a painful wilderness. Pray like this: "Humble me further." You will achieve the purpose of that wilderness most effectively and quickly. (Deuteronomy 8:16) He fed you in the wilderness with manna that your fathers had not known, to humble you and to test you, that in the end he might do you good.
Tell me what you pray for, not what you want. I am interested in that, because it will come to pass.
When you pray in the wilderness, change happens. The greatest beneficiary is yourself. Your stubbornness is broken, and the Lord is revealed and humbled.
I know what I want, therefore I pray again.
If you do not pray, you become a swindler.

The word "opponent" exists. It means the person you are facing. However, a person of faith does not face opponents. We must always face the eternal Father, who is our only concern and solution. Then you will experience the Lord's dominion over challenges, whether they involve people, rumors, or realities, whether they exist or not. God called David a man after His own heart because he was a man who knelt and prayed and pleaded before problems. Though I love them, they oppose me. I pray. (Psalm 109:4)
Rather than having a specific method of prayer, just try it. If there is a method of prayer, do it right now. Then you will receive the guidance of the Holy Spirit.
Prayer prioritizes restoration over request. That is why we first offer worship, repentance, thanksgiving, and supplication. Acts (Adore, Confess, Thanksgiving, Supplement).

There are some who pray for grace in the face of difficulties. However, there are few who receive grace and offer thanks and praise. The ability to persevere comes from compelling love, overflowing gratitude, and willing praise.

It is not because my will is weak, but because I do not love the Lord. If you love the Lord, you must make time and kneel. Jesus told Peter to stay awake and pray so he would not fall into temptation. Without prayer, everything you eat, drink, and breathe belongs to the devil.
Just because I don't feel the answer doesn't mean God isn't working. When I groan, it sounds like thunder to God. So keep praying.
Kneel, raise your hands, and cry out like this: "Your will be done, Lord."
*Intercessory prayer request. There is a gathering at King's Cross Church today. Please pray for the Lord's will to be done.

Moses risks his very soul to desperately atone for the sins of the people. But the beginning of that heart came from God the Father. An intercessor is someone who knows the Father's heart. The number of prayers answered or the frequency of prayer at one's own level does not frighten Satan. When intercession becomes a pouring out of the Father's heart, darkness crumbles, and God's will is done on earth as it is in heaven.
Because I am a sinner and imperfect, I am on the test stand every day. Also, I am the chief of sinners and weak, so I call out to the Lord every moment. Amen, Lord Jesus~
Look only to the Lord who will comfort your hardened heart and raise you up again.

The posture of the last runner in the last days. Being awake, being sober-minded, and praying are all the same thing. Love without prayer is false. 1 Peter 4:7-8 KRV The end of all things is near. Therefore be alert and of sober mind, pray. Above all, love each other deeply, because love covers over a multitude of sins.
The only competitiveness for a helpless sheep is 'fellowship' with the shepherd. You can only live by receiving the fullness of the Holy Spirit. Stay awake and pray.
*Confession Confess like this: "God, I have fallen, but I will not give up. I will continue to fight. I will continue to seek Your face. I will hold onto the cross continuously." You are a victor.
*Time Looking back, everyone runs out of time. If you are going to be short on time anyway, try kneeling before the Lord. You will experience God, who made time, filling it.

*Kim Yuna's jump. When you overlay Kim Yuna's practice and actual competitions, they look almost identical. This is because she practices each jump thousands of times. We want to win in faith while failing in prayer. Hold onto the rope of prayer. An unbroken rope leads to unbroken victory in faith. The victory of the day is often decided during the morning prayer time. Forget what came before and keep going without regard.

*The result of prayer. People pray to change situations they cannot handle. However, the more they pray, the more they experience themselves changing. Ultimately, life is a battle of change, and that change comes through Christ, who is life and has risen.

*Pray like this. The reason prayers are not answered is that you ask wrongly, intending to use them for your desires. Such prayers cannot be sustained and have no power. Do not expect benefits and luck without paying the price; instead, ask to be allowed to pay the price. Therefore, pray fervently for the Lord's will to be done. Not my greed...

There are times when what happens to me is bewildering and surprising. When something completely unexpected happens to me, a believer in God, I should not look outward but focus on the Lord within me. Now is the time to pray. He went a little farther and fell on His face, praying, "My Father, if it is possible, may this cup pass from me. Yet not as I will, but as you will." - Matthew 26:39

There are times when you explode in anger over something that is not objectively anger-inducing, and you don't even give the other person a chance to explain. When you think of the Lord and turn away, you feel frustrated and hurt, but pour it out to the Lord. "My beloved child, I know your heart, and I am the Lord of this problem. I will make it beautiful." That is why, as in the Psalms, the outpouring of a broken heart is followed by thanksgiving. I trust the Lord.

When you decide to pray, God will come and pour out His heart and give you His heart. Then He will show you the state of the church and myself. And then He will break me. Only after that breaking, through paying the price of poverty and mourning, will He grant restoration. All ministry, relationships, and intentions that do not involve prayer must be broken. This is why God does not stop Satan's plans. It is because He loves us so much. Decide your future right now.

Discern this way. The secret to knowing if it is an answer to prayer is whether you can wait. Even guidance by emotion can be heard as the Lord's response, which is astonishing. This is because emotions are that strong. The Lord's response is peace, not haste, and not being chased. Since it is given by the Almighty God and all battles belong to God, there is no impatience, and one does not try to achieve it by scheming and thinking for oneself. If you cannot wait peacefully for the Lord's time, it is not an answer. May the Lord guide your hearts into God's love and Christ's perseverance. 2 Thessalonians 3:5. If you are guided (answered), you will surely persevere.

God's Gift. We are not beings who chase pleasure, but beings who ask the Lord about even trivial matters and receive answers. Instead of calculating for the situation you desire, simply pray, be thankful and moved by what you receive, and live. Then you will enjoy God's gift, which is incomparable to anything else.

1. The person who earnestly seeks God cries out and asks the Lord for mercy. Then the Lord responds like this. 2. "O LORD, when I cry out with my voice, hear me; have mercy on me and answer me. When you said, 'Seek my face,' my heart said to you, 'Your face, LORD, I will seek.'" Psalm 27:7,8. 3. "Seek my face." That was God's answer. The face Moses longed for, the face David cried out for, the presence Job called out for with anguish. 4. He is the radiance of God's glory and the exact representation of his being, sustaining all things by his powerful word. After he had provided purification for sins, he sat down at the right hand of the Majesty in heaven. Hebrews 1:3. 5. God's answer, "Seek my face," is Jesus Christ. 6. Only in Him is there perfect union with God and the solution to that burning thirst.
Do not try to move God to fulfill your joy; rather, let the Lord's will be your joy. That is the secret to a prosperous life that receives answers.

Problems always exist, but He wants us to rejoice always, not wait for them to be solved. Since God is closer than anyone else, it is essential for His chosen people to respond to God first. Rejoice always, pray continually, give thanks in all circumstances. 1 Thessalonians 5:16.

Moses saw the problems of the Israelites as God's problems. Problems merely provide an occasion. It is an occasion and an opportunity that calls for taking the right stance before God. The people quarreled with Moses, saying, "Give us water to drink." Moses said to them, "Why do you quarrel with me?" Exodus 17:2.

If you try to fulfill your own will, you will be frustrated. But for those who fulfill the Lord's will, everything is a matter of prayer and thanksgiving. Leading God's people is different from leading my people. You just need to lead His people according to His will. It is your mission to tell the Lord everything in detail and to see Him.
We are ready for your grace.

For those who cannot decide between A or B... It is not meaningless even if you have pondered for a long time and there is no answer. Being able to pray for months about one problem is a blessing. How can a life that decides by probability without such years of endurance and a life that decides while praying with regret over the lack of answers have the same weight?

What I pray for is not to be recognized, to succeed, or to be helped to fulfill my will. What I earnestly ask for strength is so that I can complete the race set before me and run as a minister who does not hinder the revival of the Lord.

1. Christians may not experience answers to prayer while living a powerless faith. 2. The Bible says demons surrender, but such things rarely seem to happen in reality. 3. Why don't the demons surrender? Surrender happens on the battlefield (in the field), not at a desk. 4. Since you do not go out to the battlefield, there is no surrender and no power is manifested. It's like nothing happens if you pile up weapons in the warehouse and just check them daily... 5. Please do what the Lord wants where the Lord wants. Then the Lord will surely confirm His word with signs that follow. Do not become eloquent experts, but become brave warriors who set lives ablaze. "Lord, even the demons submit to us in your name." Luke 10:17. The apostles went out and preached everywhere, and the Lord worked with them, confirming the word through the signs that accompanied it. Mark 16:20. The two apostles stayed there for a long time, speaking boldly for the Lord, and the Lord enabled them to perform signs and wonders by their hands, testifying to the message of his grace. Acts 14:3.

Do not worry too much about things you cannot do; instead, do what you can with joy and gratitude. Worry is not God's will. Do not be anxious about anything, but in every situation, by prayer and petition, with thanksgiving, present your requests to God. And the peace of God, which transcends all understanding, will guard your hearts and your minds in Christ Jesus. Philippians 4:6,7.

Before praying, it seems there is no way. But if you cry out, even a path appears in the sea where there was none. The ability to see the process, not just the part, comes after refinement and prayer.
What I desperately need is deep fellowship with the Lord. That is the most important thing right now.

Mountains I cannot overcome with my own strength, valleys I cannot fill with my own ability. For those who have the Lord as their master and invite His presence, He will come with His Spirit and rule all things with His almighty power. The Lord reigns.
If you desire a holy generation, you just need to become a holy person. You can kneel now and implore for heavenly fire to descend.

The influence I have is like mist, and the power of the strong relationships I maintain is less than a used tissue in the Lord's sight. If you try to use your advantages, you will be ashamed. When you rely on the Lord on your knees, you will see His work without side effects.
I pray. Grant strength and wisdom to brothers and sisters who are working and studying in a land of disbelief and dryness, according to the Lord's calling...

There is glory for a believer when prayer is so overwhelming that they find a restroom and cry out with choked sobs, trying to suppress their anguish. The glorious person, the strongest person, is the one who cannot help but call on the Lord and rely on Him, regardless of time or place.
We should ask, Lord, what lessons I should learn at the moment?

Tears are mostly water, with the rest being salt, lactoferrin, and lysozyme. While the composition is similar for most people, the reasons are all different. The Lord remembers and repays all the tears shed before Him. "You have counted my wanderings; put my tears in your bottle; are they not in your book?" Psalm 56:8.

There is little I can control. However, when I discipline myself and bow before the Lord, I see the Lord's work in areas I cannot handle or reach. If I work, only I work, but if I pray, the Lord works.

I must entrust to the Lord what is beyond my domain. I must put forth my best effort in what I am supposed to do and ask for it in prayer. "As the LORD lives..." Rid me of the consciousness of trying to respond to everything, and since the Lord lives, I entrust what is beyond my domain to Him. Let me do what I am supposed to do.

Faith is continuing in prayer, praise, love, and forgiveness. The reason mountains cannot be moved is that we do not try and do not persist. A single drop of water is a small amount, but if it flows continuously, it can pierce rocks and fill the sea. Respond to challenges in this way and continue what God desires. So what? The ability to ignore it.

Seeing those who need much prayer, I continue to pray for them. Those sensitive to achievement, those ashamed of their appearance, those who feel wronged by injustice, those for whom even one step is difficult, those who feel like victims, those who wander lost, those struggling due to relationships, those suffering from severe physical pain, those whose minds are so busy they cannot focus on tasks, those struggling with spiritual attacks, those who need to move forward but are dry, those struggling because of family... May you be freed by the grace of His blood before the Lord's cross. Amen.

The first gift given to those who ask for their needs with thanksgiving is peace. Through an irresistible peace that makes them forget even the needs they asked for, He works to increase their reasons for gratitude.

Moses was not present at the time of creation, but he recorded past creation by the inspiration of the Holy Spirit, and John prophesied about the future world that has not yet come in the Book of Revelation. If you truly love in the Lord, there is a sound that is heard without speaking and a heart that is heard without being able to speak. That voice also becomes an earnest prayer in my heart.

I hope you pray for friends who need prayer. Even if you haven't seen them for a long time, remember them, call them by name, and continue to pray for those whose minds and bodies are sick and who are under fire, as the Lord leads.
To expect something without praying is like expecting to receive mail that has never been sent. You will either not receive it or receive a fake.
You also must help us by your prayers. 2 Corinthians 1:11.

The predator bites the prey's fatal weakness, the neck, to suffocate or rupture the carotid artery, causing brain death. The devil knows weaknesses better than anyone and attacks. He knows where the Achilles' heel is. Because it is the weakest, he persistently touches those hidden, painful spots. You must stand before the Lord. Be sober, be vigilant. Your adversary the devil prowls around like a roaring lion, seeking someone to devour. Therefore, be alert and pray. 1 Peter 5:8
Suffering makes it impossible not to kneel. Kneeling transforms suffering into a door for me.
Do not be anxious about what you are struggling with, but focus on what is opening up and working out. Some things naturally take time. If you love the Lord and know Him, He will take care of you.

If you can pray, why wouldn't you have peace? God's amazing peace will be with all who meditate on this word today. Do not be anxious about anything, but in everything by prayer and supplication with thanksgiving let your requests be made known to God. And the peace of God, which surpasses all understanding, will guard your hearts and your minds in Christ Jesus. Philippians 4:6, 7
If my people who are called by my name humble themselves, and pray and seek my face and turn from their wicked ways, then I will hear from heaven and will forgive their sin and heal their land.

Moses goes to God with Israel's problems. Then, even in conflict, you can see God's glory appear. Do not focus on the conflict, but focus only on the Lord. Then, in the midst of problems melting away, you will see the Lord's glory. Jesus said, "You shall love the Lord your God with all your heart and with all your soul and with all your mind. This is the great and first commandment." Matthew 22:37

The power that demolishes strongholds is prayer, and what makes that prayer more powerful is attitude. When my life becomes a joy to God, and when I fear the Lord, 'heaven's will shall be done in this barren land.' If a person's deeds please God...

When I complain that my head feels like it will explode from many problems and worries, the Lord simply says, 'I love you.' As if He doesn't know what's going on with people... However, He will rescue me, who loves Him, and lift me from the dung heap, who knows Him. We must wholeheartedly trust and implore the responsive Lord who transforms tribulation into glory. God said, "Because he holds fast to me in love, I will deliver him; I will protect him, because he knows my name. When he calls to me, I will answer him; I will be with him in trouble; I will rescue him and honor him." Psalm 91:14, 15

When you are in distress, you must look to the Lord's face. Those who are weary from the world must fix their gaze on the comforting Lord. The loving Lord will surely give you rest when you are sad and He comforts you. Come to me, all who labor and are heavy laden, and I will give you rest. Matthew 11:28

Even if the problems disappear immediately, you can never find rest. True peace is not the absence of work and issues, but when the Lord allows you to rest. It is not difficult because there are many trials, but difficult because there is no true rest. "Rejoice in the Lord always; again I will say, Rejoice... Do not be anxious about anything, but in everything by prayer and supplication with thanksgiving let your requests be made known to God. And the peace of God, which surpasses all understanding, will guard your hearts and your minds in Christ Jesus." Philippians 4:4, 6-7
In prayer, look to God who hears your prayers. Then you will hold onto what is truly precious.
Holiness and purity, unwavering resolve, sacrifice and service, hope of heaven, loving your enemies, ceaseless prayer and thanksgiving – all these are not things you do, but things that happen.
Do not seek magic, but seek mercy. What I need right now is for the Lord to have compassion on me. And falling at his feet, he thanked him; and he was a Samaritan. Luke 17:16

Where there is no vision, the people are unrestrained. Proverbs 29:18 If you do not hear the Word, you have no vision, and if you have no vision, you have no hope or mission, so you live as you please and feel very empty. You must make the Word heard and let prayer pour out. Then you will live.
Scheduled for discharge on the 21st, we continue to push forward with prayer.

Brother Park Han-seok has improved beyond recognition, and the doctor said that they would consider his discharge after he completes his final scanning tests. Please continue to pray. The kingdom of the Lord will expand, and wherever it clashes, darkness will be broken and life will bloom.

It is useless to cry out against the person who took what was mine, or against the ruthless past and environment. The world has the power to take away, but not the power to restore. Crying out to the Father, that is power.

If you do not set your mind, you will be swayed by others, be held back by your weaknesses, only do urgent tasks, ruin your life, and waste your life and time on futile things. However, those who pray set their minds and live life with the balance given by the Lord.

Daniel was a truly faithful subordinate to his boss, King Nebuchadnezzar. That king had the authority to control Daniel's life, promotion, and everything else. However, Daniel was free from the pressure of such a superior. He faced the lion's den and the fiery furnace with composure, following the truth. Prayer gives insight and vision to see that God is greater than the people who appear great in the world.
The disappointment and hurt from my prayers being rejected, the shame and pain I felt from my downfall – these are what He calls my 'mission.'

You look much better. If you continue to pray and reduce medication without having seizures, you may see better results sooner. Please continue to pray for Han-seok brother, along with the relay fasting and retreat preparations. The Lord will rule, and the powers of darkness will retreat.
Please pray. We are in battle. Darkness retreats before the Lord's sovereignty.

Prayer itself does not guarantee God's intervention. After praying, Jacob creates a bribe and divides his group into three portfolios. Genesis 32:7 A portfolio is an investment method that reduces risk through diversification. If you pray like this, He will make you pray again at the Jabbok River, with your hip socket broken. If you say, "If I perish, I perish," you will surely live.
Risk your life in prayer. It will surely be answered. Those who have only the Lord will surely be answered. When all else is gone and only the Lord remains, that is when your prime will come.
Prayer is like laying rails for life. A train running on rails does not mean it is bound, but that it runs faster. I hope you become saints who lay KTX rails in your lives.

People of faith must not stop or halt in haste. For they all sought to frighten us, saying, "Their hands will be too weak for the work, so that it will not be done." Nehemiah 6:9 When there are hindrances and obstacles, I hope you become brave warriors of faith who advance by faith. Now strengthen my hands. Nehemiah prayed this prayer and, with tools in one hand and weapons in the other, pushed forward.
Let me seek you, Lord, so that dry places may become holy.

When told to stay awake and pray, they just lay down and slept, and when told to serve, they fought over who would take the highest position. But when the Holy Spirit descended, they were transformed into powerful beings. What is there that they cannot do? I hope your life breaks through limitations with overflowing prayer and pulls out the stakes that bind you.
Ask to be used more powerfully in the work you are currently entrusted with. That is wisdom.
The reason I pray is because I believe God is faithful and the Holy Spirit is working regardless of my feelings.
Please continue to pray for Brother Park Han-seok. His symptoms have recurred, and he has been moved to the ICU. He will likely have an MRI on Monday.

If you have a passion to give the best to the most precious One, and if you want to move forward as an apostle of love, more prepared and serving, you must dedicate more time and sincerity to the prayer meeting before worship. If you truly long for the Lord's glory...

A believer who begrudges time spent in prayer is not worthy of enjoying precious things, because they are foolish and cannot discern what is most important. That is why many people live on by begging. Pray. You are royal priests.

Power and transformation, the crumbling of darkness, and revival in this land are not achieved through movements. It is achieved by paying the price and kneeling where you stand. No one doesn't know and therefore cannot do it. People know, yet are deceived; they perceive, yet do not live according to the truth. Therefore, prayer, intimacy, and relationship are what make that truth true. If you preach the truth without finding answers in the Lord, you will destroy people. Do not judge, but give life. Give them something to eat / Mark 6:30-44
Prayer is not about fulfilling what I want. Jesus knows our needs, but He wants to give us Himself, the most important thing. Therefore, prayer must grow.

The end of all things is near. Therefore, be alert and of sober mind, pray. Above all, love each other earnestly, because love covers over a multitude of sins. - 1 Peter 4:7 The final round of a game is truly fierce. We pour out all our remaining strength to score even one more point. The Bible says we are running the final round. It tells us to run with all our might as the last runner in the last era. For a Christian to run with all their might means to finish a war that is already won, so that it can truly be won. It urges us to save souls by being alert, having wisdom and self-control, by awakening and praying, and above all, by love that demolishes all schemes.
* We will fight back today. Tonight at 9:30 PM, Mission Training Center. Content: Prayer to overcome challenges. Target: Breakthrough, Prayer, Healing, Response to the challenge. Plan: Tonight only.

"The end of all things is near. Therefore be alert and of sober mind, so that you may pray. Above all, love each other deeply, because love covers over a multitude of sins." 1 Peter 4:7, 8 We are running the Saturday meeting.

If a person of faith does not pray, even an ordinary life is difficult. What others walk easily, I must risk my life to take one step in pain. I cannot understand why I chose this path. Though I cannot understand it, that path is glorious and happy. It is the narrow path.

A person you cannot forgive and whom you hate is not an evil person, but a pitiable one. If you cannot respect them, love them unconditionally; if loving them is difficult, it is right to pray for them and pity them.

An angel appeared to Cornelius and told him that God had accepted Cornelius's charity and prayers. What kind of prayer was it that God accepted? Was it a fervent prayer, a long prayer? It was accepted because it was Cornelius's prayer. God hears the prayers of the godly. We must become believers who bring about God's answers in this land.
In my experience, the only options I can choose are gratitude and prayer.

One of the two ways the Holy Spirit helps us in prayer is by giving us strength to pray and assurance of an answer through peace when we pray. The other is by guiding us to correct our prayer course through an uneasy feeling and a sense that the prayer will not be answered. Ultimately, we must rely on the warm Holy Spirit who leads us from uncomfortable prayer to peaceful prayer.

When causeless fear rushes in and anxiety grips you that the very thing you worry about most is about to happen, please be reminded that only God's will is done, and His will is good for me. The Lord knows the path I take. Please let go of worry and anxiety.

1 Timothy 4:5: "But by the word of God and prayer it is made holy." Becoming a life that has nothing to discard, a life accepted with gratitude, is due to the work of holiness unfolding through God's Word and prayer. Hold onto the Word and resolve to pray.
The greatest work is to intercede and pray.

We are still thirsty, pour your spirit out Lord. Never be satisfied with this level. God has prepared greater clouds and rain. What I intercede for as a minister now is not a prayer for God to use us in the European continent, but for our youth group to be praised by God, who will surely use us and is already using us, and to remain humble, giving glory to the Lord until the end. I pray that they will become young people who hold onto Jesus until the end and seek His joy. They will be wonderful young people who take off their crowns and offer them to the Lord.
If there is anything that frightens me, please rebuke me. If the path I take is the Lord's path, who can stop me? When rebuked and chastened, darkness and fear retreat.
Many failures begin because people pray. You must pray before you prepare. Then God will reveal it to you. God does not supplement us; He enables us to start rightly.

Prayer is not in vain. The prayers of co-workers bear complete fruit through the declarations of other co-workers. Cornelius's prayer bore fruit through Peter's prayer. When you pray for each other and receive answers, do not forget the many prayers of tears from those you do not know.

The most ignorant and foolish person is one who drifts through life indifferently when the blade is pointed at them. How can you know when the blade is pointed at you? If you neglect prayer, you are already standing on the blade. It is the best life to repent and confess before shame comes. Repent.
Prayer is always answered. If you endure with patience, you will surely see the fruit.
When other paths are blocked, it means the path of prayer is opened. If you have no one to meet, it means the Lord wants to see you.
Luke 18:1: "Always pray and do not give up." To not give up, you must pray always, following a habit by setting a specific time. Are you discouraged? Start praying at a set time.

The heavy darkness and sin of the world capture many souls and lead them to death. It is astonishing that there has been no proper challenge in the name of the Lord against the corruption occurring within this London and on campus. Like King Jehoshaphat and his people before the Aramean army, though we may seem powerless, when we proclaim and praise the holy name of the Lord and move forward, He will make known who is the owner of this city.

In Matthew 7 and Luke 11, Jesus both speak of praying and asking. However, Luke has a passage not found in Matthew: "He will give to those who ask." But then it says, "Will he not much more give the Holy Spirit to those who seek him?" God can give everything and will give it. But what He truly wanted to give was "Himself." I pray that young people will become strong in that love, the love of giving Himself.
Be assured that the One who enabled me to pray will also bring it to pass. Prayer needs no words; it is about prostrating oneself and asking.

**Prayer Meeting 7:30 Mission Hall. "And Elisha prayed, 'O Lord, open his eyes so that he may see.' Then the Lord opened the servant's eyes, and he looked and saw the hill full of horses and chariots of fire all around Elisha." - 2 Kings 6:16, 17 Prayer is the passkey that summons the heavenly horses and chariots of fire. Not praying is despising God. Those who pray are protected by heavenly chariots of fire surrounding them. Those who pray have their eyes opened to see the heavenly chariots of fire. Are you facing spiritual encirclement, trials, and difficulties today? Pray with your life on the line. Then you will witness the heavenly chariots of fire surrounding you.

When problems seem to grow larger, it is the work of Satan. If you look to the Lord, problems are not problems but prayer requests, and they are merely tools the Lord uses to purify me. We are under the mighty hand of the Lord and under His precious blood.
If there is nothing to achieve through prayer, there will be nothing to achieve in anything else. The spirit must live for the flesh to die.
Through the storm You are the beacon, My song in the night. In the shelter of Your wings, Hear my heart's reply.

Meeting the Lord in prayer meetings and seeing His face. And receiving comfort without judgment or condemnation. I give thanks. Seeing the beautiful face of the Lord, my face bows down. The Lord's two hands touch me, comforting my body and soul.

I sent messengers to him saying, "What you are saying is not true, it is something you have imagined." They all wanted to frighten us, saying, "Their hands will be too weak to complete the work." But now, strengthen my hands! Nehemiah 6:8, 9 Turmoil begins in desolate Jerusalem. Those who build God's wall and those who try to stop its construction. Where there is the work of life, there is naturally the work of darkness. However, for those who know the truth, nothing can be a threat. God, who is unseen but most real, and the prayers offered to Him, and the people who pray with that faith, nothing can shake them. God wants to strengthen our hands. Mission Education Center 7:30 PM
I worry a lot. It's because I hold on. It's not me holding on, but only the Lord holds everything.
The enemy wants to bring a spirit of slumber to our life and cell but we must wake up, watch and pray! Mission Education Center 7:30 PM Tonight

Even after succeeding in prayer and worship, anxiety can still creep in when you return home. This is very natural and a normal process of moving towards sanctification. You may falter, but you will not return to your old ways. Because we have made peace with God and have been transformed, we will never collapse. It is because we are under the Lord's blood.

It is said not to boast when there is bitterness in the heart. If there is hatred, envy, jealousy, and unforgiveness in the heart, He does not hear prayers. The power of the blood works through those who love.

For those who turn your insides out, you must write a card and give them a gift at the end of the year. Because of them, you prayed, and because of them, you came before the Lord's altar, didn't you? When you pray with grace and repeatedly ask with joy, you receive answers. On the other hand, if your heart is heavy while praying and you give up after praying a few times, you will rarely receive an answer. Are you frustrated because the Lord hasn't changed the situation even though you prayed? The Lord is also frustrated because you are holding on and not letting go. Forgiveness and obedience must come before change and resolution.

"It's too hard. I can't go any further!" Are you having thoughts like this? Resist it. It is a thought from the devil. Strive to gather together and increase the intensity of your prayer. Block the current flow and call upon the Lord's name.

If my people, who are called by my name, humble themselves, and pray and seek my face, and turn from their wicked ways, then I will hear from heaven, and will forgive their sin and heal their land. O God, help us confess hidden sins, humble ourselves, and let our prayers ascend to You.
pour out Your heart to Him and in turn He pours out to you!
If something cannot be resolved through worry, come and pray. Trying to solve human problems carnally only brings side effects. Solve life's problems spiritually.

Those who do not pray are driven into situations where they have no choice but to pray, and those who do not seek the Lord are confined to wells where they can only look to the Lord. The best position is to be grateful and fear Him where you stand now.
When you are in distress, look at the Lord's face. Look at the Lord of peace. The Lord gives strength and protects all who call upon His name.
If you succeed without prayer, you will be ruined by that success.

When the Apostle Paul was converted and praying, the one who delivered the answer was none other than Ananias, a faithful disciple from the street called Straight. When he laid hands on him, God's will, prepared and ready, the answer to prayer, was miraculously fulfilled. If we pray together in unity, heaven will unfold in this dry land. If you extend your hands and bless, heaven's will shall be done.

Please prepare the list of attendees and fasting prayers for the retreat on the 19th. I pray that on that day, you will hear the Lord's voice and that things will happen like a ship that was stopped elegantly gliding forward.

When we are not praying, we often don't realize how desperately we need prayer. Once prayer begins, we keenly feel that we cannot live without it. We prayed to get better, but realized we need prayer to live.

Not asking about a path you haven't traveled means you intend to get lost, and not praying about a life you haven't lived is wasting time and committing sin. Walk with Him, and you will not fulfill the desires of the flesh.

Increase the intensity of your prayer. Sometimes God uses our deep pain as a channel for His amazing plan. Precious life. How precious is this one life we live? Therefore, our lives should be happy, and to be happy, we must live a valuable life. Then King Ahasuerus promoted Haman son of Hammedatha the Agagite and gave him a seat of honor above all the other nobles. ... * Divergent questions. "Until when?" "Who do you say I am?" If the focus is not aligned, life cannot move forward.

* Small greed, great loss. The end of abusing power is that a person who possessed the whole world collapses due to extreme anger and fury over a trivial matter. If we were content with what we were given and thankful, it would be fine, but by pursuing perfection in what we were not given, we gain little and lose much. Instead of having more and becoming higher, if we become humble and thankful, we will be happy and can make others happy. Then King Ahasuerus promoted Haman son of Hammedatha the Agagite and gave him a seat of honor above all the other nobles. ... When Haman saw that Mordecai would not bow down or pay homage to him, he was filled with wrath against Mordecai. - Esther 3:1, 5 But whatever was to my profit I now consider loss for the sake of Christ. What is more, I consider everything a loss compared to the surpassing worth of knowing Christ Jesus my Lord, for whose sake I have lost all things. I consider them rubbish, that I may gain Christ and be found in him. - Philippians 3:7-9

* Collaborator. It is not how much you are together, but whether the Lord is with you that is life. Even if you receive the support of influential people, without Jesus you are a failure, and even if ten thousand surround you, if the Lord is with you, you will win.
* Futility. This happens when you diligently do God's work without God. Within God, no work is ever meaningless.

* Making a show. Life is far more important than appearances. On a battlefield where bullets fly and shells pour down, survival is more important than putting on a good show. Empty splendor and maintaining appearances are not only human desires but also crimes when it comes to the issue of life.

* The victor is not the one who remains, but the one who remains is the victor. Good faith and popular belief are not about being puffed up by people's opinions or becoming the protagonist of testimonies. It is about looking only to the Lord and going to the end. Many are praised and not a few are recognized, but those who run to the end are truly rare.

* When you feel utterly insignificant, when all you can do is sigh, "What can someone like me do?", you must look at and confirm that the glorious Lord is with you and that you are in Him. If Satan reminds you of your past, remind Satan of his future.
If you want to be excellent, you must be set apart. The area where you must be most excellent in life is serving the Lord. That is holiness. Moving Worship Christian Organisation

Living only for graduation, employment, marriage, security, and a peaceful retirement before God is called a tragedy. To live clearly, held by one thing, rather than enjoying many things; to lay down my life and set up the cross on this earth, rather than gathering more and clinging to a stable life, that is holy consumption.

The mind of the flesh kills me without exception. If you live by the flesh, you will surely die, but if you walk by the Spirit, you will not fulfill the desires of the flesh. Therefore, you are a 'servant of the Lord' and a pastor where you stand now. What makes me sad and what makes me happy moves me. What I want tells me who I am. One thing I ask of the Lord, this will I seek: that I may dwell in the house of the Lord all the days of my life, to behold the beauty of the Lord and to inquire in his temple. - Psalm 27:4

Peter's occupation was a fisherman, and his dream was a full catch. Paul's dream was to succeed Gamaliel as a rabbi. However, the Lord called them to be fishers of men and a light to the Gentiles. Because there were people who naively risked their lives for that calling, I, who believe in Jesus, the life itself, exist.

To the small ones who live fiercely in reality, God called the young people like Gideon, who were forced to be cowardly to survive in a harsh reality and fierce competition, "Mighty warrior." The only reason the timid Gideon, who worried about his job, relationships, and future, could be a mighty warrior is one thing: God wanted to be with him. Judges 6:12 "The angel of the Lord appeared to Gideon and said to him, 'The Lord is with you, mighty warrior.'"

I can't drink alcohol, I'm not good at flattering, I can't exaggerate or package things, and I don't gossip about others behind their backs. My only competitiveness is faithfulness and wisdom. (Dan 1:20) And in every matter of wisdom and understanding about which the king inquired of them, he found them ten times better than all the magicians and enchanters in his whole kingdom.
Do not fear. People fear becoming weak. But they do not know that the only time they become weak is when the Lord works and makes them strong.
Character is more important than ability. Truth is more important than miracles. It's okay to live a little imperfectly. If you stand before the Lord, you are already a victor.

To share rather than to accumulate, to scatter rather than to gather, to give rather than to hoard, to worship the Lord wherever I am, and even if I am broken and scattered, I only need to reveal the Lord completely.

A person of God is one who pours out the joy and life that are in heaven into this dry land.

We must stop defining our happiness by the reactions of others. Furthermore, we must stop imagining based on those reactions. This is because it is neither true fact nor God's intention.

If we earnestly desire the original beauty, we will be freed from wrong and twisted addictions. If the bright moon is beautifully unashamed, we are happy enough without secretly possessing or clinging to it.

When encountering Jesus, those with ambition 'stir up trouble,' while those with hope rejoice and 'worship.' "Where is the one who has been born king of the Jews? Bread comes out of the oven. When delicious bread is baked in the oven, it becomes a finished product that can be eaten immediately. Yet, each person boasts that they are a finished product that has passed through that hot oven. Even though they haven't even been kneaded yet.

Great power is accompanied by great responsibility. If a powerless person has a bad temper, they don't cause many problems. However, if a powerful person in a high position does, it becomes a big issue.

You can know what kind of person a respected leader is not by asking the people they serve, but by asking the people they ruled. We live in a thirsty era for leaders who are recognized by their subordinates.

The reason for regret is not that you haven't captured someone's heart or achieved your desired accomplishments, but rather that you haven't given more to the Lord; this is true faith.

The privilege of the one who possesses is not tyranny. It is the power of service that God has lent temporarily. Just as the potential energy of water transforms into electricity, God's glory is revealed by the height of my humility.

The reason for disappointment is that something you thought you had is gone. However, it was something you never had in the first place. When we know the greatness of the Lord and realize our smallness, we overcome disappointment and become peaceful without fear.

An arrogant crown becomes a disgrace. A crown returns as a disgrace to a person who does not examine themselves. The responsibility of the one who handles iron and fire. Iron sharpens iron, and fire ignites fire. Do not fear. A person who fears failure ironically also fears the change that leads to victory. Do what you are told to do. Do not be arrogant; you are told to humble yourself like Jesus.

The reason for sadness - Let it go. It is not because you lack something. Sadness comes because you possess what you should not have.

The reason the world is disappointed in the church is not because the church has abandoned their joy. Do not be greedy; be faithful in the periphery. Greed is the desire to take what the Lord has not given. Therefore, people seek others, deceive them, and are deceived themselves. Seeking what the Lord has given is called a mission, and moving forward with gratitude for it is called faithfulness.

Maturity is freedom. To be mature means to be free in a sense. The secret to victory is not to hide greed and disguise it with justifications, but to lay bare your weaknesses and cling to the promises. When you lose your flavor. There was a time when you could get 10 flour tteokbokki for 100 won in front of the school. Do not be swayed by judgment. It is not in vain. If I do not judge myself, why should the judgment of others matter? The only one who will judge me is God, the eternal judge. To you, or to any human court, is a very small matter to me; indeed, I do not even judge myself. - 1 Corinthians 4:3

The war of concentration. Whether you go crazy for the world or for Jesus, in the end, who you were crazy about and how crazy you were determines success or failure. That's why you can't dilute it. The ability lies in maintaining the original essence.

Evangelism. When a community continuously becomes healthy and experiences deep presence, young people will have a happy sense of self-esteem about the community they attend and will naturally invite souls and friends seeking meaning to the gathering.

The only begotten Son in the Father's bosom. There is no envy, jealousy, ambition, or vain goals there. Jesus, who came from there, was like that, and we, too, would be if we came from deep within God's bosom. Therefore, we do not work with information and data.

Regarding the question, "What are you doing here right now?" There is no need to be obsessed with influencing the world and people. You just need to be intimate with God. That is the true purpose. Do not grieve over not being the best, but abide by the Lord's side and become beautiful. You will become powerful instead. O LORD, you have searched me and you know me. Before a word is on my tongue you, LORD, know it completely. - Psalm 139:1-4
Office is not holiness. A holy office does not automatically make one holy. It is a position of serving God in holiness, so one must admonish oneself more strictly.

What is truly important. If what you think is important keeps changing, it means it wasn't important. Although it may be ignored by worldly standards, what is eternal in that kingdom is truly important. Even immigrating to a foreign country changes one's life.
The reason for becoming generous. Because I have already received so much, I do not greedily covet. It is because I am in the Lord and receive precious love from those I love.
An excellent leader. Let go of the attempt to be excellent and just faithfully do what the Lord has commanded. You collapse because you try too hard to be excellent.
What God does. To me, who is awkward, difficult, and hard, God's word is, "I am using you."
The reason for feeling empty after working hard. All ability, meaning, and the value of my existence come from relationships. Seek Him.

The reason I stand here. It is because God has overcome me. O LORD, you have persuaded me, and I was persuaded; you have overpowered me and prevailed. I have become an object of ridicule all day long; everyone mocks me. - Jeremiah 20:7
When I meet people who are too beautiful. I find myself hating and avoiding sin. This is because those who are already happy have nothing more to seek.

A life that needs no encouragement (infinite power). There is no need to encourage a mother to love her baby. It is life itself. If you are moved by encouragement and praise, you have not yet moved beyond being a beginner. Those who are moved by life and are faithful, not by encouragement and slogans, are called mission-bearers.
The church is not far away. It is not burdensome to live a life of faith because the church is far away. The church is nearby. It is only your home that is far away.
Look back. The reason I have come this far is due to the Lord's encouragement and help, and that encouragement was not because of my own merit but because of my weakness.

When you feel lonely, look to the Lord. "An unappealing appearance, personality, or way of speaking will not be a problem, nor will a humble background, chronic weakness, or any other flaw. For I made you and will make you."

The dark shadow of death. It is because you try too hard to do well and want to be told that you do well. Pride and frustration will alternate, and you will experience hell. Do not try to do well; love.
God did not call us for success. God does not want success. He wants wonder.

If you give up pride, you gain self-esteem. If you abandon vain and perishable pride and place your security in the Lord, you will realize that you are truly valuable and loved, and that you no longer need to cling to or prove things that are worthless.
The reason why we should not be fearful or arrogant. It is because the one who uses us is the Lord. If you are not in your place, leave it and faithfully do only what the Lord uses you for.

The solution in crisis is to hold onto the basics when you encounter them. If you thoroughly do what you were doing and live humbly, a way will open up. Do not compare yourself to others, but hold onto your Jesus.
What I must always remind myself of is my relationship with the Lord, His position, and my position.

Worship that God receives. "What is important before God is who you are and how you live. The worship you offer must be worship that seeks truth with your spirit. The Father is looking for people like that, people who worship Him as they are, simply and honestly before Him. - John 4:24

Praise team attire. 1. Garments of holiness: Psalm 29:2 Worship the Lord in holy attire. 2. Respectful attire: Respect the culture of the congregation and the church. If you personally feel no qualm and think it's okay, this is immaturity. 3. Attire that observes manners: A short skirt on a high platform, or brothers wearing tight shirts that are burdensome. Even leading praise teams abroad who pursue free worship have the most conservative standards regarding attire. 4. Do not be sensitive to trends. If you say, "Everyone wears skinny jeans these days," then it's better to go to a karaoke bar. The reason we should be beautiful is not to follow trends, but to follow our mission. You are the face of the church. 5. Prepared attire is better than expensive luxury brands. Even with the same amount of offering, looking at the attitude of giving, I think God accepts certain offerings with pleasure. Check your attire as well when preparing your best. 6. Put on character: Clothe yourselves with compassion, kindness, humility, gentleness, and patience (Colossians 3:14).
The major of a believer is to love until the end and then depart.

A dangerous promise. If you had the stability of a lifetime guarantee with someone you don't like, and a dangerous promise of going with someone you deeply love, which would you choose? Live meaningfully, even if it's just for a day. It is about being restored and continuing.
Do not be troubled by it. God did not call you for that. If you hold onto the highest calling, you will be free and at peace.
A regrettable study. It is about trying to do well without kneeling.
Useless things will be trampled underfoot. A disciple without self-denial is like salt that has lost its flavor.

The reason you should not swear. You should not swear, but especially when a person of faith swears, it is a sin that rapidly defiles yourself, the temple of God, because you are denying the gracious words you share on social media with actual swearing in your real life. Be a person who is the same inside and out.
Do not be surprised by being misunderstood. Do not be surprised by being misunderstood. God never misunderstands.
A life without regret. A life that rejoices in the Lord, not a life that fulfills desires.

Crisis. Has there ever been a time when there wasn't a crisis? When it's hard, it's too hard, and when it's easy, we are complacent, and then hardship comes. In this famine-stricken land where we must carry the cross anyway, I will become a grain of wheat like Jesus.

Anxiety is not due to mistakes. There are no instances where I make a mistake or mishear the Lord's voice and thus fail to receive His guidance or fail. It is not our mistakes or weaknesses that cause us to lose the Lord's guidance, but wrong priorities that mislead us. When the rich young ruler, who seemed perfect in all aspects, took wrong priorities, Jesus said, "It is a pity."
Repentance. I was a much worse son than I knew myself to be. God patiently loved me, even when I was the only one who didn't know myself. That is why we repent.
Do not imagine, but humble yourself. Do not imagine, but decide to humble yourself and serve. If you imagine, you will crumble, but if you humble yourself and serve, He will build up everything.
Shameful things. Being insulted and criticized is not shameful. It is shameful to abandon the truth in order to be welcomed and accepted.
The ability of a leader. It is not about receiving attention, but about giving attention to neglected places.

If you are immature, you will become increasingly alone. Even as you age, if your soul is young, you will inevitably crave validation in various ways, revealing yourself, being sensitive to others' reactions, hurting others, and scattering salt, yet thinking it's not a big deal, exhibiting self-centered thinking. Maturity is seeing 'myself' and 'you' through the Lord. Empathy is a capability.
The true reason for anger. It is because you are bound by the world's evaluation. Be bound to God.
Fear. In the Garden of Eden, Adam and Eve hid out of fear. The greatest fear was their naked selves being rejected.
Do not engage in superficial relationships. Do not react to trivial matters that are not facts and not truth. This is because the truth that 'I am a precious being' is shaken.

The people Jesus disliked. Surprisingly, Jesus disliked the Pharisees. It was because the movement of piety, which started with the intention of diligently serving the Lord, led them to boast about themselves, and even to despise others and be arrogant.

Unavoidable sin. A car collision is not a sin. The true cause is driving against traffic on the highway with a car whose brakes have failed. It should not have started. Both sin and holiness are a matter of the first step.
True happiness. It is not because you have acquired various things you wanted. It is because the Lord reigns that you are happy.
Do not guess, but humble yourself and serve.

Influence. Influence arises when there is a significant difference. Like a dam that generates immense electricity when water falls from a height, when a person in God's deep presence serves and humbles themselves, they can become a 'fragrance' and 'flavor.'

The ability to focus. To focus on what is truly valuable means saying 'Yes' to that one thing. That means having the courage to say 'No' to everything else. Only the courageous can focus. Following my earnest expectation and hope, that in nothing I shall be ashamed, but with all boldness, as always, so now also Christ shall be magnified in my body, whether by life or by death. - Philippians 1:20

The ability of simplicity. Simplicity is much more difficult than complexity. Clear thinking is not something anyone can do. I hope you will cast away the lie that you are a victim and embrace the mission of being a healer. Love is restoration.

The ability to lose. Jacob, who lived his life as a struggle, gained much and lost much. However, when he let go, ready to lose, he no longer lost, but rather regained what he had lost. The one who is ready to lose is the most powerful. If I lose my children, I will lose them. - Genesis 43:14

Boasting is empty. When people boast, they seek validation for their existence. But looking back, how empty that boasting is. Because you realize no one validates you through that boasting. Stop vain boasting and be at peace with humility.
Maturity is caring. Because you move away from self-centered interpretations and perspectives. When you grow up, you put away childish things. That is love and completion.
Self-proof becomes frozen. Do not prove yourself, but only testify of Him. You will experience becoming a warm person from being cold for the sake of purpose.
Not from the east or west, but from the Lord. Do not be discouraged by not being recognized, nor strive to be recognized. All recognition comes only from the Lord.
The qualification of a leader is whether they carry the cross.

Expanding your vision. Seeing the faults of others is not insight, but seeing the weaknesses within you in the other person. When your vision expands like that, instead of criticizing others, you should see the weaknesses within yourself. A player recognizes a player.
Everything for the Lord. Joy is for the Lord, and pleasure is for the Lord. Loneliness is also for the Lord, and sadness is also for the Lord. I will praise the Lord with everything within me.

The God who called me. The God who called me did not call me to do this work excellently and well to be recognized. We do the work, but the responsibility for the outcome rests with the Lord. We are only responsible for being faithful unto death. He considered me faithful, appointing me to ministry - 1 Timothy 1:12.

Thoughts leading to death. The mind set on the flesh is death. The mind set on the flesh means self-centered thoughts. This does not mean superficially watching others' eyes and conforming, but rather giving up your own life and living by Jesus. For to be carnally minded is death; but to be spiritually minded is life and peace. - Romans 8:6.
The difference between a saint and a silly person. A saint applies enlightenment to themselves, while a silly person applies it to others.
It is foolish or absurd. It is foolish to get angry at people for what God has humbled. It is absurd to watch people's eyes for what God has exalted.
Envy is a level. People mistakenly think that if they possess something, others will envy them. A proper person is not attracted to such things. Only an IQ of 10 goldfish reacts to earthworms.
The blessing of the one who humbles himself. He who exalts himself will be humbled, and he who humbles himself for the Lord will be exalted.
Identity. What a person wants tells you who that person is.
Do not be concerned about what will not bring life. All victory is won in one place. "Do I truly have the anointing?" You must focus only on what will bring life.
A person to whom threats do not work. Threats work when the other person controls what you don't want to lose. Therefore, threats do not work on Christians.

Too much concern. Honestly, others are not that interested in me, but I worry too much about the gaze of others. We can love our neighbor as ourselves, and if we are at peace, others can be at peace too.

Hidden greed and the Kingdom of God. Do not be angry because your hidden greed is not fulfilled, but grieve because the will of heaven is not fulfilled on earth. You cannot hold living water in a broken cistern, nor can you make living water out of anything other than the Lord.
Be free from comparison and verification. Try to resolve not to compare or verify. He will give you perfect blessings that cannot be compared and need no verification.
When the purpose changes, the smile changes. You will be much happier.

Do not defile the temple. If anyone defiles the temple of God, God will destroy him. Therefore, do not defile yourself, who is the temple of God, with sexual immorality (1 Corinthians 3:16), and do not despise the worship of God (1 Samuel 2:17). If anyone defiles the temple of God, God will destroy him. For the temple of God is holy, and you are that temple. - 1 Corinthians 3:17.

Decide in advance. The reason I still walk this narrow path without shying away is that my past self decided to go, no matter how harsh this path was. Decide in advance not to turn back. The cross is not the beginning, but already the conclusion.
Look at people and the world a lot. You will realize that there is never satisfaction.

The reason why it feels frustrating even though you are working hard. It feels frustrating even though you are working hard beyond your strength for revival. This is because you are trying to confirm yourself through reactions and recognition. You strayed from testifying of the Lord from the beginning, and even if people don't know, God knows.

If you really like clothes, you will naturally go on a diet. If you like clothes, your body knows first, and if you truly love someone, you become like that person. That is why, when you experience beautiful love, the lust of the flesh is forgotten.

The reason why the chef eats plain rice with kimchi. Because when there are many flavors, there is no particular taste to eat. That is why professionals become simpler. It means packaging and embellishment disappear.

The reason why you don't say anything when you feel offended. Most of the time, the reason you don't explain when you feel offended is that getting hurt by such things is embarrassing even to yourself, logically speaking. Still, you get angry, so you explode with anger over other things. Many things are imagined and misunderstood by yourself, rather than being things to be angry about.

The reason for anxiety is that the expectations and hopes you desire are corrupt and shameful. What you already know is that such anxious desires always follow a predictable course. That is a shameful end. That according to my earnest expectation and hope, that in nothing I shall be ashamed, but with all boldness, as always, so now also Christ shall be magnified in my body, whether it be by life, or by death. - Philippians 1:20.
Spend time with people whose souls are beautiful. Sin and greed will become meaningless. How much more so when you behold the glorious Lord?
Be humble. It is to tear your heart knowing that your faith is over-packaged. When you are alone, who are you really?
The reason one cannot admit their mistakes is because they are a cowardly person without courage.

When pride is hurt and one becomes angry impulsively, the real reason for the anger is not that the unreasonable evaluation of oneself doesn't match, but because it actually fits perfectly, and that is frightening. We react so sensitively to others' evaluations because we cannot accept our own worth. A person is firm when their relationship with God becomes the standard, rather than worldly reputation and success.

You must overcome Saul to become David. The reason you want to interfere, fix, and tear down, and feel your insides churn because you can see right through their intentions, is because you see your own weaknesses, which you desperately want to deny, reflected like a mirror in that person.

The composure of the dead. Those who cannot afford to die are bound to be defensive. But those who are already dead are free. In childhood, what is good for oneself is good; in adulthood, what is beneficial to oneself is good; and when one matures, what is right is good. If one is satisfied here, the community will always be divided. You must choose what the Lord desires. This is a value that transcends the issues of right and wrong.

Anger. If you examine anger closely, it is an explosive method of over-defending oneself against uncontrollable situations and one's own powerlessness. It is an obsession to appeal one's own value when one cannot control unfair treatment and situations where one is not recognized, and an emotional method to eliminate the cause. One can make absurd choices and regret them for a lifetime. Those who are recognized by God can control their emotions and situations. Gentleness comes from self-esteem.
Unfinished adolescence. Because you are conscious of people rather than the Lord, pretense emerges. When you hope in the Lord alone, people will also look to the Lord.

Life without seasoning. When cooking for a healing camp, people ask with surprise if they can omit other seasonings or spices. If you simmer it long enough, the original flavor of the ingredients will emerge. A focused life needs no seasoning.
If there is an anointing, everyone can know it; if there isn't, the person themselves knows the emptiness deeply.

How to stand as a servant of the Lord. An ambassador plenipotentiary of God is at peace and bold because they fulfill the Lord's will. However, if you seek your own purpose and glory, you will be anxious and fearful. For your own righteousness is like rags.
You are at peace when you fulfill your purpose. You experience true peace when you worship God. This is because you are fulfilling your life's duty.
The beauty of turning back. When you return to the root, you are most human and beautiful. It is turning back to the Father. It is called repentance.

Love conquers sin. When you love, you not only become peaceful but also naturally strive to gather together. Since you receive the precious kingdom of heaven as a gift, worldly desires like dregs are bound to be mere imitations.
Two simple questions explain everything. 1. What do I truly desire in my heart? 2. If I truly desire it, do I have the passion to willingly pay the price?
The one who blocks me is me. The entity that blocks my path is not the following, but 'me'. I, who desire many things while being unwilling to pay the price, am a thief and a robber.
Coram Deo. Living with God in consciousness. In all areas...

How to live amidst shifting standards. True evaluation is not about how I am seen and perceived, but about who I am. What creates history is not the scores or rankings made by human understanding, but the passion and love that cannot be measured by these things. Therefore, there are those who adorn history, and there are those who make history.

The value of the alabaster jar of perfume offered by a beloved person is not tarnished - Yuna Kim. The woman who broke the alabaster jar is criticized, but the value of her love is not tarnished. This is because the one who is supremely important gives recognition. The fact that judges who deny Yuna Kim and those who recognize her are divided like the Red Sea means that Yuna Kim's blood and tears are not tarnished by medals gilded with gold.

The side effects of passive income. Rejoicing in scores given by others is fleeting, but living while seeing that you can never surpass the score you created for yourself, which the nation made, is a terrible punishment.

The nation that has Yuna Kim possesses a class that is unconcerned with questionable gold medals. Rather than the indignation over the stained biased judging, they are happy that Yuna Kim, who was beautiful until the end, represented Korea.
