Submit to God and resist the devil. The secret to victory is to take off your sandals before the Lord. When rights are relinquished, the Lord works.

If you receive something that is not from God, you are destined to become a slave. If you gain power by accepting money, you will be dragged around by the world. If it is something the Lord has not given, simply refuse it cleanly. Who is testing you? We are beings who pursue what the Lord desires, not the wealth and honor the world wants.

The truth that we are bound to perish if God does not help us is not an ominous sign but a cause for rejoicing and celebration. The Lord favors those who seek His face and are after His own heart with biased support from the host.

God leads those with firm hearts and minds, those like trees planted by streams, those whose roots are firmly planted in His word, into peace upon peace. This is because they rely on and hope in the Lord alone.
God said, "I have not called you to succeed," but "I have called you to obey." If we obey, even if we do not "succeed," we will ultimately "triumph."
May we see the Lord's glory in the work that God has begun and in the path He has set. I will dwell in the tent of the Lord alone.

There are times when God pours out an abundance of grace from His word. There are times when He pours out more than what is needed to live for today. As you go through life, there will be times when you must cross the wilderness, walking for a long period without provision. At such times, the word you have stored will sustain you like a camel. A camel crosses the desert for a month without eating, relying on the fat stored in its hump.

God's discipline is not intended to make us successful. His will is for us to become holy like Him. If you seek success, the tunnel will be longer, but if you seek holiness, you will soon see the light.

We must examine ourselves. If the Lord were to bless me immediately, would I be able to see, walk, and give glory? The problem is not the Lord's preparation, but my preparation. If I change, the answers will come automatically.
Despite my struggles due to my shortcomings, God understands the depths of my sorrow and is with me. And He takes my hand and says with strength, "Still, you must walk the Lord's path." Amen.
I am still thirsty and must keep running and pursuing the Lord.
God is never late, and God never fails.
God disciplines and refines in the wilderness. When a person passes through the wilderness, they should be silent.

God makes me give up what was beneficial to me. Only when even the carob pods are gone can I barely return to the Father. The reason God pushes me so harshly is that He wants me to be a person of promise rather than a decent person. I must leave my nest to enter the land of promise. Faith is what is needed when walking between the nest and the land of promise.

God is so alive and leads us faithfully, but sometimes He gives confirmation to people in human ways. One of those ways is by placing a faithful person beside me. When I see that person of God faithfully looking to the Lord and fellowship within the gospel, I experience God's encouragement and comfort. Be strong. You are the 'pupil of the Lord's eye.' The Lord met him in the wasteland, in the roaring wilderness, protected him, guarded him, and kept him as the apple of His eye. As an eagle stirs up its nest and hovers over its young, spreads its wings and catches them, and carries them on its wings, so the Lord alone led him, and no other god was with him. - Deut 32:10-12

God remembers two main things: 1. Small things. 2. Seeking the kingdom of God and His righteousness, not my own greed. If I am faithful in small things for the Lord's glory without trying to fulfill my own greed, I will be remembered.

God pours out His blessings upon the confessions of "It's okay to be abandoned if it's not Your will" and "Still, I love You, Lord." He will exalt those who can be humble after being lifted up, those who can be truly happy in fearing the Lord, and reveal God's glory through them.

God leads all people. If we accept God's guidance, He leads based on that obedience; if we do not accept it, He leads based on our rejection. While comparing the lives of David and Saul for the leaders' meeting, I came across 1 Chronicles. The content emphasizes: ① Jerusalem is important. ② Colleagues are important. ③ Worship is important. ④ We must rely on God. What personally surprised me was the emphasis for future generations to see the historical context of Judah's restoration through the foundational work that opened David's monarchy. It's about essence, not technique. It's about a life of relying solely on the Lord before having operational tactics.

I hope you entrust everything and go. Even if it is painful and agonizing, and your plans do not come to fruition, entrust it to the Lord and go. Then you have done well. Then you have truly done well. If the Lord says it is up to there, then it is a blessing up to there.
Whether in sorrow or joy, I will follow only the Lord. Who can stop me? Can even death stop me? Hymn 355

If Moses had built the tabernacle at the age of 40, he would probably have reinterpreted God's commands and designs and built it magnificently. But it would not have been a tabernacle, just an unsold expensive tent. After being disciplined in the wilderness, Moses obeyed the Lord unconditionally. Listening is power. In Exodus chapters 39 and 40, the phrase "as the Lord commanded" is repeated 17 times.

If you obey with a dry stick, it becomes God's staff. Moses took the staff of God in his hand -Exodus 4:20 We should not see the things we lack now, such as jobs, marriage, studies, and achievements, as deficiencies. Instead of becoming miserable by comparison, it is rather a time granted to worship, serve, and prepare. A wise woodcutter rests, but sharpens his axe. In any case, if the Lord does not give it, we have not received it. Even if He gives it, He gives it in His own time. When deficiency becomes power, God's glory is revealed. That is the power of interpretation. I hope you will have the Lord's perspective.

In the most chased and urgent situations, we must be able to hear and hold onto the Lord's word as a voice. Only by maintaining peace in the most bewildering situations can we respond to the Lord's gentle voice.

There are times when He allows us to face challenges that are difficult to bear. When all methods and paths are blocked, what God originally wanted is for us to shed tears, fall down, and hold onto the cross.

You will surely be disciplined and refined. Otherwise, you are not loved. The Lord will surely intervene in our rationalizations. And He will not compromise or give up until we obey. It may be hardship and tears now, but later it will become faith like gold.

Do you labor with joy? If you take more than 2 seconds to answer "Yes" to this question, it's a red flag. Joy is not a calculation or coercion, but a response of obedience to the condition of the Lord's sovereignty. To act in faith means to act with joy. If it is not something I chose, I just need to obey. Because He is deeper and higher than I am.
I will not stop. I will not give up. I will not look back. Even if I fall, I will get up again. I will never lose and I will win. Because He has shown me His glory.
If we cannot fill our time with holiness, the power of sin will dominate. If we serve the Lord with the first fruits, we will be filled with Him with the latter fruits.
If a marathon runner finishes the race with strength remaining after the finish line, it is a sin.
I do not rejoice and leap when the situation is favorable. Nor do I despair when the situation is unfavorable. Because the Lord prepares and governs. I only want to be His joy.

"What are you, O great mountain? Before Zerubbabel you shall become a plain. And he shall bring forth the capstone with shouts of 'Grace, grace to it!'" (Zechariah 4:7) To make a great mountain a plain, humans intuitively dig. That is the human way. But God works by Himself. Not by might, nor by power, but by His Spirit. He answered me, saying, "This is the word of the Lord to Zerubbabel: ‘Not by might, nor by power, but by my Spirit,’ says the Lord of hosts." (Zechariah 4:6)

There are times when you feel the frustration of running a race with your hands tied behind your back. It feels like if you spend time like this, not only will it be a problem for me, but the Lord will suffer a great loss. However, you must enjoy and savor that time. Sometimes the Lord ties me up so that He can work quietly. When you are immobilized, just rejoice in His presence.

Among David's many achievements, the greatest is not what he accomplished, but not building the temple. He had the ability, will, justification, and even passion to do everything, but it was truly blessed that he did not do what God told him not to do. Do not cling to justifications and desires, but acknowledge the Lord's sovereignty. Active passivity - advancing with passion, but entrusting at the decisive moment because you know the Lord will accomplish it.
Not by my strength, my power, my zeal... Isaiah 37:32 KJV For those who survive in Jerusalem will go forth, and those who escape from Mount Zion. The zeal of the Lord of hosts will do this.
If you do not want to fear the future, you can decide the future now. The surest way to decide the future is to return to the Lord, who alone knows my way.
Any society that would give up a little liberty to gain a little security will deserve neither and lose both. - Benjamin Franklin
When you fix all your gaze on the Lord and feel the Almighty God, you will experience God's work.
It is a blessing to have trials that I can endure.

There are tears that can only be shed after failing and being rejected. These tears do not flow outward but overflow inward, making it difficult for others to share. Although the composition of tears is similar, the reasons and meanings differ, so within these tears, I am broken, see my limitations, and finally see the Lord. God's hammer that breaks my shell is terrifying, painful, and sorrowful, but after refinement, it bears the fruit of righteousness and peace. "For the moment all discipline seems painful rather than joyful, but later it yields the peaceful fruit of righteousness to those who have been trained by it." - Hebrews 12:11

Opportunities will surely come. If you let time pass meaninglessly before the opportunity arrives, you will not be prepared when it does, and you will miss the precious opportunity. Prepare today as if it were your last, with the mindset of preparing your whole life for a single moment.

A musician on stage is extremely nervous. They practice a piece they've played many times hundreds of times. However, the audience is relaxed and simply enjoys. After the performance, the musician receives applause, bouquets, and glory, but the spectators do not. Exceptionally, there are audience members who anxiously share the tension and rejoice together after the performance. These are loved ones, like family. When you love, you share hardship and glory without envy.
Even when my chest feels tight and my heart aches, I still look to God and trust Him because God does not make mistakes. I entrust all these things to the Lord. Only the Lord reigns over me.
Just take the only things God allows and do not care about others.

It is arrogant to think that you can change someone's heart at will with a single message or text, or to try to explain everything. Just as stepping on embers spreads them further, there is nothing more foolish than interfering in matters that God must touch and resolve. David believed that being recognized was God's grace and being criticized was also within God's goodness. That is why he was a great leader. "For the foolishness of God is wiser than men, and the weakness of God is stronger than men." (1 Corinthians 1:25)

If David had spent his days solely responding to every concern and criticism about himself, he would never have been able to embrace the vision of God's work. Entrusting Saul's death to God, he should have simply marked the end of his task with 'taking only Saul's spear and water jug.' David's fundamental principle: "As the Lord lives, the Lord will strike him down, or his day will come to die, or he will go down into battle and perish." - 1 Samuel 26:10 If you do not keep this principle, you are like an unbeliever. It is because you do not acknowledge that the Lord lives.

The hardest part of the journey of faith is the final moment. You must endure that moment when you want to give up, when you feel your life has capsized, when you no longer hear God's voice. Because the last half hour is the hardest part of faith. Some members may feel it's time to 'give up.' However, I want to say this: please endure a little longer. When you face momentary problems, hold onto the promise of eternity.

It seems like others are going easily while I am going through difficulty. It is dark ahead, and when I cry out in prayer, He shows me only half a step. The hardest part is that He doesn't give me a schedule. I don't know when it will end, and I'm not asking for something big, but I don't know when I will arrive and live like a human being. What my family wants is a simple life, but with a slightly better school than others, a slightly better-paying job, and a spouse of suitable standing. The Lord insists on making me walk through the wilderness. He feeds me manna and gives me water from the rock until I am completely humbled and obedient to His voice. When you eat manna and drink water from the rock, you will emerge as pure gold. "You shall remember all the way that the Lord your God has led you these forty years in the wilderness, that he might humble you, testing you to know what was in your heart, whether you would keep his commandments or not. He humbled you by letting you hunger, and then he fed you with manna, which you did not know nor did your fathers know, that he might make you know that man does not live by bread alone, but that man lives by every word that comes from the mouth of the Lord." - Deuteronomy 8:2,3

In the wilderness, to drink a sip of water or eat a piece of bread, I had to cry out and rely on the Lord with all my might. When you rely solely on the Lord, enslaved people become the greatest nation in the world. However, in Canaan, crops grew, fruits ripened, and water was abundant without needing to rely entirely on the Lord. This is the reason for rapid corruption. If you lose the awe you felt when you first met Him, you quickly become arrogant and turn away from His word. Do as you did at first. "But he answered, 'It is written, “Man shall not live by bread alone, but by every word that comes out of the mouth of God.”'" - Matthew 4:4

In the wilderness, you cannot wear fine designer brands, wear shiny shoes, or even think about luxury foot care. Simply surviving is an accomplishment. Do not complain in the wilderness that your desires are not being met; instead, be thankful for your dusty sandals, your tattered clothes that haven't worn out, and your unblistered feet. This is because God has specially considered you. The wilderness requires wilderness miracles. "Your clothing did not wear out on you and your feet did not swell these forty years." - Deuteronomy 8:4

Be good to those who have shown you kindness. This is God's will and invites peace into your life. Even if that person does not treat you kindly and has a bad temper... overcome evil with good. This is our calling. "The Lord was with Joseph and showed him steadfast love, and gave him favor in the sight of the keeper of the prison." (Genesis 39:21)

Living an ordinary life is not the Lord's will. At the very moment you think it's too late, if you pursue it with a thirst that doesn't wake you up automatically in the morning, you will become an outstanding person within a few years. A contented pig will never achieve its dreams.
You don't need to be told the answer. Most people already know. When you simply try to obey the heart given to you, you experience the Lord's work. The Lord does it.
Do not waste your time in the wilderness carelessly. God does not make mistakes.

You will surely suffer hardship. You will also be tested. Your vision testifies to this. If the mission is great, the resistance will also be great. I hope you overcome it. "Now the just shall live by faith; but if he shrinks back, my soul has no pleasure in him." (Hebrews 10:38)

If I am put in prison, it does not mean I should despair there. Rather, I should become a diligent prisoner and find hidden opportunities. When you carry out your mission with the same interest and diligence as observing the faces of Pharaoh's officials, life's opportunities will also come. "Joseph asked Pharaoh's own jailer, who was in charge of him, 'Why do you look so sad today?'" - Genesis 40:7

A chicken has perfect wings but cannot fly because its eyesight is only 30cm. An eagle soars in the sky with an average eyesight of 4.0. If you know the Lord's will, you can fly. If you obey the will He has revealed, the best path will be discerned.

In David's psalms, the phrase "deliver me from my troubles" includes endurance. David prayed constantly, but he had to spend many years with only enough salvation to prolong his life. This was not because King Saul was powerful, but because David needed to change. The environment is not the problem; I am the problem. In hardship, the Lord closely observes our reactions and attitudes. We can advance as much as we change. Saul will only be used for a short time; after the refinement is complete, he will not be found even if searched for. "(Psalm 119:71) It is good for me that I was afflicted, that I may learn your statutes."

There is no pain without a reason. Pain has a purpose. There is a word from God that I need to hear. If you respond to that word, you will live. But if you ignore it, you will die. That is the truth. "Keep my words in your heart, and obey my commands, and you will live." Proverbs 4:4
God was behind it. - Genesis 45:5 (MSGB)

The wick of a lamp can burn brightly as long as it is continuously supplied. If the supply is cut off, it burns itself out. Instead of working sporadically, when you have consistent time with the Lord, the thorns are removed, and you gain the strength to rest. No~ burn out~~
The anointing of my inheritance is at work. The anointing of power that breaks the yoke is working.

Trying to solve problems easily is greed. Running away from the situation, fearing worldly people and selling your faith, trying to find solace in the world and people, praying like gambling after parting with a loved one, betting with the Lord with a 50/50 chance, interpreting yourself and your situation by comparing yourself to others, falling into self-pity and becoming a victim, trying to solve everything in faith with one big move, trying to solve everything in that place, immediately, trying to do too well, thinking of doing something after securing money and recognition for worry-free stability – you must fully utilize the opportunities God is training you with. You must shed some tears and feel some heartache. It is necessary to hold your ground and look to the Lord faithfully and truthfully. Only then will you emerge as pure gold. Otherwise, you will emerge undercooked. It means you will be gold-plated, not pure gold.

If I entrust my path to God and rely on Him in all circumstances, He will bring about the conclusion regardless of the situation. "Trust in the Lord, and do good; dwell in the land and befriend faithfulness." - Psalm 37:5

If you don't understand the meaning of suffering, you will despair. Wisdom allows me to understand the meaning and enables me to overcome. "Why am I suffering? My grace is sufficient for you, for my power is made perfect in weakness." 2 Corinthians 12:9
If you only serve when all conditions are met, faithfulness will be impossible until death. Risk your life in limited circumstances. You will see the glory of God.

You must be faithful when given an opportunity. God's work does not stop just because I refuse. Not only will the work be hindered, but I and my household may perish. If you remain silent, the people of Judah will obtain deliverance and salvation from another source, but you and your father's house will perish. Esther 4:13-14 If these men are silent, the stones will cry out. Luke 19:40

It is the devil's work to make problems seem bigger. Therefore, he tries to stop them by any means. All forms of discouragement are given by the devil. The battle on this earth is ultimately a battle of 'Will I be discouraged?' or 'Will the devil be discouraged?'.

What is the best? It is what the Lord has allowed. The best clothes are those that fit and suit me well, and the best food is what suits my palate. Even if what is given to me seems shabby, God bestows power through it. David had a sling and stones, and Moses had a staff.

I do my best according to the work of God who empowers me, as much as I can. Maximized obedience is not measured by worldly standards but by clinging to God's word and challenging the world. Obedience is believing that my destiny is determined by the Word. To this end, I also labor and strive according to His work, which works mightily within me. Colossians 1:29 May you become a bulldozer bound by the Word.

To cook ramen well, read the instructions for about 30 seconds and cook it diligently. If you want to reach a higher level, cook it every day. Doing it every day is skill. That is 'spirituality of everyday life'.

What we realize through that failure is that failure is not failure, but a process of becoming bold and relying more. When walking through the valley of the shadow of death, people of the world will say 'they failed', but it is not so. 'Even though I walk through the valley of the shadow of death, if the Lord is with me, I can surely overcome!'

The first thing David did after being anointed was not to wear a crown, be exalted, and be recognized, but rather to be driven into the wilderness for training in 'failure'. What we realize through that failure is that failure is not failure, but a process of becoming bold and relying more. When walking through the valley of the shadow of death, people of the world will say 'they failed', but it is not so. 'Even though I walk through the valley of the shadow of death, if the Lord is with me, I can surely overcome!'
I hope you fight for the Lord's will, not for your own victory. May you become brave warriors of faith who can rejoice even in defeat for the Lord's will. I must decrease, and He must increase.

In David's later years, God gave him blessings without worry. This is because he no longer needed to face failure to confirm 'what he was pursuing'. The wisest and best path is to submit completely before the Lord. It will be the fastest path.

There is a way to always make the devil a loser. Every time you are challenged, if you cling to the Lord more, you are 'making soup for a dog'. There will be trials and hardships, but you will become bolder day by day. Hahaha~~~
The best way to love the young people I love is to love the Lord more.
When I turn all my gaze to the Lord and feel the living God, my life becomes His work, and God begins to work.

It is true that the tasks entrusted to us are so enormous that they seem to devour us, and it is also true that we have absolutely no ability to handle them. However, what we should look at is not the problem, but God. That is why God told the new, inexperienced leader Joshua, not to give him any other premium, but to 'be strong and courageous'. The secret to making the Lord your strength is to believe and act boldly. Ignore the problems and look only to the Lord! Hallelujah!

What is obtained through effort is good. However, when effort hits its limit and all good things crumble, and you realize you cannot do it by your own strength, you will enjoy the best that comes from heaven.

There are always problems and wandering, but there is also the work of the Holy Spirit and maturity. Do not panic about what is not working, but be thankful for what is poured out. KTX does not stop just because of wind and rain. We ignore it and keep moving forward. We do not stop in the face of problems and challenges. We solve them while running and spread the gospel while running.

To leaders and prospective leaders... Jesus asked Peter, 'Do you love me?' and said, 'Feed my sheep.' You must confirm 'love' and connect it to 'feeding the sheep.' If you fail an exam or fail a diet and then binge eat six servings, you don't want to answer when someone asks about the results, and you resent the person who asked. However, if you achieve a score that you can never achieve in your lifetime and have an angelic body weight, it is almost impossible to remain 'silent'. People who have had intense experiences through worship will inevitably step forward to 'feed the sheep.' You must start with love for Jesus, with fervor. We cannot help but speak of what we have seen and heard. What do you hear and see? If your heart is not burning with Jesus, you cannot save souls.

If I look at the same place as God, God will supply all my needs with His power. Those who do the Lord's work for the Lord's glory receive the Lord's support. Let this mind be in you, which was also in Christ Jesus. Philippians 2:5

The purpose will not change. It will not stop. Even if I am out of breath, I will run the race to the end. If I can no longer run and grow weak, I will crawl to the Lord's altar and offer myself. And then I will be happy. For I have seen the glory of the Lord.
Differences in air pressure create wind. Become a spiritual anticyclone, and a wind will blow that overturns the rotten world and revives dry bones.

If He had wanted obedience tomorrow, He would have spoken tomorrow and done it tomorrow. We delay uncomfortable words. Sometimes God's intervention completely disrupts my plans. This is not a cause for discouragement, but a reason to rejoice and leap for joy. There are things to look forward to there.

If you are too busy to make time for your loved ones, you are doing more unnecessary things than what the Lord has commanded. Please be less greedy and cherish love. Loving the precious people given to me, that is what God wanted.

Leviticus 22:22. "When you reap the harvest of your land, do not reap to the very edges of your field or gather the gleanings of your harvest. Do not go over your vineyard again or gather the fallen fruit of your vineyard; leave them for the poor and for the foreigner. I am the LORD your God." Please help when you can. What is amazing is that God protects the dignity of the poor in this method of charity. You don't need to boast about giving, and it doesn't matter who picks it up.
The will of God, Nothing more, Nothing less, Nothing else.

Small tips from a missionary with a red face from heartache to the youth whose hearts are bleeding. 1. Pain will continue, but do not panic. Pain disappears instantly only with drugs, and the aftermath is even more unpleasant. 2. Pain is not fatal and is essential for growth → Believe that God gives you trials you can bear. 3. Let go of what the Lord has not confirmed → Do not imagine or write novels, I know only 5% of this situation. The Lord knows this situation and will reach the most appropriate conclusion in His time. 4. Be faithful to the basics → Do everything you can to focus on worship; if you don't receive grace at this point, it's like not being given anesthesia during surgery. 5. Live simply. → You can focus, and if you have free time and are distressed, people become monsters or beasts. When you meet people then, you will see things you shouldn't. It will cost as much as a lottery win to fix it. 6. When you do your morning quiet time, believe that there is a word of blessing for you in it and do it - the Lord truly speaks to you. 7. Try to obey that word. Starting with small things - miracles happen, and the Lord always speaks through His word. A slightly irrelevant word... I am suffering from this in reality. Yes, I love you. 8. Try not to write emails, messages, or texts after late evening. You will truly regret it in the morning. Especially, creating dramatic reversals with a few lines of text only happens in movies. In that time, give your heart to the Lord and pray. 9. Read devotional books and the Word regularly. - People grow the most when they are in pain. 10. "If you give me a Yes or No conclusion, I will obey coolly, but if you don't, I'm so frustrated" → It's all a lie and bullshit. When a conclusion is reached, it looks cool, but within an hour, you'll be in a mental breakdown. You are not as cool as you imagine, and especially untrustworthy are your will and emotions. The Lord also has such insight. He is not deceived. 11. "Do not envy the prosperity of sinners, but always fear the LORD. There will be a future for you, and your hope will not be cut off." (Proverbs 23:17-18) - Never interpret this arbitrarily. Only the devil will praise you. 12. We never know the future or the future; our current selves are not what we designed in the past, which is completely obvious - the Lord's specialty is being a potter. He will do as He pleases. Please do not stress too much. Ecclesiastes 7:14 In the day of prosperity be joyful, and in the day of adversity consider; God has made the one as well as the other, so that people cannot find out anything that will be after them.

Many people give up halfway. Those who endure to the end will see glory. Satan originally has no roots, so most attacks, though they seem strong, are sporadic. No matter how fresh a flower looks, it wilts in a vase within 4 or 5 days. We, who have roots, are rough, but if we endure, we will win.

1 Timothy 6:8 But if we have food and clothing, we will be content with that. 6:9 People who want to get rich fall into temptation and a trap and into many foolish and harmful desires that plunge men into ruin and destruction. Weeds do not demand much. May you not become a weed, but become a weed and become brave warriors of faith who fulfill the Lord's desires.

I try to determine happiness by looking at my possessions. I am a person who lives by bread alone. I determine happiness by grace, mission, and God's provision. I am a person who lives by the Word. May you become a person who looks to the Lord's provision rather than a life of worry and anxiety searching for needs. Pursue mission, pursue the Word.
I will never stop until I finish the race set before me.
David was greatly distressed...., But David found strength in the LORD his God. 1 Samuel 30:6

When you start dating, whether you want it or not, the 100th day of meeting will come. That is called Chronos. However, one day, as the relationship deepens and you confess your love, it has nothing to do with such mechanical time. The day you confess is called Kairos. God will build you up with His love and power on the day that is prepared and suitable for you (Kairos), rather than your old age (Chronos). Chronos comes on its own, but Kairos must be prepared.

If the Lord delays even when everything is ready, it is the surest proof that I am not yet ready. It is because I could not be humbled more, could not be more humble... because greed has not been removed. I must be more prostrate. I must live with the heart that I will not regret even if I live my life prostrate. Only then will the Lord work.

It is not that we don't do it because we don't know. We know, but we don't want to do it, and that is why. That is pride. If we practice and live even what we know, the ordinary will become a miracle.

It was a dry stick to Moses, but it became power when he obeyed God's might. The grace God gives is not a new gift, but the igniting of the gifts I already possess. I am of that style, that vessel, but I become most powerful when I am held in God's hand.
I have nothing to offer but apologies and thanks. "So you also, when you have done all that you were commanded, say, 'We are unworthy servants; we have only done what was our duty.'" - Luke 17:10

David had no choice but to change his circumstances. However, as David chose his attitude towards life, he thought of the Lord's sovereignty. He who acknowledges the Lord's sovereignty becomes the most powerful person. Psalm 75:6, 7 For exaltation comes from neither east nor west, nor from the south. But God is the judge; he puts down one and lifts up another.
Do what you can, and the Lord will do what is fitting.

A person who has been drenched by a downpour does not fear the rain. The fearful are those who are less wet. He who is willing to die will live. Do not struggle with trivialities; if you die cleanly, you will see glory. 一死覺悟

"But seek first the kingdom of God and his righteousness, and all these things will be added to you." - Matthew 6:33 People expend their resources and energy based on whose evaluation they care about. If you respond to God, you will try to align yourself with God.

I am not here because I couldn't get a US visa, because my family didn't support me, because I lacked skill, or because I missed my chance. Joseph was a slave and a prisoner, but he was there by the Lord's will. When we understand the Lord's will (Eph. 5:17), true opportunities begin to appear.

To those whose lives have collapsed and have no hope of survival, my advice as a minister is to give what remains to the Lord, even if you die. Then the Lord will handle it, whether He makes porridge or rice with it. This is what a minister can say. I'd bet on this advice being worthy of stones. Elijah asked for the widow's last meal, with the intention of eating it and dying.

If I met a bear, I would be terrified and run for my life. But for a hunter, a bear is tuition for children, rent, income that allows for a rare meal with family, and the ability to replace an old car. Become a hunter of hardship.

Become a hunter of hardship. When you encounter hardship, do not be afraid and retreat, but shout, "Hardship, I'm glad I met you!" It's not a big deal if you just face it. Hardship is not difficult because it is hardship, but because your heart collapses in the face of hardship. Psalm 119:71 says, "It is good for me that I was afflicted, that I may learn your statutes." Those who discover the hidden meaning within hardship are the ones the devil fears most. Nothing happens to us by chance before the Almighty God. There is always a purpose that we must learn.
Do not try to do too well. It is all greed. Just try to fulfill the Lord's will. Everything is contained within that.

I hoped to be firm, but I was shaken; I hoped not to be shaken, but everything collapsed. What allows us to still rejoice in that painful place is that God does not make mistakes. Even in your situation, which you cannot understand at all, God 'never' makes mistakes. God is absolutely faithful.

Living consistently is important. The life of a young person who does not despair even without major changes or responses suddenly transforms. Skill is the ability to grasp that change and opportunity when it comes. That is why meetings and gatherings are important for young people.

David was greatly distressed, but he took courage in the Lord his God... David inquired of the Lord, saying, "Shall I pursue this army? Shall I overtake them?" The Lord answered him, "Pursue, for you shall surely overtake them, and you shall recover all." When we are with the Lord, we become bold. When I am with you, my beloved, I have no fear. We will recover all that has been taken, and more. We will be repaid more than the tears we have shed. Lazarus' death brought great sorrow, but his resurrection brought even greater glory to the Lord. I call upon all to rise before the Lord who raises the dead. Now, it's our turn!
When walking through the wilderness, I hope you will smile. May only the Lord receive my deep tears and blood.

Even if it is scary and I can't do it, even if I rack my brain, worry, and suffer, if the Lord tells me to follow, I follow. Even if I am broken and tattered, if the Lord says to go, I go. I obey even when I can't. If I can't follow, it's not a matter of compromise, but something that should tear my heart apart.

Pharaoh's proposal to Moses was to do it moderately, not go too far, and only let the men go. If they give one thing, they will demand another. Many giants of faith who overcame persecution and hardship fall. They fall because of the weapon called 'compromise,' leaving only splendid tombs. I hope you will break through and never be satisfied. If you are told to go to the cross, which was cursed by the Jews, then go.

"As for what was sown among thorns, this is the one who hears the word, but the cares of the world and the deceitfulness of riches choke the word, and it proves unfruitful." - Matthew 13:22 Hurrying and worrying suffocates the received word and prevents it from bearing fruit. Please, do not worry or hurry. The Lord is still working. Going to the sacrifice before Samuel arrives is the biggest mistake.

More important than being misunderstood is not misunderstanding others. If you do that, the devil can try in God's church, but he will ultimately not be able to finish it. I hope you become stubborn enough to ignore any attack. The devil will feel frustrated by such a person and die prematurely from a 'heart attack.' We are under the blood of the Lord.
What holds me is the calling of the Almighty Lord. If a mission drives your life, other things will be opened by the Lord's power.
May God's wonderful providence of making a way in the wilderness work even more through my brother.
Do not be swayed by decisions that your flesh desires, but be at peace in the choices the Lord desires. That is not bondage, but rather freedom.
You are most likely to be deeply hurt and disappointed by the person you trust the most. This is because you should trust only the Lord.

When your heart is troubled, it is the Lord's kind sign to return to the basics. It is better to desire only the Lord in hardship than to be at ease while doing wrong; this is the blessing a person of faith should embrace.

If you build relationships on emotions, they will soon end in divorce, shipwreck, estrangement, or even enmity. However, if you build them on promises, even if emotions fade, the promises are eternal, allowing you to have relationships with trust and stability, creating new emotions. God's intention, God's will, is the promise.
If you respond to a high calling, low problems will be naturally resolved.
God determines the time and season. What people must do is be faithful. You must respond to the Lord, not to problems or conflicts.
If you feel you have given up a lot, it means there is still much to be given up.

There are times when we don't know which way to go at a crossroads. If our desire is to reach a conclusion quickly, no matter where it leads, the Lord prepares a third way: the path of mature waiting.

Yes or No, we want results immediately. However, the Lord speaks precious words we need to hear through the process. If we skip the process, we cannot enjoy the best results even if we receive them. What the caterpillar calls death, God calls a butterfly.

Weight training means exerting force against gravity and weight towards the center of the earth. Then the muscles become stronger. The muscles of the mind are the same. If you push away hardship boldly, saying, "I'm going to struggle!" you become stronger. But if you say, "I'm afraid of hardship," your mind becomes weak. Resolve and be bold. You will become strong in body and mind.

Please do not be jealous or envious of the opportunities that come to others. The opportunities prepared for you will surely come someday. Opportunities are given not to those who are jealous, but to those who are prepared.
To have better policies and ideas, we need to know our fellow believers more and understand their hearts. The Lord, who expects excellence from leaders, focuses on faithfulness.
There are no shortcuts to maturity, while we worry about how fast we grow, God is concerned about how strong we grow. God is never in a hurry but he is always on time! Keep going guys

There are no round-trip tickets on the journey of faith. There is only a one-way trip running towards the Lord. If you leave room to return to sin, you will surely fall again. You cannot fight and win against sin without dying to yourself.
Never give up and fight persistently against sin. By the power of the precious blood, failure and frustration will soon turn into testimonies and praise.

When God gives you hardship, it is because He has decided to save you. If God intended to destroy you, He would not give you hardship. He leaves those who are destined to perish alone. Be thankful in hardship and be transformed. If you hold onto the Word and resolve to die, you will live.

The difference between my desire to have my problems solved and God's desire to fundamentally change my life determines the period of my refinement. In the end, we are all going to the same place; the only difference is how much we get beaten up along the way. A soccer ball must turn around to eventually go into the goal.
Yes I will run the race, until I will see your face.

It took transportation for 79 people to return from the retreat. While preparing the message, I asked for help from those I could contact, albeit limitedly, and was given the heart to trust the Lord. After organizing everything and leaving Wycliffe last, I checked all the transportation and found that not a single seat was left over or short. God is low-cost and high-efficiency.
Fight the spiritual battle with thanksgiving and blessings. To counter anger and resentment, you must approach with a heart of love. War always precedes great grace.
If the situation is impossible for me to handle, it is time for the Lord to work. It is so difficult to make the Almighty Lord the Lord of my life that I have come to Him in this roundabout way.

It is an exaggeration to say that you have laid yourself down before the Lord when you cannot entrust even one relationship to Him. If you obey, it may seem like you lose everything, but you gain everything instead.
It is painful to stand where you want to be. Stand where you have been sent.

The reason the suffering towards you continues so relentlessly is because there is an unchanged self that must be transformed before that suffering, and the Lord persistently demands it. Respond to the constant suffering by being transformed.
When I humbly serve the Lord, there are many painful things, but I rely more on the Lord in whom I trust.
You do not necessarily learn good things only from good leaders. You can receive good lessons even from bad leaders.
It is pride to say that you will serve the Lord in your successful state. When you do not rely on the Lord, you become proud and fall.
Those who honor me I will honor... 1 Samuel 2:30
They say the economy is difficult. The most foolish thing among them is to kill a living economy first in an attempt to save it. Let us run so that grace may be poured upon the crumbs given to us.

There is no excuse for not being able to do the Lord's work because of a lack of money. It is nonsensical to say that you cannot do the work of the Almighty Lord because of a shortage. If we abandon human glory and seek the Lord's glory, there is no reason why God would not support us.

Even if you play a wrong chord while playing the guitar, it's not a big problem for the praise. However, if the rhythm is wrong, it's a tribulation for the player and torture for the listener. You must run with the Lord when He pushes you. You must stick close to the Lord when He pulls you. Those who cannot do that will suffer with their hands and feet and remain the same.

Lot was a righteous man, but he was not sensitive enough to God's voice. Not all righteous people are the same, and not all faith is the same. If Lot had been more alert and heard the Lord's voice in Sodom and Gomorrah, there would have been a greater salvation than the destruction that was delayed until his escape.
If you hang on and rely on someone, you are forming a relationship. If you rely on God for your needs, you are forming a relationship with God.

Leader Meeting Part 2 Deuteronomy QT (Thursday) 1. It is a regulation concerning war. 2. The leader's role is to bless and proclaim. 3. It is the only ancient law that records reasons for exemption from war: the Code of Hammurabi. In ancient Near Eastern law, conscription was the norm with no exceptions. 4. The reason for exemptions from military conscription in God's law is that war is not waged by man but belongs to God. - Do not calculate too much. 5. A person with a negative mindset, no matter how capable or talented, should not be appointed.

Leader Meeting Jesus' Establishment of the 12 Disciples Mark 3:13 Purpose: 1. To be with them - Stay with the Lord and obey. 2. To preach - The Lord's Great Commission is to reclaim lost lives. 3. To have the authority to cast out demons - Power is given to those who carry out their mission. Operate strategically at the spiritual level. James QT (Wednesday) 1. James, who delivers practical messages. 2. It mentions prayer, praise, and measures for the sick and sinful. 3. It urges prayer through Elijah's prayer. 4. Beware of heresy and triumph with truth. Do not be deceived.

There are two ways to close. The easy way is to barely finish as if running away, but the way God desires is to depart in His time after receiving power. Let's abandon the prejudice that the easy path is the only way to live. When the Lord's sovereignty is proclaimed and His time comes, and the measure of my transformation is complete, the Lord will set me in a high place. May you become young people who, held by the Lord's hand, part the dark Red Sea of sin.
Even if many things are done and many powers are manifested, if love is not the motive, it is of no benefit. - 1 Corinthians 13 -

In 2 Timothy, we see the passion of the aging apostle Paul, whose life, though fading, blazes anew like a drink offering poured out on the altar. May we offer our youth and our last breath to exalt and love only the Lord. He is worthy to receive it.

Eric, once called the "God of Guitar," vowed before God to quit drugs and debauchery after having his son, but he repeatedly failed. In '91, his 4-year-old son fell to his death from a 55-story apartment, and he donated 7 million pounds to build a drug rehabilitation center on an island. Then he wrote this song: "If you see me in heaven, will you know my name? Will you hold my hand? I must be strong, and carry on, 'Cause I know I don't belong here in heaven." He was able to carry on his life because he did not fall into self-pity. Self-pity is idolatry and sin. Psalm 62:8 says we must come before the Lord at all times and pour out everything. Then we will stand as wounded healers.
Do not fear, even if the path is lonely and narrow. For if you follow the Lord, God's glory will be on that narrow path.

When we meditate on the root of suffering, we find that it is due to greed. We are not called to this place because we are the best in this field. We just need to do what the Lord leads us to do and be faithful to what He allows. We should not be greedy to do excessively well. Remember the Lord's tears for that place. Remember, the Lord does not call us because of our ability, but He empowers those He calls for His mission.
If I lay my dreams on the Lord's altar, He will return them with the power of resurrection as pure and selfless visions.

A magnificent ship is docked in a beautiful harbor full of coral reefs. Technically perfect, the ship remains in the harbor, used as a waterside restaurant, which it was never meant to be. This is because it cannot see ahead. If you cannot hear the Lord's voice, your life will not move forward. It will be the same even after ten years. Return to the last place you heard His voice and listen to His gentle whisper again. You will become a premium Christian.
The mistake made in the latter half of an adventure, even if it seems to be going well, is pride.

There is no groundbreaking method for learning to walk. There is no need for other aids or wheelchairs. You just need to fall many times within your mother's warm support. Then you will walk, and then you will run. Furthermore, you will help your younger siblings.

We think we have to do a lot and do everything well to reach the place everyone desires. This is obsession. It is deception. Life is not achieved by effort alone. This is because my life is not mine, but the Lord's. If you entrust yourself to the Lord and accept Him, He will show you secret things you do not know. Martha, Martha, you are worried and troubled about many things, but one thing is needed. Mary has chosen the good portion, which will not be taken away from her. Busyness leads to mistakes.

There are two ways to realize. Listening to the Word and realizing it is the best way. If you refuse to listen to the Word and obey, you will be sent to the wilderness. Then you will learn through tears and snot, and with your body. I recommend the former.

Three million livestock were buried alive due to foot-and-mouth disease. It is said to have started with a farmer's overseas visit. When sinful Israelites try to live with God, one of two things happens: they either receive God's power through obedience or receive discipline through disobedience. Because we are important individuals, individual obedience is required.

If it is too precious, it cannot be used. Fine bone china from England, Tang Dynasty teacups from China, and expensive Japanese tea ceremony utensils are only on display and too precious to use. Most of these break when a careless junior knocks them over while moving. At that time, cursing the junior is useless. Serve with what is precious. It will be recorded in heaven.

If a businessman trying to sell a product advertises heavily and prepares events, but has no actual product and only hands out brochures or product information, it is a fraud. Give what you promised. Not being filled with the Holy Spirit while doing the Lord's work is becoming the biggest fraud.
Throughout our nation's 5000-year history, we have lost our country when we lacked power. To avoid losing ourselves and our friends, there must be revival.
Give what you have to give, and He will give what He has to give.
Glory: * Saturday Moving Worship First Meeting We will have the first Moving Worship service. Location: The City Temple Conference Centre, Holborn Viaduct, London EC1A 2DE. Time & Date: 4:00 PM, February 14, 2015. The Lord's holiness and dominion become our infinite joy and hope. Holy, holy, holy is the Lord God Almighty, who was, and is, and is to come. - Revelation 4:8

* God uses the overwrite button rather than delete. God's work is not to remove or exempt us from suffering. Suffering simply exists, but He shows great glory, overwhelming suffering with glory. Romans 8:18: "I consider that our present sufferings are not worth comparing with the glory that will be revealed in us."
* Prelude to a downpour What God allows before revival is a poor spirit.

* Three Days of Gratitude Relay - Day Two 1. I am thankful for everything that happens to me, for Christ lives in me. 2. I am thankful for seeing God's glory through precious fellow workers. 3. I am thankful for the presence and fellowship that make me happy even if today were my last. This gratitude relay, started by the choice of my beloved Esther Minji Chung, is on its second day. I nominate my beloved Susan Yusun Kim and Koeun Sun. Starting today, share three items of gratitude for three days and tag two people (it's not mandatory ^_^).

* Things Visible Only When Lowered If you humble yourself, you will find meaning in many things that were previously meaningless. This is because when you humble yourself, you can see God's loving hand and footsteps. Therefore, when you are humbled, you become much more glorious than when you are exalted.
* Darkness tries to hide the fact that He has received glory. This is the fact that darkness so desperately wants to deny.
* A terrifying attack, but a glorious reversal. This is because the God we serve is alone worthy to receive honor and glory. Bring it on.

* To the retreat worship team: Show who the God who called us is, what He has done for us, how we want to respond to that love, how beautiful it is to become one and experience the waterfall-like presence of the Lord, and to what extent is the realm of His beauty who makes us beautiful. Whatever the outcome, may only the Lord shine, and that is victory.

* Worship Leader A worship leader must first be a worshiper. Start worshiping alone in your room with just a guitar. You should fear being called someone who only has musical talent. The greatest glory is for a minister to dwell in the Lord's presence and glory.

* One Desire To forever long for the Lord's beauty in His temple and to be in perfect union with Him. "Seek my face" (Psalm 27). Jesus is the radiance of God's glory and the exact representation of His being (Hebrews 1:3). The ministry of all the apostles was to seek His face (2 Corinthians 3:18, 4:1), and Jesus told those who wanted to see the Father to look at Him (John 14:8, 9). Look only at the Lord 24 hours a day. That is everything.

* When humbled, one becomes glorious. When I humble myself again and again, the Lord is revealed. It is only when the Lord shines that one becomes glorious. Boasting in the world before the Lord is like a smelly rag.
* The reason for suffering. After passing through this darkness, this darkness will later become a message to myself and others.
* These young people before the Lord are glory.

There is a song called "Vision." It depicts the heavenly worship described in Revelation 7, seeing God and participating in His glory. Often, vision is understood as personal desires, careers, and achievements. True vision is seeing the Lord's glory. Then, when the Lord sends you, you can follow Him like Isaiah. After this I looked, and there before me was a great multitude that no one could count, from every nation, tribe, people and language, standing before the throne and before the Lamb. They were wearing white robes and holding palm branches in their hands. And they cried out in a loud voice, "Salvation belongs to our God, who sits on the throne, and to the Lamb." Revelation 7:9, 10.
I consider that our present sufferings are not worth comparing with the glory that will be revealed in us. - Romans 8:18
The greatest miracle is the transformation of the spirit. There must be a longing for God's glory. There is no greater glory than a sinner being transformed. We see God's work through souls.

When you are in pain, you must say you are in pain. Even if you are hurt because of your own fault, when you shed tears saying you are in pain, the Lord bandages you, heals you, and makes you more glorious than before. "O people, pour out your hearts at all times..."

Jacob saw God's path, God's ladder, when he slept with a stone pillow at Bethel. Without human wisdom, ambition, or attachment, he saw the angels ascending and descending and God's glory. We live by lying, deceiving, betraying, and being betrayed to gain worldly glory, until we reach a situation where we sleep with a stone pillow. When tears flow down your cheeks from a rough stone pillow, that path, which was not visible before, that eternal path, opens up.
Weakness is the true strength that allows us to experience the power of Christ, who is strong. "My grace is sufficient for you, for my power is made perfect in weakness." - 2 Corinthians 12:9

We return with a deep realization of how precious the ministry we do is. It cannot be expressed in words. We in London deeply think of and love all the members in Korea. Our friends who spread good influence to every church make us truly happy and also make us straighten our collars.

If I try to fulfill my own desires, only regret will remain, but if I follow the Lord's path, there will be glory. If you are greedy, you may gain something, but in the end, you will lose everything, and though the Lord's path may involve much loss, you will gain everything instead.
If you are going to boast, you should boast of your weaknesses. For God's power is even more abundant in our weakness. In weakness, God's power, unmixed with impurities, is perfected.
We must serve with the Lord's heart and the Lord's love. Only then will the Lord receive all the glory.

If you seek the Lord's glory wholeheartedly, you will become bold and free. To such a person, human rights, material rights, and spiritual rights will be entrusted. Do not fear trivial things. May your life be a burnt offering before the altar, so that only the Lord may be exalted.

We must run without rest so that the Lord may receive glory. So much so that we don't know what to do because we love the Lord so much... May your heart be filled with longing for the Lord's temple... I love Jesus.

With the Lord by my side, I have nothing to fear. Since it is God's will, I will not grow tired. For the sake of His eternal glory, all other things are bound to be secondary. Like the rides at an amusement park... Hold on tight to the handle. Now, let's run.

In the history of Israel, King Ahab was the most wicked king, just as it was in the time of Elijah. And Elijah was the most powerful prophet of that era. The darker the times, the more powerful the light that dispels that darkness. Who will become powerful? "POST TENEBRAS LUX"

True joy is not acquisition or achievement. It is the cross and looking forward to the joy to come before me. That joy enables us to overcome present lack and suffering. For the joy set before him he endured the cross... Hebrews 12:2
After the Saturday meeting, one member said, as if savoring it, "It's nice~" I also find the grace that the Lord has granted to be good and glorious.
I hope that you will not become too comfortable as a captive, but will fight a fierce and good fight. The glory of a believer cannot be compared to present suffering.

God will grant revival when we become one in the Lord. It is truly difficult to achieve unity in human affairs. The devil will never allow it. One thing is clear: I will see the Lord's glory. God will deal with, correct, and raise us up, who are sinful and full of flaws, for His glory and holiness. Thus, He will ultimately remove our stubborn hearts and give us His heart. I will give them one heart, and put a new spirit within them; I will remove the heart of stone from their flesh and give them a heart of flesh, that they may walk in my statutes and keep my ordinances and practice them. Then they shall be my people, and I will be their God. (Ezekiel 11:19, 20) To win is not to believe in feelings, but to believe in the Lord's promises. Persevere.

Those who glorify God enjoy peace even in tribulation. Those who succeed in Ministry to God also succeed in Ministry to People. Priorities give birth to life. Though that devil rushes at us with open mouth to devour us, the Lord Jesus is our captain, and we will fight and win in the end. My soul is at peace, my soul, my soul is at peace. - Hymn 46
^^ Let the day be holy, holy day.
For the Lord, for the Lord's glory... Please accept it, Lord.

When my older brother calls, I can't sleep. I feel so challenged and excited... lol Today is one of those days. I'm watching a drama I enjoy, but after talking to my brother, I feel guilty even watching dramas. lol For now, I must watch "The Moon Embracing the Sun," so please refrain from calling on Wednesdays and Thursdays. lol Especially on Wednesday and Thursday drama nights. Haha, you know I'm joking, right? Hearing about your family matters (?) is truly challenging. I praise the Lord who receives glory through your life. Hallelujah!!!!!!
In modern times, many people compromise. Among them, the most serious is salvation without repentance. Without holiness, you will not see the Lord.
It is a night of much repentance. Because I am responsible for souls and the power of life is crucial. I must become dirtier and be completely burned away. Only the Lord must receive glory.

There is a saying, "Leave when the applause is loudest." That is selfish thinking. A person with a mission does not leave for personal gain, but for glory. Glory is not my will, but His will, who receives glory.
* Good news: The Lord still reigns today. In all visible and invisible realms, the Lord is King. This is comfort and joy.

I am truly thankful to God for the co-workers who are with me. This path is not easy, and the emotional hardship must be immense... Like Wallace Hartley, who returned to play with John Wesley and other co-workers until the end when the Titanic sank, even though he was left alone to play. If we are together with such love that we do not fear death, it will be infinitely glorious. Walking together is so glorious and happy. Gentlemen, it has been a privilege playing with you tonight. - Wallace Hartley, Conductor of the Bethel Independent Methodist Church Choir, after finishing the final performance on the sinking Titanic.

Among the many aspects of piety, what truly bears little fruit and obscures glory is enjoying the praise of men more than necessary. O Lord, do not give glory to us, do not give glory to us, but to your name give glory, because of your steadfast love and your faithfulness. - Psalm 115:1

1. We need salvation in our future, careers, relationships, health, and hearts. 2. God's salvation, the Father's will, is not revealed to just anyone. 3. Those who do what is right will see the Lord's salvation and His will. 4. Those who do what is right, offer sacrifices with thanksgiving, and glorify God are the same person. 5. Offer sacrifices of thanksgiving. You will see His will. 6. Whoever offers thanksgiving as a sacrifice glorifies me; to him who orders his way aright I will show the salvation of God. - Psalm 50:23

When we encounter problems, trying to solve them is instinct. However, what the Lord desires is not to solve the problems, but to look to the Lord. When we desire the Lord's glory more than the solution to the problem, we experience the Lord resolving and blessing us. Daniel did not look at the problem (lions) in the lion's den, but looked to the Lord. The mighty Lord...
...In that way, only the Lord should receive the most glory, only the Lord should be most exalted.

Among the sacrifices in the Old Testament, the burnt offering is one that is completely burned. Glory appears when everything is completely burned. When the Holy Spirit comes, we will live a life of complete burning. Because He gives us the true goal and the field.

In 1977, Voyager 2 traveled towards the edge of the solar system at a speed of 90,000 miles per hour, faster than a bullet. In 1989, about 11 years later, after reaching Pluto, it left the solar system. This means it will take another 958,000 years to see another star, and that's within a 1 light-year range. There are said to be 100 million such solar systems within the Milky Way galaxy, and 100 billion such galaxies in the universe. The number of stars in the universe is approximately 7 trillion multiplied by 10 billion, which is 10 times more than all the grains of sand on Earth. It's like 10 to the power of 16 times the number of grains in a handful of sand. Yet, our God created all these things. He also made the stars (Genesis 1:16). Oh, how simple He is. That is the power of the Creator, the Almighty. And such a God loves me, overlooks insults to His divinity that are higher than our personhood, and pays all the price on the cross. And He wants us to trust Him with complete faith.

When starting a relationship, people often celebrate 100 days and observe Valentine's and White Day. Without love, it's a chore and torture for both the giver and the receiver. Without love, everything is a wound and everything is tiring. Although the situation was critical, like being stoned, Stephen was happy and glorious because he had love. With love, one is not deceived or broken; instead, one devastates the forces of darkness.

The fire of the Word, the fire of the Holy Spirit, makes people concentrate. To concentrate means to be able to let go. Only those who possess the fire can boldly let go. No matter how long something has been prepared or how precious it is to me, I can cast it aside like a weed in the face of life and the glory of the Lord. One cannot swallow life without spitting out what is rotten.
The Lord desires a broken heart because His glory will shine brighter through its cracks.
Looking back at myself, I bow my head in gratitude to everyone. What we did together was grace, and our staying together was mercy. Each person is an overwhelming glory to me.
Do not strive in vain elsewhere; instead, use the precious people and valuable time given to you to bring glory.
Courage_and_Peace: The presence that breaks fear. Fear is not because the problem is big, but because the presence is lacking. Worship with presence breaks fear.
* Reverence. The Holy Spirit is not someone convenient, but someone who brings peace.
* Comfort my people. Empathy like "How much does it hurt?" does more than explanations like "You should have done better." Sometimes, an unloving answer is more painful than pitiful incompetence.
Reason for gratitude. The most moving gratitude is when the Lord is with me.

* The reason why problems should never be treated as problems. If you see a problem as a problem, you are already buried in it. Step out of it and see it through the Lord's eyes, and you will only see good things working together.

* Walk out of stress. If there is something that repeatedly occupies your mind, walk out of that stress. The Lord is not present in stress based on imagination, because He does not want us to suffer for things that are not essential.

* Relationship problems. What is absolutely necessary in relationship problems is margin, and that margin comes when we know, experience, and taste God. It is meditating on His character, power, and what He has done. Taste and see that the Lord is good; blessed is the one who takes refuge in Him. Fear the Lord, you his saints, for those who fear him lack nothing. The young lions suffer want and hunger; but those who seek the Lord shall not want any good thing. -Psalm 34:8-10
* Be courageous. The precious co-workers, mentors, training, and service given to me are permitted by God. The Lord's guidance is flawless, and His intention for me is peace.
* Comfort. I may know nothing, but the Lord knows everything.
* How to secure safety. It is not about getting guarantees from people, but about laying everything down and entrusting it to God.

* True rest comes from true repentance. Even if you change time, place, or environment for rest, you will never enjoy peaceful rest if you do not abandon sin and draw near to God. For thus says the Lord GOD, the Holy One of Israel, "In returning and rest you shall be saved; in quietness and in trust shall be your strength." But you were unwilling, -Isaiah 30:15
* Guidance. It seems painful to give up desires, but it is painful because you do not give them up. If you give up desires, guidance becomes much easier.
* Secure peace. To save souls, you must seek peace. Because only when I have peace can I move others with inspiration, not coercion.
* Trials cannot damage happiness. This moment is so moving and full of gratitude.

* What everyone needs now is God's peace. For leaders who must make decisions, for those who must obey the Lord's will, for those turning from the path of jealousy, for those who see people as productive due to vain ambition, for oneself who blames the system but needs fundamental repentance, when peace comes to all, only then can the Lord's high purpose be seen.
* The blessing of an uneasy heart. An uneasy heart, along with peace, is another wheel of guidance given by God. It is a red light that we can enjoy when we are awake and alive.
* Mistakes and wrong calls are also part of the game. Mistakes and wrong calls are part of the game, but for those who love God, in whom all things work together for good, there is hope and boldness.
Time is in His Hand.

* Rejoice even when you cannot see me. A mother is satisfied just by seeing delicious food go into her son's or daughter's mouth. She is happy even if she is not seen, as long as her children look beautiful in a photo. There is no greater joy for me than hearing that my children walk in truth. -3 John 1:4
* What is realized when becoming one with the Lord is that it was love, not burden or load.
* Never be afraid. I will guide you... The situation you fear is not the situation, but the plan I have prepared.
* The power of perseverance. ...always looking at Your beauty...
* When I am weakest, God protects me most powerfully.
* Suffering beyond myself. God does His work. Therefore, when God is at work, people should not worry but praise and be at peace.

Disappointment is losing hope. We expect results based on calculations and probabilities, which leads to losing hope. Instead of expecting the results you desire, expect the good God, and you will have peace, not be attached, and always be victorious.
When facing trials you cannot control, you must remain calm. Since it is something outside your domain, the Lord will handle it, and it is to establish us, who are on the periphery, at the center.
You are used one way or another. If you are being used by Him, you will be thankful and at peace, but if you are used by that fellow, you will resent and hate him. There is no in-between.
No one can condemn or hinder me unless I allow it.

Do not follow calculations. You calculate because you are anxious, and you are anxious because you are not looking at the Lord. If you calculate, you live a tiring life. How difficult is it to manipulate others? Let go of calculations and hold onto revelation.

Worrying is a sign that you are not looking at the Lord. The desire to worry comfortably (?) while staring blankly without looking at the Lord is a fallen sinful nature. Rather, when you go all-in on the Lord, you experience a peace that the world cannot give.
Is there anything that is not God's grace? Therefore, I am only thankful and satisfied. The one who gave it is God, and the one who takes it away is God.
The reason for not fearing is that there is someone accompanying us, and our purpose has changed.
When in despair, give thanks. It is because God will work. God works with strength when I am weak.
Peace does not come from me. It is a power that descends from above. Therefore, peace is not about calculation and reasoning, but about listening to the Lord's gentle voice.
After the arrow has left the bow, do not listen to your uncomfortable heart; just look at the Almighty God and express your gratitude. Like an arrow leaving a bow...
The songs of ascents in the Psalms of David do not contain instructions on how to make a bulletin or display subtitles. There is only the peace and longing of a weaned child, so delighted with God.
Invite the Lord's reign into your twisted life. All impurity and darkness will recede, and the Lord's peace will reign.

I can do nothing unless the Lord permits it. Therefore, there is no reason for me to be distressed. Rather than worrying about things I cannot achieve, I hope you will be thankful for what you are currently permitted to do. "O Lord, my heart is not haughty, nor my eyes lofty; nor do I concern myself with great matters, nor with things too wonderful for me." - Psalm 131:1

The reason why people are anxious even in joy and worried even when they seem at peace is that they cannot hear God's voice. Silence without a voice is merely the eve of a typhoon. However, when you hear His voice, you will have peace. It is because you hear, "Seek my face." "Your face, Lord, I will seek." - Psalm 27:8
Those who acknowledge God's sovereignty do not fear. Instead, they command their destiny.

The reason why you should not be deceived by displeasure is that since I am not another person, and another person is not me, it is more important to trust the Almighty Lord who permitted these conditions than the conditions themselves. Do not be so concerned with things that are not truth. If you hold onto the Lord, who is the eternal truth, you can be free from perishable attachments.
There is no need for confirmation because the Lord reigns, so there is no need to seek confirmation from a weak person.
We cling to what the Lord has not given us. Because we are anxious, we try to snatch and fight. What the Lord has permitted, we can enjoy with gratitude and peace.
Instead of getting angry at people, be humble before God who is permitting this now.
I only need to know one thing: because the Lord knows everything.

No matter where you live in the world, people's lives are pretty much the same. Clinging to a place or having illusions means your current life is very difficult. Wherever you go, the place the Lord leads you is the best.
The cross is heavy enough. However, it becomes a strong bridge when the waves are rough.
The victory of faith is peace. It comes when you give thanks. Complaining about situations and people is the work of the devil. Overcome and give thanks.
Be reconciled. The Lord is near. Philippians 4:5
Resolve to give absolute thanks and be absolutely at peace in all things. No adversary will be able to deceive or overcome you. Love achieves the greatest gratitude and peace.
Let go, and you will be free from pain. Entrust it, and the Lord will solve it.

If you cannot let go, you will suffer. Trying to have more is greed, and where there is greed, there is anguish. True peace is found when you shift your focus from enforcing your will to fulfilling God's will.

Change is an act of God's sovereign power and a miracle. What is even more amazing is that He continuously holds onto and protects that change. It is God's love and mercy, deep and wide, that cannot be understood by human intellect.
I do not worry about things I cannot solve.

Why have my sad premonitions never been wrong? There are times when I feel so good that I become anxious. It's the fear that this goodness might be taken away. Indeed, sad premonitions are never wrong. If I rejoice in the blessings given and thank the giver, God guarantees the quality and quantity of my gratitude.

The reason it's not difficult: When the Lord becomes the owner, God's kingdom is established. Now this worry is no longer mine, but my Lord's. Therefore, when we seek His kingdom and His sovereignty, all these things are added. Do not worry.

Why does He give us suffering? It is so that we may look only to the Lord. Because we keep placing our hope in people, He tells us to look only to the Lord. When you are in pain, look to the Lord's face. Look to the Prince of Peace - J.W.P. Cast your cares on the Lord - Psalm 55:22.

When anxiety and fear come, we are not looking to the Lord. In the Psalms, David, though a good believer and king, reminded himself to look only to God who helps him whenever he felt anxious by looking at Saul and the circumstances. Another way of saying "looking to the Lord" is to praise Him. - Psalm 42 -

An anxious heart comes from an unstable position. If you lift your heart, you will somehow have no peace. If you lower your center, you will see the Lord in reassurance. God leads those with a firm foundation to peace upon peace.
Disadvantages are given by an unfair world. However, justice and dominion come from God. Do not look to people's opinions; look only to the Lord.

Do not be discouraged. I have learned something through experiencing disappointment in life. Just because one part is disappointing does not mean everything is disappointing. God is still working and comforts us through unexpected things. He also transforms that disappointing part into glory.
Do not compare. What I have is far more than what I should have, generously given by the Lord.
It doesn't matter if the plane is delayed. It is more important to arrive safely at your destination. Just walk the path the Lord has intended. Comparing speed is not as important as direction.

If you live clinging to people and the world, there will be no absolute peace or satisfaction there. How long will you live weighing things? How long will you hesitate and conflict? If you do not know Jesus, your life will be like eating with refuse beside you. Even if you try to live as you please and do as you want, it won't work. Of course, it won't work, and you will be ruined. What is not given to the Lord will be taken away. How long will you waver between the two opinions? If the Lord is God, follow him, but if Baal is God, follow him. - 1 Kings 18:21 Choose this day whom you will serve, but as for me and my house, we will serve the Lord. - Joshua 24:15.

Everyone is anxious. It is because they fear being lonely. Yet, despite much effort, that fear becomes reality. It is because they try too hard to succeed. Clinging always ends in a great downfall. When you place all your security in the Lord and are prepared to lose everything within that, you will finally experience peace and see tangled problems unravel.
Faith: Seeing the Lord's dominion in situations that are unbearable.

If you look to people, you will always be chased. The problem is not being chased, but always making the wrong move in that situation. If you just stayed still, you would see God's work, but the problem is becoming anxious and doing things you shouldn't. Look only to the Lord. Then you will be able to be still.

One thing to make clear: The one who rules is the Lord. For those who seek His kingship - His kingdom, intimacy with the Lord - His righteousness, there will be God's peace, and for those who seek their own arbitrary decisions and friendship with the world, fear will come.
To love is to be a joy simply by existing.

When the wind blows, stand on the hill. How nice it would be if hiding stopped the wind! The Bible tells us to be courageous 366 times every moment. Stand boldly before the fierce wind that seems like it will blow you away. Then you will know that the Lord is with you. Jesus awoke and rebuked the wind and said to the sea, "Quiet! Be still!" And the wind ceased, and there was a great calm. - Mark 4:39.

Quoting the Lord's words from the Sermon on the Mount, those who bring harmony to the community are the ones living well (blessed), and those who cause discord and division are failures who are not living well.

It is not the inability to achieve things by my own strength and will that becomes discouraging, but rather that it is accomplished by the Holy Spirit that brings great comfort and hope. Those who try to fulfill their own will will cling to it, but those who look to the grace of the Almighty will dwell securely.
Do not be angry by imagining; be at peace on the truth. It is not that it is that way, but it is simply permitted for me within the Lord's providence.

Do not imagine. Imagining is what unbelievers do. Imagining makes you violent. We are all hit by poisoned arrows every day. Instead of pulling out the arrow and looking for who shot it, the priority is to apply the antidote and bandage it. Come to the Lord. Listen to what God says. Do what God wants. Practice obeying the Lord's voice rather than rational calculations. If the Lord tells you to be angry and take revenge, do so. If not, obey and forgive. The reason I cannot speak about unreasonable things is because I fear myself. Have gentleness and a holistic perspective. You will be able to state things peacefully.
