Those who know the end have leisure and peace. There is no baseless dissatisfaction or anger. It is too reasonable. However, reconsider whether it fulfills "God's righteousness." The flaws seen in others are shown by the Lord for my sake. Pray for others and for myself, and move forward. (Romans 1) The Lord places Saul before me to deal with the Saul within me. Respond with flight, forgiveness, and prayer. Do not resist. The Lord calls us for miracles. If you respond with faith, you will see the miracle of transformation. The older I get, the more I realize that what I thought was right is all wrong. I need to change a lot and have lived with many misunderstandings. If you understand, you can let go. Understand the nature of the devil. When exposed, it flees. Expose it in the light. Why are my words ineffective and rejected? Because I do not ask in prayer. I also cannot easily dismiss a matter brought by someone who prays a lot. It feels like I am opposing God... Do not be stingy in expressing love. Especially people from Gyeongsang Province... Not misunderstanding is the best solution to block the devil's sharpest attack. Move forward with an opposing spirit + relinquishing rights. You will win. When dealing with someone who lacks propriety, examine yourself. Am I not also lacking propriety before the Lord? Relationships require patience and persistence. Above all, you must rely on the Lord. The Lord is the owner even in relationships. Do not be an unbeliever without faith; be a believer. The person who gets upset when things don't go their way is an unbeliever. Believe that the Lord is omniscient and omnipotent and can make Abraham's descendants through the person He has placed over you. David, because he believed in the living God, could control his reactions. Do you live without burden, with your true nature, and without lingering resentment? You will perish without resentment and without burden. Regard others as better than yourselves. And give up your own share. The Lord will repay. Loyalty is important, but if you are loyal without knowing God's secrets, you will cause trouble. More important than accumulating much knowledge is seeing God. That is purity of heart. The greatest crisis in life is when Jesus is not enough. Do not envy those who are successful in the world. Just because the packaging is good does not mean the contents are good. If you have Jesus, you have the highest value. Do not be too engrossed in gold, silver, and jewels. They are merely paving materials and interior decoration for heaven. Do not wear such large earrings.

The Lord who touches a broken heart. In the end, only He can touch a broken heart. No matter how much humans create an atmosphere, put on a show, and craft their words, recovery and healing ultimately happen before His throne. There is no need to rush the Lord's timing or worry about His methods. Trust the Lord and expect the Lord.

The most amazing way to instantly reverse situations and definitively control the game of life is 'gratitude.' For the soul that is grateful, God's blessings and reign have already descended. Are you grateful? Rejoice and be glad. It means the Lord's will is being executed.

Life moves and expresses itself. The Lord's love is life. That abundant love is limited within us. Unless we freely express it, the Lord has still decided to be limited by us. Rest and enjoyment are the beginning of bearing fruit. The Lord does it.

True Well-being: If you harbor ambition, anxiety arises, and you become fearful. Thus, you live a worldly life, struggling. However, in Thanksgiving, there is Peace & Rest, and you live a heavenly life, blessing.

Chain reaction: Gratitude arises from a contented heart. If you are grateful, you will not quarrel and will be peaceful and abundant. Therefore, if you are content and grateful and peaceful, it proves that you are within the One who strengthens me. I can do all things through Him who strengthens me. - Philippians 4:13.

In the world, people say they don't have time or leisure. Leisure does not come from time but from 'love.' What is more meaningful than sharing a McDonald's by the river in Richmond Hill is who you are with. Love overcomes judgment and boasts. Furthermore, it covers a multitude of sins.
The cross does not exempt you from life's storms. Rather, it allows you to walk on the storms.
Seeing the beautiful face of the Lord, my head bows before You. Your hand touches me, comforting my body and soul.
How grateful I am! That I do not have to rely on myself.

Jesus' way of dealing with our fear was not to remove the cause of the fear. The Lord says, "It is I; do not be afraid." The storm and waves remain, but the Lord is there. If the Lord is present, you will become courageous, and the waves will naturally become calm.

Jesus promised a peace that is not like the peace the world gives. It is absolute peace. It is the peace given by the absolute sovereign who is above the height and depth of rough waves, no matter how they crash. When my mind is full of thoughts, the Lord holds me. "When my troubles multiply, your comfort soothes my soul." - Psalm 94:19

* The reason for your distress is simply that you are trying to decide things outside of your authority. My future is not mine to decide, nor can I change the hearts of people. Please stop complaining. Even if we were to give thanks for every moment and every expression for our entire lives, we could never give enough thanks. What has been given to me is the best.

* How to overcome evil with good. Those who make the Word their light and lamp are characterized by peace and boldness. Things feel frightening not because their size is greater than mine, but because I don't feel God's presence with me. Do not think about things beyond your capacity. They are not your portion and will only bring sorrow that withers your bones. You will have peace if you acknowledge the sovereignty of the Almighty.
If you try to fulfill your own desires, you will be impatient and worried, but if you try to fulfill the Lord's will, you will instead be peaceful and bold.
When we do wrong, the whole world is filled with darkness. But when we turn back, the Lord shines again.
I am still and look only to the Lord. In perfect silence...

A truly hopeful word: "The Lord reigns!" Therefore, you do not need to worry.
It feels so good, indescribably so... looking to the Lord... I am truly happy.
Please do not be impatient. God is working even now. Do not let tomorrow's worries control you. I am under the blood.

The time spent looking to the Lord is the happiest and most precious time. He wants to call us out of tribulation and be with us. Do not worry about tomorrow, do not fear the temporary power of breathing through your nose, just focus on the Lord.
Peace comes when we realize that we can do nothing of our own accord unless it is the Lord's will. For only when we let go of greed can we truly be at peace.

*This is not a human error but God's providence. An ambulance overtakes all other cars and moves ahead. The Lord's omnipotence means that I am bold and enjoy true peace. Whether I live or die.

True peace does not come from solving the problem that is most difficult for you right now. True peace comes because of the One who is with you in the midst of the storm. Try to be with the One who is greater than the problem.

At this moment, I hope you will acknowledge the Lord's sovereignty and embrace His protection and guidance with faith. True blessings are given by the Lord. The phrase "the Lord gives" means that there is a measure and a scope to what the Lord gives. And instead, I hope you will boast in your deficiencies and weaknesses. For He said to me, "My grace is sufficient for you, for my power is made perfect in weakness." (2 Corinthians 12:9)

The reason He comforts me when my heart aches and becomes a good friend when I am lonely is because God has unspeakable reasons. I wish you peace. Because the Lord reigns. When the Lord becomes king, He will take full responsibility for this situation and break the yoke with His anointing.

A victim mentality is a delusion of persecution. What has happened to me would not have happened without the Lord's permission. Nothing that happens to me is unknown to the Lord. Cast out excessive burdens and stress that do not come from God in the name of Jesus. God is the only One who can allow us to dwell in peace, and He is the Father who works and accomplishes things within that peace.

God is your protector.
God never apologizes to us. Because He is omnipotent and protects us like the apple of His eye.
The reason God gives us salvation, unity, peace, and rest is not because we are good. We are not good and are wicked, but it is because He is good.

You must entrust everything to God and go forth for Him to work directly. To do so, you must believe and declare that 'I have been crucified with Christ' and consider it so. Giving up may seem painful, but it is also the greatest peace.
If you have done everything and it was in vain, there is still one thing left to do. That is to return to the Lord. So come Home running, His arms are open wide.

Everyone seeks peace, but sometimes we feel uncomfortable. This is truly a cause for gratitude. Because when the signal comes, we can look back at ourselves and turn around to see where our focus has gone wrong. Any focus not aligned with the Lord must vanish.
When you are struggling, look to the Lord. The Lord of comfort will give you rest.

When I cannot protect myself, I become even bolder. Because I have been freed from things that can be solved by worrying. Do not worry, but entrust it with gratitude. That is the intention of the Almighty.
Do not be resentful that things are not fair, but be thankful that the Lord is with you. It is more than I deserve, even with my shortcomings.
It is God who holds me. Therefore, do not fear people. It does not come from the east or the west, but only from God.
If you have many desires, you will have many conflicts. If you are satisfied only with the glory of the Lord, life becomes simple, and restoration and healing occur.
Be bold if you have entrusted all your affairs to the Lord. The Lord will not ask for more from there. He will take responsibility from there.

A newborn baby is helpless. Therefore, it needs parental care. So the baby does not worry or fret. That is the parents' responsibility. My worrying and frustration stem from not hearing the Lord's voice and not knowing His will. My grace is sufficient for you - 2 Corinthians 12:9.
There are two reasons why I do not fear circumstances: that they are not within my control, and that the Lord reigns. Boldness comes from focus. What do you focus on?

*Reasons to be bold amidst tribulation: We suffer in the world, experiencing unspeakable pain and tribulations beyond imagination. And though we do not know what tomorrow holds, we come to worship with our weary bodies. We are happy. Now, only the Lord and I exist.

*What one realizes when in distress: There are two things one realizes when in distress. That I cannot control it, and that I must look to the Lord's face. This is equivalent to saying that we must entrust and find rest. Let us look to the Lord's face.

Every breath I take now is a gift from the Lord. God has given me everything. Without that assurance, I would be anxious and fearful. The One who began is the Lord, and the One who will complete it is also the Lord.

Resting under a palm tree, drinking passion fruit juice, and watching the waves while sunbathing does not bring true rest. True rest comes when the Lord accompanies you. The Lord said, "I myself will go with you, and I will give you rest." - Exodus 33:14.

The Pharisees and Sadducees held power in society. Therefore, they could mobilize armies. However, it is said that they could not lay a hand on Jesus. This means they could not arrest Him. Because "his time had not yet come" (as planned by God). Even when Jesus taught at the temple treasury, no one arrested Him, "for his time had not yet come." - John 8:20. God is the best bodyguard. Do not fear.

Fleeting thoughts of emptiness arise in the heart because there is no truth within. Those who believe in God's sovereignty praise the Lord in all circumstances and remain unshaken. Do not be empty; discern the Lord's will. Those who acknowledge God's sovereignty will be comforted. "Therefore do not be foolish, but understand what the Lord's will is." - Ephesians 5:17.
Please give up trying to fix and solve. Instead, possess the ability to empathize, rejoicing together and weeping together. Then you will see more restoration and life. Love, do not analyze.
My feet hurt a lot. But I am very happy. Because of our young people... that is the blessing of this unworthy one. Meeting such precious friends...

At the most fitting time, the Lord will lead you on the best path. The Good Samaritan would have made the person he was meant to meet wait to help the one who had been robbed. Trust the Lord when you are afraid. The Lord is your refuge.

You are the reason I live, You are my song in the night. Into your hand I commit. You hold my life in the palm of your hand. I will trust in You, I will worship You forever. Do not fear, just believe.
The attitude and confession with which you face a problem are more important than the size of the problem. This is because He is working, even if He is not visible now.

There are times when we worry, fret, lose sleep, suffer, get angry, cannot forgive, tremble, feel jealous, want to give up, feel lonely, and empty. The boat is going uphill. For life to be peaceful and on the right path, we must discern the Lord's will. This means do not be foolish. (Ephesians 5:17) Therefore, do not be foolish, but understand what the Lord's will is.
Decide and be firm that you will not worry about what to eat or what to wear. God knows that you need these things.
The only competitiveness for a helpless sheep is 'companionship.' With the shepherd...

My heart aches from rejection and hurt, and I am upset by my inadequacy and lack. However, my inability to accept or forgive others does not diminish the Lord's forgiveness. God has already forgiven that person completely. Now, I only need to let go. All of it.
Do not worry or fret. The Lord will surely deliver you from the mouths of the professor and your boss. I was delivered from the lion's mouth. 2 Timothy 4:17.

If I had known the outcome, I would not have been so excited. A person of faith is one who knows the outcome. Be assured of the Lord's will in the Lord. That my thoughts toward you are of peace, not disaster... Without faith, one becomes angry, excited, and frustrated.
What I fear determines the direction of my life. God wants us to lay our future fears at His feet.

May you have the ability to see the end of the road, the power of outlook, and be bold.

Though I resolve, I waver. Though I turn to the Lord, I soon look to the world and my heart becomes heavy with fear, and I have no peace. In such times, I hope you will hold onto the Lord's word. The Holy Spirit, the Spirit of truth, sets you free. Where the Spirit of the Lord is, there is freedom. 2 Corinthians 3:17.

Clinging to an unchangeable past leads to self-blame, depression, and inability to control emotions. The Lord has never once rushed us. This is because the fault is beyond our capacity to bear. There is something I must focus on: God's will and presence. The rest are matters that God should worry about. Therefore, we should not worry about things that have not happened or have already happened. I hope you will look to the Lord right now.

Take your brother with you and go back to that man. May God Almighty grant you mercy in his sight, so that he may let your other brother and Benjamin come back with you. Do not fear your thesis or exams. The thesis required by the professor is an ideal one that might appear once in a hundred years, a thesis that even the professor has never been able to write. Do not be overwhelmed by exams and essays; instead, let us become lives that overwhelm them.
Spiritual_Warfare: Stalin, who purged and killed countless people through his secret police, had even his dozens of secret police chiefs kill each other through their successors.
